body.ko: 이번에 짜증 나게 하던 자잘한 버그들도 쓸어 담았다. 이를테면 대화가 횟수 제한(`--max-turns`)에 딱 걸렸을 때 친 글자가 소리 없이 날아가는 일이 없어졌다. Bash 명령어가 3만 자 넘게 출력하더라도 해당 PR(pull request, 코드 병합을 요청하는 과정)이 연결 목록에서 사라지지 않는다. Cowork 가상 머신(VM-mode)을 쓰는 사람도 영문 없이 다시 로그인하라는 오류를 겪지 않는다. 플러그인(plugin, 기능을 넓혀주는 추가 부품) 언어 서버의 경우, 하나가 켜지다 죽었다고 해서 멀쩡한 다른 서버까지 끌고 들어가 일손을 놓게 만들지 않는다. 또한 MCP(AI가 외부 도구를 쓰게 해주는 표준 규약) 서버 목록을 불러올 때 지원하지 않는 특수 문자가 있다고 통째로 멈추지 않고, 잘못된 이름만 넘기고 나머지는 무사히 불러온다. 아울러 충돌을 막기 위해 'Claude Browser'라는 이름을 미리 예약해 두었다. 물이 새거나 막히거나, 작은 돌멩이 하나에 배관 전체가 막혀버리던 이음새들을 전부 말끔히 수리한 것과 같다.

items.original:
Fixed a message sent while Claude was working being silently lost when the turn ended at the `--max-turns` limit
Fixed session-to-PR linking missing a PR created in a Bash call whose output exceeded the 30K inline limit
Fixed `claude mcp add-from-claude-desktop` getting stuck when a server name contains unsupported characters; invalid names are now reported and remaining servers still import
Fixed `--json-schema` silently producing unstructured output when the schema was invalid, and schemas using the `format` keyword being rejected
Fixed a plugin LSP server that fails to initialize preventing a valid LSP server from another plugin handling the same file extension
Reserved the "Claude Browser" MCP server name (alongside "Claude Preview") ahead of the Claude Desktop pane rename; user-configured MCP servers can no longer register under either name
Fixed Cowork VM-mode local-agent sessions failing to start with "Not logged in · Please run /login" on CLI 2.1.203+
Fixed project verify skills being rewritten on every session instead of only when a documented command changed

entries: Fixed hook events not streaming during SessionStart hooks in headless sessions, which could cause remote workers to be idle-reaped mid-hook

title.zh-TW: 遠端任務不再因為「看起來太閒」而被誤殺
title.zh-CN: 远端任务不再因为「看起来太闲」而被误杀
title.en: Remote tasks no longer get killed for "looking idle" during startup
title.ja: リモートタスクが「暇そうに見える」という理由で誤って強制終了されなくなった
title.ko: 원격 작업이 '한가해 보인다'는 이유로 억울하게 강제 종료되지 않는다.

body.zh-TW: 當你在無頭模式（headless session，沒有畫面的純背景執行模式）跑 Claude 時，如果剛啟動就在跑鉤子（hook，讓你在特定時間點自動觸發的腳本），以前它可能因為沒把進度回報出來，讓遠端系統以為它閒置太久（idle-reaped）而直接把它砍掉。現在進度會正常串流回報，確保系統知道它還在努力工作。就像一個在倉庫理貨的員工，以前因為沒出聲被主管當成在偷懶而直接開除，現在他會邊做事邊回報，就不會再被誤殺了。
body.zh-CN: 当你在无头模式（headless session，没有画面的纯背景执行模式）跑 Claude 时，如果刚启动就在跑钩子（hook，让你在特定时间点自动触发的脚本），以前它可能因为没把进度回报出来，让远端系统以为它闲置太久（idle-reaped）而直接把它砍掉。现在进度会正常串流回报，确保系统知道它还在努力工作。就像一个在仓库理货的员工，以前因为没出声被主管当成在偷懒而直接开除，现在他会边做事边回报，就不会再被误杀了。
body.en: When running Claude in a headless session (a purely background mode with no visible interface), if it was busy running startup hooks (scripts that automatically trigger at specific times) right after launching, the system used to sometimes fail to report its progress. This silence caused remote servers to assume it was idling (idle-reaped) and ruthlessly terminate it. Progress now streams correctly, proving it is still hard at work. It's like a warehouse worker who used to get fired for "slacking" because they were working quietly in the back; now they call out their progress as they go, avoiding wrongful termination.
body.ja: ヘッドレスセッション（headless session、画面のない完全なバックグラウンド実行モード）で Claude を動かす際、起動直後にフック（hook、特定のタイミングで自動実行されるスクリプト）を処理していると、以前はその進捗が報告されず、リモートシステムに「暇している（idle-reaped）」と誤認されて強制終了されることがあった。今は進捗が正しくストリーミング報告されるようになり、システムが作業中であることを確実に把握できる。倉庫で荷解きをしている従業員が、以前は無言で働いていたために上司からサボりだと勘違いされてクビになっていたのが、今は作業しながら声を出すようになり、誤って解雇されなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 헤드리스 세션(headless session, 화면 없이 배경에서만 도는 모드)에서 Claude를 돌릴 때, 켜자마자 훅(hook, 특정 시점에 자동으로 실행되는 스크립트)을 실행 중이면 예전엔 진행 상황을 밖으로 알리지 않아 원격 서버가 '너무 오래 쉬고 있다(idle-reaped)'고 착각해 그대로 죽여버리곤 했다. 이제는 진행 상황을 제때 흘려보내, 시스템이 아직 열심히 일하고 있음을 알 수 있게 했다. 창고에서 짐을 정리하는 직원이, 예전엔 아무 소리 없이 일하다가 농땡이 피우는 줄 안 상사에게 해고당했다면, 이제는 일하면서 계속 진행 상황을 보고해 억울하게 잘리지 않게 된 것과 같다.

items.original: Fixed hook events not streaming during SessionStart hooks in headless sessions, which could cause remote workers to be idle-reaped mid-hook

entries: Added a warning when your login is about to expire, so you can re-authenticate before background sessions are interrupted
Added a grey ⏸ badge to the footer when in manual permission mode, making the active mode always visible
Added the session's additional working directories to MCP `roots/list`, with `notifications/roots/list_changed` sent when the set changes
Fixed opening or switching background agent sessions on macOS stalling for 15–20 seconds due to a false low-memory detection (regression in 2.1.196)
Fixed background sessions becoming permanently unresponsive to attach, replies, and stop when the daemon's session token went stale — the session now recovers automatically
Fixed returning to `claude agents` silently stopping running subagents and re-running the prompt from scratch — their work now carries over
Fixed a memory and per-turn CPU regression in interactive sessions: the context-usage indicator no longer re-analyzes the entire transcript after every turn
Fixed background agents inheriting a stale `PATH` from the daemon instead of the dispatching shell, causing missing tools on Windows
Fixed background and agent-view sessions dropping a shell-exported `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`, which sent API keys to the default endpoint and failed with 401
Fixed Bash failing with "argument list too long" in repos with many git worktrees
Fixed worktree-isolated subagents sometimes running shell commands in the parent checkout instead of their own worktree
Fixed worktree creation rejecting nested repositories in multi-repo workspaces, leaving background sessions unable to isolate and edit
Fixed background agents crash-looping when their working directory was deleted, replaced by a file, or became an invalid path — they now fail once with a clear error
Fixed a background daemon auto-upgrade failure silently killing all running background sessions
Fixed `TaskStop` and `TaskOutput` failing to find background agents spawned by another agent — errors now list running agents by id and description
Fixed the `claude agents` composer discarding your typed message when a slash command isn't available there
Fixed the agent list crashing when opening a stopped session whose conversation was already open in another session
Fixed background sessions showing "Needs input" in the agent list after the question was already answered
Fixed background agent startup failures showing only "exit_with_message" instead of the actual error
Fixed background sessions ignoring `effortLevel` changes in settings.json when forked through the daemon
Fixed attached background sessions ignoring `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE` and `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE_CLICKS` opt-outs
Fixed `/exit` incorrectly warning about running background agents after all named agents had completed
Fixed background sessions started from a non-git directory unable to edit files when a `WorktreeCreate` hook was configured
Fixed the `@` directory picker in `claude agents` not showing registered git worktrees
Fixed background task output on Windows being permanently replaced by an empty file after `/clear`
Fixed content jumping when scrolling up through long transcript history
Fixed the terminal flickering and jumping while typing in bash mode when a shell-history suggestion was shown
Fixed literal `^[[I` / `^[[O` escape codes being printed when reattaching to a background session
Fixed LSP-only plugins being incorrectly flagged for disuse when their language servers deliver diagnostics or answer navigation requests
Improved responsiveness while long responses stream: live-preview updates no longer re-render the whole screen
Improved subagent behavior: agents are now less likely to re-delegate their entire task to another subagent
Reduced binary size by ~7 MB and startup memory by ~7 MB by loading a large bundled dependency lazily instead of inlining it
Changed left arrow to no longer close the background tasks, diff, and workflow detail views — press Esc instead
Changed the empty `claude agents` view to always show the organized sections (Needs input / Working / Completed) with descriptions
Removed the startup "claude command missing or broken" warnings — they now appear in `/doctor` and `/status` instead
Removed a redundant navigation hint from the `claude agents` footer
[VSCode] Added a Settings toggle for "Enable Remote Control for all sessions"

title.zh-TW: 速度大解放：Mac 切換不再卡頓，打字捲動更滑順
title.zh-CN: 速度大解放：Mac 切换不再卡顿，打字滚动更滑顺
title.en: Speed Unleashed: No more Mac stalls, smoother typing and scrolling
title.ja: 速度が大幅向上：Macの切り替えがスムーズに、タイピングとスクロールも快適に
title.ko: 속도 대폭 향상: Mac 전환 시 멈춤 해결, 타이핑과 스크롤이 더 부드러워짐

body.zh-TW: 這次把效能調到最好。以前在 macOS 上切換背景任務時，會因為誤判「記憶體不足」而卡個 15 到 20 秒；在一般對話中，系統為了算剩餘字數（context-usage），每講完一句話就會把歷史紀錄全部重算一次，吃掉一堆資源；長答案吐出來時畫面還會整個重繪——現在這些蠢事都不會發生了，連帶把開機需要的記憶體也省下了大約 7MB。這就像以前你的電腦每次開新網頁都要全身健檢一次，現在它只看你點了什麼，所以反應快如閃電。
body.zh-CN: 这次把性能调到最好。以前在 macOS 上切换背景任务时，会因为误判「内存不足」而卡个 15 到 20 秒；在一般对话中，系统为了算剩余字数（context-usage），每讲完一句话就会把历史记录全部重算一次，吃掉一堆资源；长答案吐出来时画面还会整个重绘——现在这些蠢事都不会发生了，连带把开机需要的内存也省下了大约 7MB。这就像以前你的电脑每次开新网页都要全身健检一次，现在它只看你点了什么，所以反应快如闪电。
body.en: Performance is now tuned to the max. Previously on macOS, switching background tasks would stall for 15 to 20 seconds due to a false "low memory" detection; in interactive chat, the system would needlessly recalculate the entire transcript history after every single turn just to update the remaining context usage, devouring resources; and streaming long answers would cause the whole screen to redraw. None of these happen anymore, shaving off about 7MB of startup memory too. It's like a computer that used to run a full virus scan every time you opened a new tab, but now just loads what you clicked, reacting lightning fast.
body.ja: パフォーマンスが極限まで引き上げられた。以前は macOS で背景タスクを切り替える際、「メモリ不足」の誤検知により 15〜20 秒もフリーズしていた。また通常の対話では、残り文字数（context-usage）を計算するためだけに、発言のたびに全履歴を再計算してリソースを食いつぶし、長い答えが出力されると画面全体が再描画されていた。今はこれらの無駄が一切なくなり、起動メモリも約 7MB 節約された。以前は新しいページを開くたびに全身の健康診断をしていたパソコンが、今はクリックしたものだけを処理し、稲妻のように速く反応するようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 성능을 최고로 끌어올렸다. 예전엔 macOS에서 백그라운드 작업을 전환할 때 '메모리 부족'을 잘못 감지해 15~20초 동안 멈추곤 했다. 또한 일반 대화 시 남은 글자 수(context-usage)를 계산하느라 말이 끝날 때마다 전체 기록을 처음부터 다시 계산해 자원을 갉아먹었고, 긴 답변이 나올 땐 화면 전체를 다시 그려야 했다. 이제는 이런 바보 같은 일이 일어나지 않으며, 시작할 때 쓰는 메모리도 7MB 정도 줄였다. 예전엔 새 인터넷 창을 열 때마다 컴퓨터가 전신 건강 검진을 했다면, 이제는 누른 것만 바로바로 처리해 번개처럼 반응하게 된 것과 같다.

items.original:
Fixed opening or switching background agent sessions on macOS stalling for 15–20 seconds due to a false low-memory detection (regression in 2.1.196)
Fixed a memory and per-turn CPU regression in interactive sessions: the context-usage indicator no longer re-analyzes the entire transcript after every turn
Reduced binary size by ~7 MB and startup memory by ~7 MB by loading a large bundled dependency lazily instead of inlining it
Improved responsiveness while long responses stream: live-preview updates no longer re-render the whole screen

title.zh-TW: 視覺介面更乾淨，畫面不亂跳、模式不看錯
title.zh-CN: 视觉界面更干净，画面不乱跳、模式不看错
title.en: Cleaner UI: No jumping screens, mode is always clear
title.ja: 画面が乱れず、モードも見間違えないクリーンなUIに
title.ko: 깔끔해진 UI: 화면이 튀지 않고 현재 모드를 헷갈리지 않는다

body.zh-TW: 操作介面變得更直覺也更穩定了。當你在手動模式（系統每次做事都要你按同意的模式）時，左下角會一直有個灰色的 ⏸ 標記提醒你，不怕忘記自己開了什麼模式。在看很長的對話往上捲時，內容不再會莫名其妙自己亂跳；打字時如果跳出指令建議，終端機也不會跟著狂閃。而且現在代理（agent）清單一打開就會乖乖分好「需輸入 / 執行中 / 已完成」的區域。此外，開機時一堆嚇人的「指令壞掉」警告也不會再洗版，通通收進 `/doctor` 裡了。這就像看一本排版精美的書，以前翻頁會卡住、字會跳動，現在每一頁都服服貼貼，連標籤也貼得清清楚楚。
body.zh-CN: 操作界面变得更直觉也更稳定了。当你在手动模式（系统每次做事都要你按同意的模式）时，左下角会一直有个灰色的 ⏸ 标记提醒你，不怕忘记自己开了什么模式。在看很长的对话往上卷时，内容不再会莫名其妙自己乱跳；打字时如果跳出指令建议，终端机也不会跟着狂闪。而且现在代理（agent）清单一打开就会乖乖分好「需输入 / 执行中 / 已完成」的区域。此外，开机时一堆吓人的「指令坏掉」警告也不会再洗版，通通收进 `/doctor` 里了。这就像看一本排版精美的书，以前翻页会卡住、字会跳动，现在每一页都服服贴贴，连标签也贴得清清楚楚。
body.en: The interface is now more intuitive and stable. When you are in manual mode (where the system waits for your approval before acting), a persistent grey ⏸ badge sits in the footer so you always know what mode is active. Scrolling up through long transcripts won't cause the text to jump around inexplicably, and the terminal won't violently flicker when showing shell command suggestions. Also, opening an empty agent list now cleanly displays structured sections like "Needs input / Working / Completed" right from the start. Start-up screens are cleaner too, as scary "command missing or broken" warnings no longer spam you; they are tucked neatly into `/doctor`. It's like reading a beautifully formatted book: pages used to stick and letters used to dance around, but now every page turns smoothly, and the sticky notes are perfectly legible.
body.ja: 操作インターフェースがより直感的に、安定したものになった。手動モード（システムが何かするたびに同意を求めるモード）の場合、左下に灰色の ⏸ マークが常に表示され、今のモードを忘れることがなくなった。長い対話を上へスクロールしても内容が勝手に飛ぶことはなく、タイピング中にコマンドの候補が出ても端末が激しく点滅しなくなった。また、エージェント（agent）一覧を開くと最初から「入力待ち / 実行中 / 完了」のセクションが綺麗に分かれて表示される。起動時に大量に出ていた「コマンド破損」の恐ろしい警告も画面を埋め尽くすのをやめ、すべて `/doctor` 内に収められた。以前はページをめくると引っかかり、文字が飛び跳ねていた本が、今は全ページが滑らかにめくれ、付箋もくっきり貼られているようなものである。
body.ko: 조작 화면이 더 직관적이고 안정적으로 변했다. 수동 모드(시스템이 무언가를 할 때마다 당신의 동의를 구하는 모드)일 때는 왼쪽 아래에 회색 ⏸ 마크가 계속 떠 있어 지금 무슨 모드인지 잊어버릴 일이 없다. 아주 긴 대화를 위로 스크롤할 때 내용이 뜬금없이 이리저리 튀지 않으며, 글자를 칠 때 명령어 추천이 뜬다고 터미널 화면이 깜빡거리지도 않는다. 또한 빈 에이전트(agent) 목록을 열었을 때부터 '입력 대기 / 실행 중 / 완료' 구역이 깔끔하게 나뉘어 보인다. 프로그램을 켤 때 화면을 도배하던 무시무시한 '명령어 고장' 경고들도 이제는 얌전히 `/doctor` 안으로 들어갔다. 예전엔 책장을 넘기면 걸리고 글자가 춤을 추던 책이, 이제는 한 장 한 장 부드럽게 넘어가고 책갈피도 깔끔하게 꽂혀 있는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added a grey ⏸ badge to the footer when in manual permission mode, making the active mode always visible
Fixed content jumping when scrolling up through long transcript history
Fixed the terminal flickering and jumping while typing in bash mode when a shell-history suggestion was shown
Changed the empty `claude agents` view to always show the organized sections (Needs input / Working / Completed) with descriptions
Changed left arrow to no longer close the background tasks, diff, and workflow detail views — press Esc instead
Removed the startup "claude command missing or broken" warnings — they now appear in `/doctor` and `/status` instead
Removed a redundant navigation hint from the `claude agents` footer
Fixed literal `^[[I` / `^[[O` escape codes being printed when reattaching to a background session

title.zh-TW: 背景任務更可靠，斷線能救回、升級不中斷
title.zh-CN: 背景任务更可靠，断线能救回、升级不中断
title.en: Reliable Background Tasks: Auto-recovery and safe upgrades
title.ja: 背景タスクの信頼性向上：切断からの復帰、中断のないアップグレード
title.ko: 믿음직한 백그라운드 작업: 연결 끊김 복구와 안전한 업그레이드

body.zh-TW: 這次大幅提升了背景代理（agent）的生存能力。如果你的登入狀態快過期了，系統現在會提早警告你，讓你有時間續命，不會讓跑了一半的任務直接死掉。就算背後的連線金鑰真的過期導致連不上，現在它也能自動恢復，不會永遠裝死。以前如果你把代理清單關掉再重開，正在跑的子任務會默默停掉並重頭來過；或者背景程式自己偷偷升級時，會把所有執行中的任務全部砍光——這些災難現在都修復了。同時，如果任務的工作資料夾突然被刪除，它會報個清楚的錯誤給你，而不是卡在無限崩潰的迴圈裡。就像一個在外奔波的業務，以前手機沒電或公司搬家就會直接失聯，現在他不但會提早說手機快沒電，遇到狀況也會自動重連回報。
body.zh-CN: 这次大幅提升了背景代理（agent）的生存能力。如果你的登入状态快过期了，系统现在会提早警告你，让你有时间续命，不会让跑了一半的任务直接死掉。就算背后的连线密钥真的过期导致连不上，现在它也能自动恢复，不会永远装死。以前如果你把代理清单关掉再重开，正在跑的子任务会默默停掉并重头来过；或者背景程序自己偷偷升级时，会把所有执行中的任务全部砍光——这些灾难现在都修复了。同时，如果任务的工作文件夹突然被删除，它会报个清楚的错误给你，而不是卡在无限崩溃的循环里。就像一个在外奔波的业务，以前手机没电或公司搬家就会直接失联，现在他不但会提早说手机快没电，遇到状况也会自动重连回报。
body.en: The survival rate of background agents has seen a massive boost. If your login is about to expire, the system now warns you early so you can re-authenticate before any half-finished tasks are violently interrupted. If the background daemon's session token does go stale, agents will gracefully auto-recover instead of playing dead forever. Previously, returning to the agent list could silently kill running subagents and force them to restart from scratch, and silent background daemon upgrades used to mercilessly axe all your running sessions; these catastrophes are now fixed. Also, if a task's working directory gets unexpectedly deleted, it now gives you a clear error once rather than getting stuck in an infinite crash loop. Like a traveling salesperson who used to vanish entirely if their phone died or the office moved; now they warn you before their battery runs out and always know how to reconnect when things go wrong.
body.ja: 背景エージェント（agent）の生存能力が大幅に向上した。ログインの期限が切れそうな場合、システムが早めに警告を出し、実行中のタスクが強制終了される前に認証を更新できるようになった。裏の通信キーが本当に期限切れになって接続できなくなっても、今は永遠にフリーズせず自動的に復帰する。以前は、エージェント一覧を閉じて開き直すだけで実行中のサブタスクが黙って停止し最初からやり直しになったり、背景のプログラムがこっそりアップデートされた際に全タスクが道連れで消されたりしていたが、これらの大惨事は修正された。さらに、タスクの作業フォルダが突然削除されても、無限クラッシュループに陥らず、一度だけ明確なエラーを出して止まる。外回りの営業マンが、以前はスマホの電池切れやオフィスの移転で完全に音信不通になっていたのが、今は電池が切れる前に連絡し、トラブル時も自力で再接続して報告してくるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 백그라운드 에이전트(agent)의 생존력이 크게 올랐다. 로그인 만료 시간이 다가오면 시스템이 미리 경고해 줘서 한창 돌아가던 작업이 갑자기 죽어버리기 전에 수명을 연장할 수 있다. 뒤에서 통신하는 열쇠가 진짜로 만료돼 연결이 끊겨도, 이제는 영원히 뻗어 있지 않고 알아서 회복한다. 예전엔 에이전트 목록을 닫았다 다시 열면 잘 돌던 하위 작업이 소리 없이 멈추고 처음부터 다시 시작하거나, 백그라운드 프로그램이 몰래 업그레이드되면서 돌고 있던 모든 작업을 다 죽여버렸는데, 이런 대참사들이 모두 고쳐졌다. 또한 작업하던 폴더가 갑자기 지워져도, 무한 충돌의 늪에 빠지는 대신 명확한 오류를 한 번 뱉고 멈춘다. 밖에서 발로 뛰는 영업사원이, 예전엔 휴대폰 배터리가 나가거나 회사가 이사하면 그대로 연락 두절이 되던 것에서, 이제는 배터리가 나가기 전에 미리 알리고 문제가 생겨도 알아서 다시 연락해 오는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added a warning when your login is about to expire, so you can re-authenticate before background sessions are interrupted
Fixed background sessions becoming permanently unresponsive to attach, replies, and stop when the daemon's session token went stale — the session now recovers automatically
Fixed returning to `claude agents` silently stopping running subagents and re-running the prompt from scratch — their work now carries over
Fixed background agents crash-looping when their working directory was deleted, replaced by a file, or became an invalid path — they now fail once with a clear error
Fixed a background daemon auto-upgrade failure silently killing all running background sessions
Fixed background agent startup failures showing only "exit_with_message" instead of the actual error
Fixed background sessions showing "Needs input" in the agent list after the question was already answered
Fixed `/exit` incorrectly warning about running background agents after all named agents had completed
Fixed the agent list crashing when opening a stopped session whose conversation was already open in another session

title.zh-TW: 工作環境與 Git 不再打架，指令順暢執行
title.zh-CN: 工作环境与 Git 不再打架，指令顺畅执行
title.en: Environment and Git play nice, commands run smoothly
title.ja: 作業環境と Git が干渉しなくなり、コマンドがスムーズに実行
title.ko: 작업 환경과 Git이 충돌하지 않아 명령어가 매끄럽게 실행됨

body.zh-TW: 對於常在複雜專案裡工作的人，指令與環境不會再搞失蹤了。以前在 Windows 上，背景任務可能會拿到舊的路徑清單（PATH），導致找不到該用的工具；或者會不小心弄丟你設定好的網址環境變數，害你連錯伺服器。針對 Git 使用者，如果你的專案裡有很多工作樹（worktree，讓你多開幾個平行工作副本的功能），以前跑 Bash 會被抱怨「參數太長」而失敗；被隔離在工作樹裡的代理，甚至會不小心跑到主資料夾去亂動指令；現在它們都會乖乖待在自己的沙盒裡做事。這就像工人去工地，以前會拿錯舊工具箱，或是跑到隔壁別人的地盤敲敲打打，現在他們每個人都能精準拿到對的工具，並且只在自己負責的區域施工。
body.zh-CN: 对于常在复杂项目里工作的人，指令与环境不会再搞失踪了。以前在 Windows 上，背景任务可能会拿到旧的路径清单（PATH），导致找不到该用的工具；或者会不小心弄丢你设置好的网址环境变量，害你连错服务器。针对 Git 使用者，如果你的项目里有很多工作树（worktree，让你多开几个平行工作副本的功能），以前跑 Bash 会被抱怨「参数太长」而失败；被隔离在工作树里的代理，甚至会不小心跑到主文件夹去乱动指令；现在它们都会乖乖待在自己的沙盒里做事。这就像工人去工地，以前会拿错旧工具箱，或是跑到隔壁别人的地盘敲敲打打，现在他们每个人都能精准拿到对的工具，并且只在自己负责的区域施工。
body.en: If you work in complex projects, your commands and environment variables won't magically vanish anymore. Previously on Windows, background tasks might inherit an old `PATH` list, making them blind to required tools; they also had a habit of dropping custom URL environment variables, causing them to query the wrong servers and fail. For Git users, repositories with many worktrees (a feature granting parallel working copies) used to crash Bash with an "argument list too long" error, and agents isolated inside a worktree would occasionally wander into the parent directory to run commands; now they stay obediently in their own sandbox. It's like sending construction workers to a site: they used to grab an outdated toolbox or start hammering on the neighbor's property, but now they bring the exact right tools and strictly build only in their assigned plot.
body.ja: 複雑なプロジェクトで作業する際、コマンドや環境変数が迷子になることがなくなった。以前は Windows において、背景タスクが古いパス（PATH）リストを引き継いでしまい、必要なツールを見失うことがあった。また、設定した URL の環境変数をうっかり落としてしまい、間違ったサーバーに繋いで失敗することもあった。Git ユーザーにとっては、プロジェクト内に多数のワークツリー（worktree、並行作業用のコピーを複数開く機能）があると、Bash が「引数が長すぎる」と文句を言って失敗したり、ワークツリーに隔離されたはずのエージェントが親フォルダにしゃしゃり出てコマンドを叩いたりしていたが、今は自分自身の砂場に大人しく留まるようになった。工事現場に向かう作業員が、以前は古い工具箱を持っていったり、隣の敷地で勝手に工事を始めたりしていたのが、今は各自が正しい工具を手にし、自分の担当区画だけで正確に作業するようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 복잡한 프로젝트에서 일할 때 명령어와 환경 변수가 증발하는 일이 없어졌다. 예전 Windows 환경에선 백그라운드 작업이 낡은 경로 목록(PATH)을 물려받아 필요한 도구를 찾지 못하거나, 당신이 설정해 둔 URL 환경 변수를 슬쩍 흘려버려 엉뚱한 서버에 연결하다 실패하곤 했다. Git 사용자의 경우, 프로젝트 안에 워크트리(worktree, 병렬 작업용 사본을 여러 개 두는 기능)가 많으면 Bash가 '인자가 너무 길다'며 뻗어버리곤 했고, 워크트리에 격리된 에이전트가 버젓이 부모 폴더로 기어 나와 명령어를 마구 치기도 했다. 이제는 자기 모래놀이터 안에 얌전히 머물며 일한다. 공사장에 투입된 인부가 예전엔 낡은 공구함을 챙겨오거나 남의 땅에 들어가 망치질을 했다면, 이제는 각자 알맞은 도구를 챙겨 자기 구역에서만 정확히 시공하는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Fixed background agents inheriting a stale `PATH` from the daemon instead of the dispatching shell, causing missing tools on Windows
Fixed background and agent-view sessions dropping a shell-exported `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`, which sent API keys to the default endpoint and failed with 401
Fixed Bash failing with "argument list too long" in repos with many git worktrees
Fixed worktree-isolated subagents sometimes running shell commands in the parent checkout instead of their own worktree
Fixed worktree creation rejecting nested repositories in multi-repo workspaces, leaving background sessions unable to isolate and edit
Fixed background task output on Windows being permanently replaced by an empty file after `/clear`
Fixed background sessions started from a non-git directory unable to edit files when a `WorktreeCreate` hook was configured

title.zh-TW: 子代理與外掛更聰明，細節體驗再升級
title.zh-CN: 子代理与插件更聪明，细节体验再升级
title.en: Smarter subagents and plugins, finer details upgraded
title.ja: サブエージェントとプラグインが賢くなり、細部の体験が向上
title.ko: 하위 에이전트와 플러그인이 더 똑똑해지고, 세세한 경험이 향상됨

body.zh-TW: 代理團隊的合作與工具整合變得更順暢了。現在代理們不會動不動就把整包任務直接推給另一個子代理（subagent），而是會更負責地自己動手。如果你用指令去尋找別人派出去的子代理，以前會找不到，現在系統會清楚列出所有執行中代理的 ID 給你看。在代理清單裡打字時，如果不小心打出不支援的斜線指令，字也不會莫名其妙被清空了。對於使用外掛（plugin）或 MCP（讓 AI 呼叫外部工具的標準協定）的人，現在會把額外的工作路徑也加進清單，且外掛如果正常給出除錯建議，就不會被系統誤判為「沒在用」而標記。這就像一支原本溝通不良的團隊，以前會互相推託工作或是找不到聯絡人，現在大家不但各司其職，還能準確找到對口。
body.zh-CN: 代理团队的合作与工具整合变得更顺畅了。现在代理们不会动不动就把整包任务直接推给另一个子代理（subagent），而是会更负责地自己动手。如果你用指令去寻找别人派出去的子代理，以前会找不到，现在系统会清楚列出所有执行中代理的 ID 给你看。在代理清单里打字时，如果不小心打出不支持的斜线指令，字也不会莫名其妙被清空了。对于使用插件（plugin）或 MCP（让 AI 调用外部工具的标准协议）的人，现在会把额外的工作路径也加进清单，且插件如果正常给出除错建议，就不会被系统误判为「没在用」而标记。这就像一支原本沟通不良的团队，以前会互相推诿工作或是找不到联络人，现在大家不但各司其职，还能准确找到对口。
body.en: Collaboration among agent teams and tool integration flows much better now. Agents are now far less likely to lazily dump their entire task onto a subagent, taking more direct responsibility instead. If you used commands to search for a subagent spawned by someone else, you used to hit a brick wall; the system now lists the IDs of all running agents for you. When typing in the agent list, accidently entering an unsupported slash command will no longer frustratingly erase your entire typed message. For power users of plugins or MCP (a protocol letting AI call external tools), additional working directories are now correctly broadcasted, and plugins that provide diagnostics won't be falsely marked for disuse. It's like a dysfunctional office that used to pass the buck and lose contact with each other; now everyone does their own share of the work and knows exactly who to call.
body.ja: エージェントチームの連携とツール統合がさらにスムーズになった。今後は、エージェントがタスクを丸投げして別のサブエージェント（subagent）に押し付けることが減り、より責任を持って自ら処理するようになる。他の誰かが送り出したサブエージェントをコマンドで探そうとしても以前は見つからなかったが、今は実行中の全エージェントの ID を明確にリストアップしてくれる。エージェント一覧で入力中に非対応のスラッシュコマンドを打ってしまっても、入力した文字が理不尽に消去されることはなくなった。プラグイン（plugin）や MCP（AI が外部ツールを呼ぶための標準プロトコル）を使用している場合、追加の作業ディレクトリも一覧に加わるようになり、プラグインが正常にデバッグ提案を出していれば「使用されていない」と誤認されることもなくなった。コミュニケーション不全だったチームが、以前は仕事を押し付け合ったり連絡先を見失ったりしていたのが、今は各自が自分の責務を果たし、適切な担当者をすぐに見つけられるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 에이전트 팀의 협력과 도구 연동이 훨씬 매끄러워졌다. 이제 에이전트들은 툭하면 작업 전체를 다른 하위 에이전트(subagent)에게 떠넘기지 않고 자기가 직접 책임지고 일을 처리하려 한다. 다른 에이전트가 파견한 하위 에이전트를 명령어로 찾으려 할 때 예전엔 찾을 수 없었지만, 이제 시스템이 실행 중인 모든 에이전트의 ID를 명확히 나열해 준다. 에이전트 목록에서 글을 칠 때 지원하지 않는 슬래시 명령어를 실수로 쳤다고 해서 적어둔 글이 허무하게 날아가는 일도 없어졌다. 플러그인(plugin)이나 MCP(AI가 외부 도구를 쓰는 표준 규약) 사용자들을 위해, 이제 추가 작업 경로도 목록에 제대로 띄워주며 플러그인이 정상적으로 디버깅 제안을 내놓으면 시스템이 '안 쓰는 중'이라고 오해하지 않는다. 소통이 안 되던 팀이 예전엔 서로 일을 미루거나 담당자를 못 찾고 헤맸다면, 이제는 다들 제 몫을 다하고 정확히 누구에게 연락할지 아는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added the session's additional working directories to MCP `roots/list`, with `notifications/roots/list_changed` sent when the set changes
Fixed `TaskStop` and `TaskOutput` failing to find background agents spawned by another agent — errors now list running agents by id and description
Fixed the `claude agents` composer discarding your typed message when a slash command isn't available there
Fixed background sessions ignoring `effortLevel` changes in settings.json when forked through the daemon
Fixed attached background sessions ignoring `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE` and `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE_CLICKS` opt-outs
Fixed the `@` directory picker in `claude agents` not showing registered git worktrees
Fixed LSP-only plugins being incorrectly flagged for disuse when their language servers deliver diagnostics or answer navigation requests
Improved subagent behavior: agents are now less likely to re-delegate their entire task to another subagent
[VSCode] Added a Settings toggle for "Enable Remote Control for all sessions"

entries: Added a "Dynamic workflow size" setting in `/config` for controlling how large Claude generally makes dynamic workflows (small/medium/large agent counts) — an advisory guideline, not an enforced cap
Added `workflow.run_id` and `workflow.name` OpenTelemetry attributes to telemetry emitted by workflow-spawned agents, so a workflow run's activity can be reconstructed from OTel data
Fixed a crash in the inline Ctrl+R history search when accepting or cancelling while the search was still scanning the history file
Fixed `/rename` on background sessions being reverted when the job restarts, which broke addressing the session by its new name
Fixed transient mTLS handshake failures when settings were re-applied during an in-place client certificate rotation
Fixed commands sent from Remote Control (mobile/web) into an interactive session failing with "Unknown command"
Fixed images and files sent from the Remote Control mobile or web app without a caption being silently dropped
Fixed the sign-in URL printed by `claude auth login` and `claude mcp login --no-browser` not being reliably clickable when it wraps over SSH — it is now emitted as a single hyperlink
Fixed opening a chat from `claude agents` sometimes failing with "currently running as a background agent" followed by a worker crash/respawn loop
Fixed workflow scripts with unicode quote escapes in strings being corrupted before parsing; workflow parse errors now show the offending line instead of always blaming TypeScript
Fixed voice dictation retrying in an unbounded loop when the microphone or audio recorder fails — repeated capture failures now pause voice input
Fixed `/remote-control` sessions showing the wrong permission mode in the mobile and web apps
Fixed resuming a session by name, or opening the resume picker, taking minutes and using a large amount of memory in repositories with many git worktrees
Fixed installer and updater downloads failing immediately with "aborted" when a proxy or network drops the connection mid-download — transient connection drops now retry
Fixed re-invoking an already-loaded skill appending a duplicate copy of its instructions to context
Improved `/workflows` agent list layout: wider titles, a dedicated time column, shorter model names, and no per-row tool-call counts
Improved MCP error messages: clearer error when a server config has `url` but no `type`, suggesting `"type": "http"` instead of the misleading "command: expected string"
Changed `/review <pr>` back to a fast single-pass review; use `/code-review <level> <pr#>` for the multi-agent review at a chosen effort level

title.zh-TW: 派小助手做事時，現在可以設定小助手數量的建議值、省下大筆額度
title.zh-CN: 派小助手做事时，现在可以设定小助手数量的建议值、省下大笔额度
title.en: Set advisory guidelines for helper agent counts, saving your quota
title.ja: 子エージェントを呼ぶ数の目安を指定可能に、無駄なクォータ消費を防止
title.ko: 서브에이전트가 자동 분업할 때 투입할 인원수의 권장 가이드라인을 설정해 요금 폭탄을 방지

body.zh-TW: 為了省去你手動重打一長串舊指令的力氣，系統現在修復了 Ctrl+R 歷史搜尋（Ctrl+R history search，在終端機裡按 Ctrl+R 鍵來快速搜尋你以前打過哪些指令的功能）功能。以前用這功能找舊指令時，系統偶爾會因為字串比對錯誤直接崩潰閃退，逼你整台重新啟動；現在修好了，隨你怎麼搜都能穩定運作。這就像圖書館的舊書檢索電腦以前打字打太快會當機，現在修好系統後，隨便你怎麼翻查卡片檢索都不會當機。
body.zh-CN: 为了省去你手动重打一长串旧命令的力气，系统现在修复了 Ctrl+R 历史搜索（Ctrl+R history search，在终端里按 Ctrl+R 键来快速搜索你以前打过哪些命令的功能）功能。以前用这功能找旧命令时，系统偶尔会因为字符串比对错误直接崩溃闪退，逼你整台重新启动；现在修好了，随你怎么搜都能稳定运行。这就像图书馆的旧书检索电脑以前打字打太快会死机，现在修好系统后，随便你怎么翻查卡片检索都不会死机。
body.en: To save you the effort of manually retyping long command strings from scratch, the system has patched the Ctrl+R history search (Ctrl+R history search, a feature that lets you press Ctrl+R to quickly search through commands you typed earlier) tool. Previously, searching for old commands this way could trigger a string-matching bug that crashed the terminal, forcing you to restart the session; now it is resolved so searches run stably. It's like a library catalog search terminal that used to freeze if you typed too fast; now the database search is patched and never locks up.
body.ja: Ctrl+R 履歴検索（Ctrl+R history search、以前に打ち込んだコマンドを素早く検索する機能）のバグが修正された。以前は検索時に文字の一致判定エラーで突然クラッシュし、再起動が必要になることがあったが、今はどのように履歴を検索しても安定して動く。これは図書館の蔵書検索パソコンで、文字を打つのが早すぎるとフリーズしていたのが、検索エンジンが改善されてどれだけ探しても固まらなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 예전에 입력한 긴 명령어를 처음부터 다시 입력하는 수고를 덜어드리고자, Ctrl+R 기록 검색（Ctrl+R history search, 이전에 입력했던 명령어를 단축키로 빠르게 찾아내는 기능）의 오류를 수정했다. 예전에는 이 기능으로 검색할 때 글자 매칭 오류가 발생해 앱이 꺼지곤 했으나, 이제는 언제든 안정적으로 작동한다. 마치 도서관의 도서 검색 컴퓨터가 타이핑을 빨리 하면 멈추던 버그를 고쳐서, 이제 아무리 검색해도 먹통이 되지 않는 것과 같다.

items.original: Fixed crashes during inline history searches (Ctrl+R).

title.zh-TW: AI 碰到問題會乖乖等你回答，不會自作主張繼續做下去
title.zh-CN: AI 碰到问题会乖乖等你回答，不会自作自受继续做下去
title.en: AI now patiently waits for your answers instead of auto-continuing on its own
title.ja: AI が判断に迷ったとき勝手に進まず、あなたが答えるまでじっと待つように
title.ko: AI 가 애매한 상황일 때 멋대로 진행하지 않고 답해줄 때까지 기다림

body.zh-TW: 為了避免 AI 在你離開座位時自作主張做錯事，對話框現在預設會等待人工。以前 AI 遇到需要你同意的 AskUserQuestion（AI 遇到疑惑停下來彈出對話框問你該怎麼辦的機制）時，如果你放著一段時間沒理它，它會自動繼續往下執行，可能不小心做錯；現在它會老老實實等到你回來點頭，如果你需要人不在時也能自動執行，可以在 /config 裡自己開啟閒置逾時（idle timeout，放著不理時會自動按預設流程繼續執行的計時器）。這就像以前的工程助理問你「這段程式要刪嗎？」，你沒回答他就自己動手刪了；現在他會站著等到你給指示，除非你交代「十分鐘沒回就照舊」。
body.zh-CN: 为了避免 AI 在你离开座位时自作主张做错事，对话框现在默认会等待人工。以前 AI 遇到需要你同意的 AskUserQuestion（AI 遇到疑惑停下来弹出对话框问你该怎么办的机制）时，如果你放着一段时间没理它，它会自动继续往下执行，可能不小心做错；现在它会老老实实等到你回来点头，如果你需要人不在时也能自动运行，可以在 /config 里自己开启闲置超时（idle timeout，放着不理时会自动按默认流程继续运行的计时器）。这就像以前的工程助理问你“这段代码要删吗？”，你没回答他就自己动手删了；现在他会站着等到你给指示，除非你交代“十分钟没回就照旧”。
body.en: To prevent the AI from taking risky actions behind your back when you step away from your desk, dialogs now wait for a human by default. Previously, when the AI asked a question via AskUserQuestion ( the dialog prompt where the AI pauses to ask for your feedback before acting), if you left the terminal unattended, it would auto-continue by itself and potentially break things. Now it waits indefinitely until a human responds, unless you manually configure an idle timeout (idle timeout, a timer that lets the AI take action after you've been away for a set time) in `/config`. It's like a junior builder who used to knock down a wall if you didn't answer his question; now he stands with his hammer waiting for your nod, unless you tell him 'if I'm away for ten minutes, proceed.'
body.ja: ダイアログはデフォルトで人間の応答を待つようになった。以前は、AI が判断を求める AskUserQuestion（AI が疑問を感じたときに進行を止めてあなたに尋ねる画面）を放置すると、勝手に「続行」と判断して進めてしまう危険があったが、今はあなたが答えるまで待機する。放置時に自動処理させたい場合は、設定でアイドルタイムアウト（idle timeout、返事がないまま一定時間経つと自動処理するタイマー）を有効化できる。これは、アシスタントが「このファイルを消していいですか？」と聞いてきた際、返事をしなかったら勝手に消されていたのが、指示があるまで手を止めて待つようになったようなものである（「10分待って返事がなければ消す」という指示もできる）。
body.ko: 대화창은 기본적으로 인간의 응답을 기다리게 되었다. 예전에는 AI 가 판단을 구하는 AskUserQuestion（ 진행 중 판단이 서지 않을 때 멈춰 서서 사용자에게 의견을 묻는 창） 상황에서 답변을 안 하면 자동으로 계속 진행해 실수를 범하곤 했으나, 이제는 사용자가 올 때까지 대기한다. 자리를 비웠을 때도 진행되길 원한다면 설정에서 유휴 시간 초과（idle timeout, 일정 시간 조작이 없을 때 자동으로 처리를 넘기는 타이머）를 켜면 된다. 이는 마치 비서에게 “이 서류를 파기할까요?”라는 질문을 받고 답을 안 했더니 멋대로 파기해 버리던 비서가, 이제는 답을 줄 때까지 서류를 들고 서 있는 것과 같다.

items.original: Dialogs no longer auto-continue by default and will wait for a human; users can opt into an idle timeout via /config.

title.zh-TW: 派小助手做事時，現在可以控制小助手的數量上限、省下大筆額度
title.zh-CN: 派小助手做事时，现在可以控制小助手的数量上限、省下大笔额度
title.en: Control how many helper agents are spawned for complex tasks, saving your quota
title.ja: 子エージェントを呼ぶ上限数を指定可能に、無駄なクォータ消費を防止
title.ko: 서브에이전트가 자동 분업할 때 투입할 최대 인원수를 조절해 요금 폭탄을 방지

body.zh-TW: 為了控制你的 API 帳單花費，系統在 `/config` 裡新增了設定項目，讓你控制 workflowSizeGuideline（用來限制 AI 遇到大型工作時自動分派出去的小助手數量的指導方針）。你可以自由選擇小、中、大三種規模，這只是小／中／大代理數的建議值，不保證限制或成本上限，但能引導 AI 不要輕易分工給幾十個子代理人同時運作，導致你的用量額度在一瞬間被燒光。這就像你把裝潢外包給工頭，以前工頭會默默叫來三十個工人一天做完然後找你收大筆工錢；現在你可以給他建議值，不保證限制，但能引導預算在控制範圍內。
body.zh-CN: 为了控制你的 API 账单花费，系统在 `/config` 里新增了设置项目，让你控制 workflowSizeGuideline（用来限制 AI 遇到大型工作时自动分派出去的小助手数量的指导方针）。你可以自由选择小、中、大三种规模，这是小／中／大代理数的建议值，不保证限制或成本上限，但能引导 AI 不要轻易分工给几十个子智能体同时运行，导致你的用量额度在一瞬间被烧光。这就像你把装潢外包给工头，以前工头会默默叫来三十个工人一天做完然后找你收大笔工钱；现在你可以给他建议值，不保证限制，但能引导预算在控制范围内。
body.en: A new configuration allows you to guide the workflowSizeGuideline ( a guideline setting that controls how many sub-helper agents the AI is allowed to summon when breaking down a massive task) in `/config`. By selecting small, medium, or large sizes, this serves as an advisory guideline for small/medium/large agent counts, not a strict limit or cost cap, but helps guide the AI against spawning dozens of subagents to tackle a complex task, which used to burn through your quota in seconds. It's like hiring a contractor who used to show up with thirty assistants and bill you for all of them; now you can give them an advisory guideline, which is not a strict limit, to keep your budget under control.
body.ja: 設定で新たに workflowSizeGuideline（複雑な大仕事に対して AI が自動的に作成するアシスタントの数を制限する目安設定）を「小・中・大」から選べるようになった。これは小・中・大のエージェント数の目安を示すもので、絶対的な制限やコスト上限を保証するものではないが、何十人もの子エージェントを一斉に呼び出すのを防ぐための指針となる。これは、リフォームを依頼した親方が勝手に 30 人の作業員を連れてきて高額請求してきたのを、目安を伝えて案内するようなもので、絶対的な制限ではないが予算の抑制に役立つ。
body.ko: 설정에서 workflowSizeGuideline（ 거대한 과제에 직면한 AI 가 업무 분담을 위해 임의로 동원하는 서브에이전트 수의 가이드라인）을 소·중·대 규모로 지정할 수 있는 기능을 추가했다. 이는 소·중·대 에이전트 수의 권장 가이드라인으로, 엄격한 제한이나 비용 상한을 보장하지는 않지만 수십 명의 자식 에이전트를 소환하는 것을 방지하는 지침이 된다. 마치 공사를 맡은 인부 반장이 제멋대로 30 명의 일꾼을 데려와 일당 청구서를 내밀던 상황에서, 권장 가이드라인을 제시하여 엄격한 제한은 아니지만 비용 부담을 낮추도록 유도한 것과 같다.

items.original: Added a setting in /config to control the scale of dynamic workflows (small/medium/large agent counts) as an advisory guideline.

title.zh-TW: 子助手如果被呼叫次數限制擋住，現在會老實報錯，不會裝沒事回傳空資料
title.zh-CN: 子助手如果被呼叫次数限制挡住，现在会老实报错，不会装没事回传空数据
title.en: Helper agents blocked by rate limits now report errors instead of silently returning empty data
title.ja: 子エージェントが呼び出し制限で止まったとき、空のデータを返さず正直にエラーを伝えるように
title.ko: 서브에이전트가 호출 제한에 막히면 빈 결과를 내는 대신 에러를 내어 문제 상황을 명시함

body.zh-TW: 為了讓主要 AI 不被錯誤的空資料誤導，系統現在修復了子代理人被擋時的回報機制。以前 subagents（主要 AI 為了分工而派出去幫忙跑分支任務的子代理人）遇到 API 頻率限制（rate limit，雲端伺服器限制你一分鐘內只能發送幾次請求的規則）時，會默默裝作沒事、回傳一個空結果，導致主要 AI 誤以為資料真的不存在而胡亂分析；現在它被限制時會清清楚楚報錯，讓主要 AI 明確收到失敗的結果。這就像你派人去郵局領信，以前他因為郵局關門沒領到信，回來卻對你說「今天沒有信」；現在他會老實坦白「郵局關門了我進不去」，你才不會被誤導。
body.zh-CN: 为了让主要 AI 不被错误的空数据误导，系统现在修复了子智能体被挡时的回报机制。以前 subagents（主要 AI 为了分工而派出去帮忙跑分支任务的子智能体）遇到 API 频率限制（rate limit，云端服务器限制你一分钟内只能发送几次请求的规则）时，会默默装作没事、回传一个空结果，导致主要 AI 误以为数据真的不存在而胡乱分析；现在它被限制时会清清楚楚报错，让主要 AI 明确收到失败的结果。这就像你派人去邮局领信，以前他因为邮局关门没领到信，回来却对你说“今天没有信”；现在他会老实坦白“邮局关门了我进不去”，你才不会被误导。
body.en: Subagents ( smaller assistant AIs spawned by the main agent to work on subtasks) now fail cleanly when rate-limited. Previously, if they hit a rate limit (rate limit, the speed limit rules that prevent calling an API too many times in a minute) they would return empty results instead of an error, causing the main AI to assume the target file or data was empty; now they throw a clear error so the main agent clearly receives the failure. It's like sending an errand boy to get letters, and because the post office was closed, he returns and tells you 'you have no mail'; now he tells you 'the post office was closed so I couldn't get in,' saving you from being misinformed.
body.ja: 子エージェントがブロックされた際の報告ルールが改善された。以前は subagents（メイン AI が特定のサブタスクを任せるために起動する子エージェント）が API 制限（rate limit、1 分間にリクエストを送れる回数の上限）にかかると、エラーを出さず空のデータを返していたため、メイン AI はデータが存在しないと勘違いしていた。今はエラーを正直に報告するため、メイン AI に失敗が明確に伝わる。これは、用事を頼んだお使いの者が、役所が閉まっていて書類を受け取れなかったのに「書類はないでした」と嘘を報告していたのを、「閉まっていて入れませんでした」と正しく報告するようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 서브에이전트가 차단당했을 때의 에러 보고 방식을 고쳤다. 예전에는 subagents（메인 에이전트가 특정 작업을 처리하기 위해 소환하는 서브 AI）들이 API 호출 한도（rate limit, 1 분 동안 보낼 수 있는 요청 횟수를 제한하는 규칙）를 초과했을 때 아무 경고 없이 빈 결과를 반환해 주 에이전트를 오도했으나, 이제는 에러를 확실히 보고해 주 에이전트에게 실패가 명확히 전달된다. 비서에게 심부름을 보냈는데 상점 문이 닫혀 물건을 못 사 왔으면서 “원래 파는 물건이 없대요”라고 하던 비서가, 이제는 “가게가 닫혀 못 샀다”라고 정직하게 말하여 오해를 없앤 것과 같다.

items.original: Fixed subagents cut off by rate limits returning empty results instead of failing cleanly.

title.zh-TW: 修復丟到背景跑的代理人因為重啟而失效、或突然卡在背景罷工的 bug
title.zh-CN: 修复丢到后台跑的智能体因为重启而失效、或突然卡在后台罢工的 bug
title.en: Background agents no longer lose authentication tokens or get stuck during service restarts
title.ja: バックグラウンド作業中に接続キーが消えて AI がサボったり、停止したまま残留するバグを修正
title.ko: 백그라운드에서 돌아가는 에이전트가 재시작 시 인증 토큰을 잃어 멈추는 현상 해결

body.zh-TW: 為了讓你在背後跑的長任務能順利執行完成，系統修復了背景程式重啟時的驗證錯誤。以前把任務交給背景的 daemons（在背景默默幫你做事的常駐程式）時，如果遇到連線重置，系統在重啟背景程式的過程中，會不小心把安全連線驗證的金鑰（socket auth token，用來與主程式進行安全加密連線的憑證金鑰）洗掉，導致背景任務直接失效或變成卡死在記憶體裡的幽靈程式；現在重啟時金鑰會被妥善保留，孤立的幽靈程式也會被乾淨清空。這就像你去遊樂園玩到一半，工作人員重啟排隊通道時把你的快速通關票收走了、讓你只能傻站著；現在重啟後車票依舊有效，你可以順利玩完。
body.zh-CN: 为了让你在背后跑的长任务能顺利运行完成，系统修复了后台程序重启时的验证错误。以前把任务交给后台的 daemons（在后台默默帮你做事的常驻程序）时，如果遇到连接重置，系统在重启后台程序的过程中，会不小心把安全连接验证的密钥（socket auth token，用来与主程序进行安全加密连接的凭证密钥）洗掉，导致后台任务直接失效或变成卡死在内存里的幽灵程序；现在重启时密钥会被妥善保留，孤立的幽灵程序也会被干净清空。这就像你去游乐园玩到一半，工作人员重启排队通道时把你的快速通关票收走了、让你只能傻站着；现在重启后票依旧有效，你可以顺利玩完。
body.en: System now preserves authentication credentials during daemon restarts. Previously, when tasks ran under background daemons (daemons, background server programs that run tasks quietly in the background), any connection reset caused the restart sequence to lose the secure connection key (socket auth token, the security credential used to communicate securely with the main application), leaving the agent frozen or orphaned in memory; now the token is preserved, and orphans are swept away. It's like an amusement park ride that broke down, and during the queue restart the ride operator took away your fast-pass ticket, leaving you stranded; now the ticket remains valid through restarts so you can finish the ride.
body.ja: 常駐システムの再起動時の認証エラーを修正した。以前はバックグラウンドの daemons（裏でずっと動き続けて仕事をこなす常駐システム）でタスクを走らせている際、接続が切れて再起動すると、安全な通信用のキー（socket auth token、メインアプリと安全にやり取りするための暗号化キー）が消失し、処理が停止したりメモリ上に残留する問題があった。今は再起動後もキーが保持され、不要な残留プロセスも片付けられる。これは、遊園地のアトラクションが一時停止した際、並び直すときにファストパスチケットを回収されてしまい、ただ立ち尽くすしかなかったのが、再開後もチケットがそのまま使えて最後まで乗れるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 백그라운드에 올려둔 긴 작업이 중단 없이 끝까지 완수되도록, 상주 프로그램 재시작 시의 인증 유실 버그를 잡았다. 예전에는 백그라운드 daemons（터미널을 닫아도 보이지 않는 곳에서 묵묵히 돌아가는 상주 프로그램）이 네트워크 순단 등으로 다시 켜지는 과정에서 보안 접속용 열쇠（socket auth token, 메인 앱과 안전하게 암호화 통신을 하기 위해 발급받는 인증용 토큰）를 잃어버리는 바람에 작업이 그대로 뻗거나 메모리 미아가 되곤 했으나, 이제는 열쇠가 유지되고 방치된 프로세스도 깨끗이 정리된다. 놀이공원 기구가 점検으로 잠시 멈췄을 때 재입장 통로에서 우선탑승권을 뺏겨 멍하니 서 있어야 했던 상황에서, 이제 탑승권이 그대로 유지되어 정상 탑승할 수 있게 된 것과 같다.

items.original: Fixed socket auth tokens being stripped during daemon restarts and resolving orphan background agents.

entries: Claude Sonnet 5 sessions no longer use the mid-conversation system role for harness reminders

title.zh-TW: Sonnet 5 對話不再被系統囉嗦打斷
title.zh-CN: Sonnet 5 对话不再被系统啰嗦打断
title.en: Sonnet 5 conversations are no longer interrupted by mid-chat system reminders
title.ja: Sonnet 5 の対話中にシステムからのしつこいリマインダーが割り込まなくなった
title.ko: Sonnet 5 대화 중 시스템의 잔소리가 끼어들지 않는다

body.zh-TW: 當你使用最新的 Claude Sonnet 5 模型時，這個中途提醒機制已經移除（harness reminders，用來確保 AI 遵守指令的提示詞）。
body.zh-CN: 当你使用最新的 Claude Sonnet 5 模型时，这个中途提醒机制已经移除（harness reminders，用来确保 AI 遵守指令的提示词）。
body.en: When using the latest Claude Sonnet 5 model, the mid-conversation harness reminders (prompts used to keep the AI on track) have been removed.
body.ja: 最新の Claude Sonnet 5 モデルを使用する際、この途中リマインダー機能（harness reminders、AI にルールを守らせるためのプロンプト）は削除された。
body.ko: 최신 Claude Sonnet 5 모델을 쓸 때, 이 중간 알림 기능(harness reminders, AI가 지시를 잘 따르도록 꽉 잡아주는 프롬프트)이 제거되었다.

items.original: Claude Sonnet 5 sessions no longer use the mid-conversation system role for harness reminders

entries: Changed `AskUserQuestion` dialogs to no longer auto-continue by default; opt into an idle timeout via `/config`
Changed the "default" permission mode to "Manual" across the CLI, `--help`, VS Code, and JetBrains; `--permission-mode manual` and `"defaultMode": "manual"` are accepted alongside `default`
Fixed a crash at startup when `disabledMcpServers` or `enabledMcpServers` in `.claude.json` is set to a non-array value
Fixed background sessions silently stopping mid-turn after sleep/wake or when reopening a stalled session
Fixed background sessions re-running a turn cancelled with Esc after a stall respawn
Fixed background agents never starting again after a crash left a stale `daemon.lock` whose PID the OS reused
Fixed background-agent daemon handover so a reinstalled older build can no longer take over the daemon; build recency is now judged by the version's embedded build timestamp

Fixed background-agent roster issues: transient corruption permanently disabling orphan cleanup, older binaries not preserving fields written by newer versions, and socket auth tokens being stripped during daemon restarts
Fixed subagents cut off by a rate limit before producing any text output returning an empty result instead of failing cleanly
Fixed control bytes from background-agent output reaching the terminal in the agent view
Fixed `claude agents --plugin-dir <dir>` not showing the plugin's agents and skills in the agent view when the flag is placed after `agents`
Fixed project-scoped plugins not loading correctly from git worktrees of the same repository
Fixed `/mcp` server list not tracking focus for screen readers and magnifiers
Fixed voice dictation showing a misleading "Voice connection failed" message when a recording captures no audio
Fixed rendering flicker under tmux 3.4+ by enabling synchronized terminal output
Improved screen-reader output: decorative glyphs are now hidden, transcript symbols read as short labels, and nested tables read as `Header: value.` lines
Improved the install script to explain when installation is killed by the system running out of memory

title.zh-TW: 預設改為手動模式，不會再趁你不注意偷偷繼續
title.zh-CN: 默认改为手动模式，不会再趁你不注意偷偷继续
title.en: Default permission is now Manual, and questions won't quietly auto-skip
title.ja: デフォルトが手動モードに、確認画面が勝手にスキップされなくなった
title.ko: 기본 권한이 수동 모드로 바뀌고, 질문 창이 몰래 넘어가지 않는다.

body.zh-TW: 現在 Claude 做事前預設會先問你，放著不回覆也不會自己繼續。不管是指令行、VS Code 還是 JetBrains，權限模式都改成了「手動（Manual）」。當它彈出對話框問你問題（AskUserQuestion）時，以前如果放著不管，它可能會自己當作你同意而繼續跑；現在預設會一直等你回答，除非你自己去設定檔裡開啟「閒置超時自動繼續」的功能。就像教練本來會自己決定要不要換球員，現在預設改成換人前必須請示總教練，而且沒拿到簽名絕對不會自己放行。
body.zh-CN: 现在 Claude 做事前默认会先问你，放着不回复也不会自己继续。不管是命令行、VS Code 还是 JetBrains，权限模式都改成了「手动（Manual）」。当它弹出对话框问你问题（AskUserQuestion）时，以前如果放着不管，它可能会自己当作你同意而继续跑；现在默认会一直等你回答，除非你自己去配置文件里开启「闲置超时自动继续」的功能。就像教练本来会自己决定要不要换球员，现在默认改成换人前必须请示总教练，而且没拿到签名绝对不会自己放行。
body.en: Claude now asks you before taking action by default, and won't auto-continue if you don't reply. Across the CLI, VS Code, and JetBrains, the permission mode is now explicitly "Manual". When it pops up a dialog asking you a question (AskUserQuestion), it will no longer silently assume you agreed if you step away; by default, it will wait patiently for your answer, unless you specifically opt into the "idle timeout auto-continue" feature in your settings. It's like a sports coach who used to swap players autonomously but is now required by default to get the head coach's signature before making any substitutions, strictly waiting until that signature is secured.
body.ja: 現在 Claude は実行前にデフォルトで確認し、返答せずに放置しても勝手に進行しなくなった。コマンドライン、VS Code、JetBrains のすべてにおいて、権限モードが「手動（Manual）」に変更された。ダイアログで質問（AskUserQuestion）が出た際、以前は放置していると勝手に同意したと見なして進行することがあったが、今後は回答するまでずっと待機する。放置で自動進行させたい場合は、設定で「アイドルタイムアウトによる自動継続」を明示的に有効化する必要がある。スポーツのコーチが以前は勝手に選手交代を決めていたのが、今後は必ず監督のサインを求めるようになり、サインをもらうまで絶対に動かなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 Claude는 일을 시작하기 전에 기본적으로 먼저 묻고, 대답 없이 내버려 두어도 스스로 진행하지 않는다. 명령줄, VS Code, JetBrains 어디서든 권한 모드가 '수동(Manual)'으로 바뀌었다. 질문 창(AskUserQuestion)이 떴을 때 예전엔 가만히 내버려 두면 알아서 동의한 셈 치고 계속 돌아가곤 했지만, 이제는 당신이 직접 설정에서 '유휴 시간 초과 시 자동 계속' 기능을 켜지 않는 한 묵묵히 대답을 기다린다. 운동부 코치가 예전엔 자기 맘대로 선수를 교체하다가 이제는 기본적으로 감독의 결재 서명을 받아야만 움직이고, 서명을 받을 때까지 절대 선수를 내보내지 않는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Changed `AskUserQuestion` dialogs to no longer auto-continue by default; opt into an idle timeout via `/config`
Changed the "default" permission mode to "Manual" across the CLI, `--help`, VS Code, and JetBrains; `--permission-mode manual` and `"defaultMode": "manual"` are accepted alongside `default`

title.zh-TW: 背景任務更清醒：電腦休眠醒來或當機後不再裝死
title.zh-CN: 背景任务更清醒：电脑休眠醒来或死机后不再装死
title.en: Background tasks wake up properly after sleep and survive crashes
title.ja: 背景タスクの目覚めが改善、PCのスリープやクラッシュ後にフリーズしない
title.ko: 백그라운드 작업이 잠에서 더 잘 깨고, 컴퓨터 절전이나 충돌 후에도 멈추지 않는다.

body.zh-TW: 這次把背景代理（agent）從休眠中喚醒的毛病治好了。以前你的電腦如果睡著又醒來，正在跑的任務可能會默默停住不幹活；如果它卡住被系統重新啟動，還會把之前你按 Esc 取消掉的步驟又拿出來跑一次，現在這些亂象都沒了。另外，如果程式崩潰留下了一個寫著進程代號的鎖定檔（daemon.lock），而作業系統剛好又把這個代號分給別的程式，以前代理就會因為誤認而永遠不肯啟動，現在修好這個檢查邏輯了；被限流（rate limit）打斷的子任務現在也會明確報錯，不會假裝自己跑完卻丟出空結果。這就像警衛打瞌睡醒來，以前會忘記自己巡邏到哪，或是看到地上掉著上一班的臂章就以為別人還在上班而拒絕接班，現在他醒來後會確實確認身分並正確接手工作。
body.zh-CN: 这次把背景代理（agent）从休眠中唤醒的毛病治好了。以前你的电脑如果睡着又醒来，正在跑的任务可能会默默停住不干活；如果它卡住被系统重新启动，还会把之前你按 Esc 取消掉的步骤又拿出来跑一次，现在这些乱象都没了。另外，如果程序崩溃留下了一个写着进程代号的锁定档（daemon.lock），而操作系统刚好又把这个代号分给别的程序，以前代理就会因为误认而永远不肯启动，现在修好这个检查逻辑了；被限流（rate limit）打断的子任务现在也会明确报错，不会假装自己跑完却丢出空结果。这就像警卫打瞌睡醒来，以前会忘记自己巡逻到哪，或是看到地上掉着上一班的臂章就以为别人还在上班而拒绝接班，现在他醒来后会确实确认身分并正确接手工作。
body.en: We've cured background agents of their bad waking habits. Previously, if your computer went to sleep and woke back up, a running task might silently stall and refuse to work; and if a stalled task respawned, it might foolishly re-run a step you had explicitly cancelled with Esc. These confusing behaviors are gone. Additionally, if the program crashed and left behind a stale lockfile (`daemon.lock`) whose process ID got recycled by the OS, the agent used to get confused and refuse to ever start again; this detection logic is now fixed. Subagents cut off by a rate limit will also now fail properly instead of pretending they finished successfully and returning an empty void. It's like a security guard waking up from a nap: they used to forget their patrol route or see an old name badge on the floor and refuse to start their shift; now they properly verify their status and resume duty flawlessly.
body.ja: 背景エージェント（agent）がスリープから復帰する際の不具合を治した。以前はパソコンがスリープ状態から復帰すると、実行中のタスクが黙って停止して働かなくなることがあった。また、フリーズして再起動した際、前に Esc キーでキャンセルしたはずの処理をもう一度やり直してしまうバグもなくなった。さらに、プログラムがクラッシュしてプロセス ID を記したロックファイル（daemon.lock）が取り残され、OS が偶然その ID を別のプログラムに再利用した場合、エージェントが勘違いして二度と起動できなくなる問題も修正された。アクセス制限（rate limit）で中断されたサブタスクが、完了したフリをして空の結果を返すこともなくなった。居眠りから目覚めた警備員が、以前はどこまで巡回したか忘れたり、床に落ちている前任者の腕章を見て誰かがまだ働いていると勘違いして業務を拒否したりしていたのが、今はしっかり身元を確認して正しく業務を引き継ぐようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 백그라운드 에이전트(agent)가 절전 모드에서 깨어날 때 겪던 고질병을 고쳤다. 예전엔 컴퓨터가 잠들었다 깨어나면 돌고 있던 작업이 소리 없이 멈춰서 일하지 않곤 했고, 멈춰서 다시 켜질 때 예전에 Esc를 눌러 취소했던 단계까지 다시 실행해 버리는 황당한 일도 있었지만 이제는 모두 해결되었다. 또한 프로그램이 충돌하며 프로세스 번호가 적힌 잠금 파일(daemon.lock)을 남겼을 때, 운영체제가 우연히 그 번호를 다른 프로그램에 줘버리면 에이전트가 오해하고 영영 켜지지 않던 문제도 고쳤다. 횟수 제한(rate limit)에 걸려 끊긴 하위 작업도 이제는 끝난 척 빈 결과를 던지는 대신 명확하게 오류를 뿜어낸다. 꾸벅꾸벅 졸다 깬 경비원이 예전엔 어디까지 순찰했는지 까먹거나, 바닥에 떨어진 이전 근무자의 명찰을 보고 아직 누군가 일하고 있는 줄 알고 교대하기를 거부했다면, 이제는 깨어나서 정확히 상황을 파악하고 무사히 업무를 이어받는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Fixed background sessions silently stopping mid-turn after sleep/wake or when reopening a stalled session
Fixed background sessions re-running a turn cancelled with Esc after a stall respawn
Fixed background agents never starting again after a crash left a stale `daemon.lock` whose PID the OS reused
Fixed background-agent daemon handover so a reinstalled older build can no longer take over the daemon; build recency is now judged by the version's embedded build timestamp
Fixed background-agent roster issues: transient corruption permanently disabling orphan cleanup, older binaries not preserving fields written by newer versions, and socket auth tokens being stripped during daemon restarts
Fixed subagents cut off by a rate limit before producing any text output returning an empty result instead of failing cleanly

title.zh-TW: 無障礙體驗升級，終端機畫面不再狂閃
title.zh-CN: 无障碍体验升级，终端机画面不再狂闪
title.en: Accessibility upgrades and a flicker-free terminal experience
title.ja: アクセシビリティ向上、端末画面の激しい点滅も解消
title.ko: 접근성 향상, 터미널 화면이 깜빡이지 않는다.

body.zh-TW: 對於依賴螢幕報讀軟體（screen-reader）和放大鏡的使用者，現在的體驗變得更友善了。系統會自動隱藏那些只是用來裝飾的符號，對話紀錄裡的特殊記號會被念成簡短的標籤，而表格也會貼心地用「標題：內容」的格式一句句念出來，MCP（讓 AI 呼叫外部工具的協定）的清單也能正確被游標追蹤到了。對於使用 tmux（終端機的畫面分割工具）的人，現在開啟了同步輸出功能，畫面不會再像閃光燈一樣閃爍；代理清單裡也不會再跑出亂七八糟的控制碼。這就像以前導覽員會把裝飾花紋也念出來，讓聽眾一頭霧水，現在他只會把重點整理成好懂的句子，而且投影幕也不會再瘋狂閃爍傷眼睛。
body.zh-CN: 对于依赖屏幕报读软件（screen-reader）和放大镜的使用者，现在的体验变得更友善了。系统会自动隐藏那些只是用来装饰的符号，对话记录里的特殊记号会被念成简短的标签，而表格也会贴心地用「标题：内容」的格式一句句念出来，MCP（让 AI 调用外部工具的协议）的清单也能正确被游标追踪到了。对于使用 tmux（终端机的画面分割工具）的人，现在开启了同步输出功能，画面不会再像闪光灯一样闪烁；代理清单里也不会再跑出乱七八糟的控制码。这就像以前导览员会把装饰花纹也念出来，让听众一头雾水，现在他只会把重点整理成好懂的句子，而且投影幕也不会再疯狂闪烁伤眼睛。
body.en: The experience for users relying on screen readers and magnifiers is now vastly improved. The system automatically hides purely decorative symbols, reads complex transcript symbols as short, descriptive labels, and parses nested tables line-by-line as `Header: value`, making it much easier to digest. The MCP (a protocol letting AI use external tools) server list also now correctly tracks focus for accessibility tools. For those using tmux (a terminal multiplexer), we enabled synchronized output so the screen no longer flickers like a strobe light; and raw control codes will no longer bleed into the agent view. It's like an audio tour guide who used to confusingly describe every decorative carving on the wall; now they gracefully summarize the important exhibits, and the museum's flickering lights have finally been replaced.
body.ja: スクリーンリーダー（音声読み上げソフト）や拡大鏡に依存するユーザーにとって、より親切な体験になった。単なる装飾用の記号は自動的に隠され、対話記録の特殊な記号は短いラベルとして読み上げられ、表組みは「見出し：内容」という形で一行ずつ丁寧に読まれるようになった。MCP（AI が外部ツールを呼ぶためのプロトコル）の一覧でも、カーソルのフォーカスが正しく追従するようになった。また、tmux（端末の画面分割ツール）のユーザー向けに同期出力を有効化し、画面がフラッシュのように激しく点滅することがなくなった。エージェント一覧に文字化けのような制御コードが漏れ出すこともない。音声ガイドが、以前は壁の装飾模様まで読み上げて聞き手を混乱させていたのが、今は要点だけを分かりやすく説明してくれるようになり、さらに展示室のチカチカする照明もようやく修理されたようなものである。
body.ko: 화면 읽기 프로그램(screen-reader)과 돋보기에 의지하는 사용자들을 위해 훨씬 친절해졌다. 이제 화면을 꾸미기 위한 특수 기호는 알아서 숨겨주고, 대화 기록 속의 기호들은 짧은 꼬리표로 바꿔 읽어주며, 표 역시 '제목: 내용' 형식으로 한 줄 한 줄 정성껏 읽어준다. MCP(AI가 외부 도구를 부르는 규약) 목록에서도 포커스가 잘 따라가도록 고쳤다. tmux(터미널 화면 분할 도구)를 쓰는 사람을 위해서는 화면 출력을 맞춰주어 더 이상 화면이 형광등처럼 깜빡거리지 않게 했고, 에이전트 목록에 알 수 없는 제어 코드들이 튀어나오지도 않는다. 예전엔 음성 안내원이 벽에 새겨진 장식 무늬까지 다 읽어주어 사람들을 혼란스럽게 했다면, 이제는 핵심만 알아듣기 쉬운 문장으로 정리해서 말해주고 전시장 내내 깜빡이던 고장 난 조명도 말끔히 고친 것과 같다.

items.original:
Improved screen-reader output: decorative glyphs are now hidden, transcript symbols read as short labels, and nested tables read as `Header: value.` lines
Fixed `/mcp` server list not tracking focus for screen readers and magnifiers
Fixed rendering flicker under tmux 3.4+ by enabling synchronized terminal output
Fixed control bytes from background-agent output reaching the terminal in the agent view

title.zh-TW: 細微防呆：語音沒聲音不誤報、安裝卡死會說原因
title.zh-CN: 细微防呆：语音没声音不误报、安装卡死会说原因
title.en: Foolproofing: Silent audio doesn't error, and stalled installs explain why
title.ja: 細かいバグ防止：無音の音声入力でエラーを出さず、インストール失敗の理由も明記
title.ko: 세세한 오류 방지: 마이크에 소리가 안 들어가도 오해하지 않고, 설치 실패 이유를 알려준다.

body.zh-TW: 用語音輸入沒聲音或安裝因記憶體不足失敗時，現在你會看到正確的錯誤原因。如果你錄了半天其實沒錄到聲音，以前它會報錯說「語音連線失敗」，現在它知道只是沒錄到聲音而已；安裝被作業系統強制砍掉時，安裝腳本也會清楚告訴你原因。載入外掛（plugin）時，即使將 `--plugin-dir` 參數放在 `agents` 指令後方也能正常載入，也不會因為你用了工作樹（worktree，平行工作的 Git 功能）就找不到專案專屬的外掛。還有，如果你在設定檔裡把 MCP 伺服器名單寫錯格式，開機也不會直接崩潰了。這就像去買東西，以前卡片沒錢刷不過店員只會說「連線失敗」，現在他會直接告訴你「餘額不足」，不會讓你瞎猜。
body.zh-CN: 用语音输入没声音或安装因内存不足失败时，现在你会看到正确的错误原因。如果你录了半天其实没录到声音，以前它会报错说「语音连线失败」，现在它知道只是没录到声音而已；安装被操作系统强制砍掉时，安装脚本也会清楚告诉你原因。载入插件（plugin）时，即使将 `--plugin-dir` 参数放在 `agents` 指令后方也能正常载入，也不会因为你用了工作树（worktree，平行工作的 Git 功能）就找不到项目专属的插件。还有，如果你在配置文件里把 MCP 服务器名单写错格式，开机也不会直接崩溃了。这就像去买东西，以前卡片没钱刷不过店员只会说「连线失败」，现在他会直接告诉你「余额不足」，不会让你瞎猜。
body.en: You will now see accurate error reasons when voice dictation captures silence or an installation fails due to out-of-memory. If your recording ends up capturing pure silence, the system used to misleadingly throw a "Voice connection failed" error; now it understands you just didn't record any sound, and the installer script will explicitly explain what happened if the OS kills it for memory instead of failing mysteriously. For plugins, the `--plugin-dir` flag now properly loads agents even if placed after the `agents` command, and project-scoped plugins won't get lost just because you are using a Git worktree (parallel working copies). Additionally, misformatting the MCP server list in your settings file will no longer crash the entire program at startup. It's like going to the store: the cashier used to just say "connection failed" when your card was empty, but now they directly tell you "insufficient funds" so you aren't left guessing.
body.ja: 音声入力が無音だったり、メモリ不足でインストールが失敗したりした際、正確なエラー原因が表示されるようになった。録音したものの実際には何も音が入っていなかった場合、以前は「音声接続に失敗しました」と見当違いなエラーを出していたが、今は単なる無音だったと正しく認識し、インストールが OS から強制終了された場合もその理由をはっきり説明する。プラグイン（plugin）は `--plugin-dir` フラグを `agents` コマンドの後ろに置いても正常に読み込まれるようになり、ワークツリー（worktree、並行作業用の Git 機能）を使っているからといってプロジェクト専用のプラグインが迷子になることもなくなった。さらに、設定ファイル内の MCP サーバー一覧の書式を間違えても、起動直後にクラッシュしなくなった。買い物に行った際、以前は残高不足でカードが通らないと店員に「通信失敗です」とだけ言われていたのが、今は「残高不足です」と直接教えてくれるようになり、無駄に悩まなくて済むようなものである。
body.ko: 음성 입력 시 소리가 안 들어가거나 메모리 부족으로 설치에 실패했을 때, 이제 정확한 오류 원인을 보여준다. 한참 녹음했는데 막상 아무 소리도 안 들어갔을 경우 예전엔 '음성 연결 실패'라는 엉뚱한 오류를 띄웠지만 이제는 그저 소리가 안 들어간 것뿐임을 안다. 설치 중 운영체제가 강제로 종료했을 때도 스크립트가 그 이유를 똑똑히 알려준다. 플러그인(plugin)은 `--plugin-dir` 파라미터를 `agents` 명령어 뒤에 두어도 정상적으로 불러오며, 워크트리(worktree, 병렬 작업을 위한 Git 기능)를 쓴다고 해서 프로젝트 전용 플러그인을 못 찾는 일도 사라졌다. 설정 파일에서 MCP 서버 목록의 형식을 잘못 썼을 때 켜자마자 바로 뻗어버리던 버그도 잡았다. 가게에 물건을 사러 갔을 때, 예전엔 카드에 돈이 없으면 점원이 무작정 '연결 실패'라고만 하던 것에서, 이제는 '잔액 부족'이라고 딱 잘라 말해줘 헛다리 짚을 일을 없앤 것과 같다.

items.original:
Improved the install script to explain when installation is killed by the system running out of memory
Fixed voice dictation showing a misleading "Voice connection failed" message when a recording captures no audio
Fixed a crash at startup when `disabledMcpServers` or `enabledMcpServers` in `.claude.json` is set to a non-array value
Fixed `claude agents --plugin-dir <dir>` not showing the plugin's agents and skills in the agent view when the flag is placed after `agents`
Fixed project-scoped plugins not loading correctly from git worktrees of the same repository

entries: Stacked slash-skill invocations like `/skill-a /skill-b do XYZ` now load all leading skills (up to 5), not just the first
Fixed SSL certificate errors (TLS-inspecting proxies, missing `NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS`, expired certs) burning retries before showing actionable guidance — they now fail immediately with the fix hint
Fixed streaming responses being discarded when the API emits a mid-stream overloaded/server error after partial output — the partial is now kept with an incomplete-response notice
Fixed subagents cut off by a rate limit or server error silently failing instead of returning their partial work to the parent
Fixed subagents reporting API errors (e.g. usage limit reached) as successful results — the error is now reported to the parent agent
Fixed the background-agent daemon on Linux killing itself and every running agent every ~50 seconds after an unclean shutdown left a corrupted worker record
Fixed background agents failing to cold-start over SSH on macOS with "Could not switch to audit session" (regression in 2.1.196)
Fixed `claude stop` being silently undone when it raced a background-agent respawn — the respawn now honors the stop
Fixed background job progress indicators stalling for minutes while the job ran long commands
Fixed background sessions on memory-starved machines showing a generic error — they now indicate low memory and suggest freeing resources
Fixed remote sessions briefly flapping between Working and Idle in the agent view when a background agent completes
Fixed idle subagents vanishing from the agent panel while other subagents were still working; surplus idle agents now collapse into an expandable summary row
Fixed typing `/model` or `/fast` while viewing a subagent silently opening the lead's model picker — a notice now explains the command applies to the lead
Fixed `SessionStart`, `Setup`, and `SubagentStart` hooks silently hiding stderr when exiting with code 2 — the error is now shown in the transcript
Fixed `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions daemon <subcommand>` being treated as a chat prompt instead of running the subcommand
Fixed `SendMessage` silently misrouting when a re-spawned agent reuses a previous agent's name — the tool now detects the mismatch and asks the caller to retarget
Fixed opening or resuming a session with no new messages needlessly growing the transcript file
Fixed backgrounding a session with `←` or `/background` dropping its `/color` from the agent view row
Fixed resetting a corrupted config file from the startup recovery dialog destroying it unrecoverably — it now backs up the file first
Fixed Claude in Chrome repeatedly opening the reconnect page when sessions run from different builds or config directories
Fixed plan mode not prompting for state-changing browser tool calls; read-only `browser_batch` calls are now correctly auto-allowed
Transient server rate-limit errors (429s unrelated to your usage limit) are now retried automatically with backoff for subscribers instead of failing the turn
`CLAUDE_CODE_RETRY_WATCHDOG` now raises the default retry count for non-capacity transient errors to 300 and lifts the cap of 15 on `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_RETRIES`
`claude agents` session rows now show pull-request links as bare `#N` without the redundant "PR" label

title.zh-TW: 網路不穩或被限流不再直接死機，自動重試且保留進度
title.zh-CN: 网络不稳或被限流不再直接死机，自动重试且保留进度
title.en: Network hiccups and rate limits no longer kill tasks; retries and partial progress kept
title.ja: ネットワーク不安や制限で即死せず、自動再試行し進捗を保持
title.ko: 네트워크 불안이나 횟수 제한으로 죽지 않고, 자동 재시도하며 진행 상황을 보존함

body.zh-TW: 當 API 伺服器超載或你的網路稍微不穩時，現在系統變得更有彈性了。以前如果 Claude 話講到一半伺服器出錯，已經講出來的字會全部不見，現在它會幫你保留下來並標記「尚未講完」；如果是被暫時性的限流（rate limit，防止瞬間請求過多的機制）擋下，系統現在會自動幫你稍後重試，不會直接判你失敗，且重試次數上限也大幅放寬。如果子任務（subagent）被中斷，它不再會騙你「任務成功」，而是會老實回報錯誤，或者把做了一半的半成品交接給主管。遇到 SSL 憑證這種根本無法連線的錯誤，它也會直接教你怎麼修，不會傻傻重試到天荒地老。這就像打越洋電話，以前只要雜音一來就直接斷線，而且聊一半的內容都不算數，現在它不但會保留剛才聽懂的話，還會自動幫你重新撥號。
body.zh-CN: 当 API 服务器超载或你的网络稍微不稳时，现在系统变得更有弹性了。以前如果 Claude 话讲到一半服务器出错，已经讲出来的字会全部不见，现在它会帮你保留下来并标记「尚未讲完」；如果是被暂时性的限流（rate limit，防止瞬间请求过多的机制）挡下，系统现在会自动帮你稍后重试，不会直接判你失败，且重试次数上限也大幅放宽。如果子任务（subagent）被中断，它不再会骗你「任务成功」，而是会老实回报错误，或者把做了一半的半成品交接给主管。遇到 SSL 凭证这种根本无法连线的错误，它也会直接教你怎么修，不会傻傻重试到天荒地老。这就像打越洋电话，以前只要杂音一来就直接断线，而且聊一半的内容都不算数，现在它不但会保留刚才听懂的话，还会自动帮你重新拨号。
body.en: The system is now much more resilient against overloaded API servers or minor network blips. Previously, if the server errored out mid-sentence, everything Claude had already streamed would vanish; now it saves that partial output with an "incomplete" notice. If you get temporarily blocked by a rate limit (a mechanism preventing too many rapid requests), the system will automatically retry with a delay instead of instantly failing your turn, and the retry cap has been significantly raised. If a subagent is cut off, it no longer lies about "success" but honestly reports the error or hands its partial work back to the parent agent. For hard connection errors like SSL certificate issues, it won't pointlessly burn through retries but will fail immediately and tell you exactly how to fix it. It's like a long-distance phone call: a burst of static used to drop the call and erase everything you just said; now it remembers what it heard and automatically redials for you.
body.ja: API サーバーが過負荷になったりネットワークが少し不安定になったりしても、システムが柔軟に対応できるようになった。以前は Claude が話し途中でサーバーエラーになると、すでに出力された文字まで全て消えてしまっていたが、今は「未完了」というマーク付きで出力分を保持してくれる。一時的なアクセス制限（rate limit、短時間の過剰なリクエストを防ぐ仕組み）に引っ掛かった場合も、すぐに失敗判定せず自動で少し待ってから再試行するようになり、再試行の上限回数も大幅に緩和された。サブエージェント（subagent）が中断された際も「成功しました」と嘘をつかず、正直にエラーを報告するか、途中までの成果を親エージェントに引き継ぐようになった。SSL 証明書エラーのような根本的に繋がらない問題に直面した場合は、無駄な再試行を繰り返さず即座にエラーを出し、直し方を教えてくれる。国際電話の途中で雑音が入ると、以前は即座に切断されて話した内容も無効になっていたのが、今は聞き取れた分を記録しつつ自動でかけ直してくれるようなものである。
body.ko: API 서버에 과부하가 걸리거나 인터넷이 살짝 불안정할 때 시스템이 훨씬 유연하게 대처한다. 예전엔 Claude가 말을 하던 중에 서버 오류가 나면 이미 내뱉은 글자까지 몽땅 날아갔지만, 이제는 '아직 다 못 말함'이라는 표시와 함께 그때까지 한 말을 살려둔다. 순간적으로 요청이 몰리는 것을 막는 횟수 제한(rate limit)에 걸렸을 때도 단칼에 실패 처리하지 않고 알아서 잠깐 기다렸다가 다시 시도하며, 재시도 한도도 크게 늘렸다. 하위 에이전트(subagent)가 중간에 끊기면 '성공했다'고 거짓말하는 대신 솔직하게 오류를 보고하거나, 하다 만 반쪽짜리 결과물을 상위 에이전트에게 넘겨준다. SSL 인증서처럼 아예 연결이 불가능한 오류를 만나면 멍청하게 계속 재시도하지 않고 즉시 멈추며 고치는 방법을 알려준다. 국제 전화를 하다가 잡음이 섞이면 예전엔 그대로 전화가 끊기고 방금 한 말도 무효가 됐다면, 이제는 방금 알아들은 말은 적어두고 알아서 다시 전화를 걸어주는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Fixed SSL certificate errors (TLS-inspecting proxies, missing `NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS`, expired certs) burning retries before showing actionable guidance — they now fail immediately with the fix hint
Fixed streaming responses being discarded when the API emits a mid-stream overloaded/server error after partial output — the partial is now kept with an incomplete-response notice
Fixed subagents cut off by a rate limit or server error silently failing instead of returning their partial work to the parent
Fixed subagents reporting API errors (e.g. usage limit reached) as successful results — the error is now reported to the parent agent
Transient server rate-limit errors (429s unrelated to your usage limit) are now retried automatically with backoff for subscribers instead of failing the turn
`CLAUDE_CODE_RETRY_WATCHDOG` now raises the default retry count for non-capacity transient errors to 300 and lifts the cap of 15 on `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_RETRIES`

title.zh-TW: 背景代理與連線大掃除，不再無限重啟或無故罷工
title.zh-CN: 背景代理与连线大扫除，不再无限重启或无故罢工
title.en: Background agents and connections debugged: No more infinite loops or offline errors
title.ja: 背景エージェントと接続のバグを一掃し、無限再起動や無断ストライキを防止
title.ko: 백그라운드 에이전트와 연결 버그 청소: 무한 재시작이나 까닭 없는 파업 방지

body.zh-TW: 背景運作的任務現在變得更強韌了。以前在 Linux 上如果沒正常關機，留下來的壞紀錄會導致系統每 50 秒就自殺一次，並砍掉所有正在跑的任務；在 Mac 上用 SSH 遠端連線時也常發生無法開機的狀況；或是當你下令叫任務停下來時，系統卻又手賤自動把它重開——這些詭異的現象都修好了。如果你電腦記憶體不夠，任務不會再丟出一句看不懂的錯誤代碼，而是會明確叫你「釋放記憶體」。在不同資料夾開 Claude 時，Chrome 的外掛也不會再瘋狂跳出重新連線的網頁了。這就像一間公司的打卡系統，以前只要前一天不小心沒打卡下班，隔天整間公司就會每分鐘自動跳電一次，現在它終於修好，大家可以安穩上班了。
body.zh-CN: 背景运作的任务现在变得更强韧了。以前在 Linux 上如果没正常关机，留下来的坏纪录会导致系统每 50 秒就自杀一次，并砍掉所有正在跑的任务；在 Mac 上用 SSH 远端连线时也常发生无法开机的状况；或是当你下令叫任务停下来时，系统却又手贱自动把它重开——这些诡异的现象都修好了。如果你电脑内存不够，任务不会再丢出一句看不懂的错误代码，而是会明确叫你「释放内存」。在不同文件夹开 Claude 时，Chrome 的插件也不会再疯狂跳出重新连线的网页了。这就像一间公司的打卡系统，以前只要前一天不小心没打卡下班，隔天整间公司就会每分钟自动跳电一次，现在它终于修好，大家可以安稳上班了。
body.en: Background tasks are now vastly more robust. Previously on Linux, if the system shut down uncleanly, corrupted leftover records would cause the background program to commit suicide every 50 seconds, taking all running tasks down with it. On Macs, background agents frequently failed to start over an SSH connection, and if you explicitly told a task to stop, the system would sometimes stubbornly auto-restart it right back up. These bizarre behaviors are now fixed. If your computer is starved for memory, tasks won't spit out a cryptic error anymore; they'll explicitly tell you to free up resources. Also, running Claude in different folders will no longer cause the Chrome extension to spam you with reconnect pages. It's like a company's timeclock system that used to trigger a building-wide blackout every minute if someone forgot to punch out yesterday; it's finally fixed, and everyone can work in peace.
body.ja: バックグラウンドで動くタスクがずっと強靭になった。以前の Linux 環境では、正常にシャットダウンされず壊れた記録が残ると、システムが 50 秒ごとに自殺し、実行中の全タスクを巻き添えにして消し飛ばしていた。Mac で SSH リモート接続する際も起動に失敗することが多く、さらにタスクに停止命令を出しても、システムがお節介を焼いて勝手に再起動させてしまうことがあったが、これらの奇妙な現象はすべて修正された。パソコンのメモリが足りない場合も、意味不明なエラーコードを吐き出すのではなく、明確に「メモリを解放してください」と指示するようになった。また、異なるフォルダで Claude を開いた際、Chrome の拡張機能が狂ったように再接続ページを何度も開くこともなくなった。以前は、前日誰かがタイムカードを切り忘れただけで、翌日会社全体が 1 分ごとに停電するような欠陥システムだったのが、今は修理され、誰もが安心して働けるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 백그라운드에서 도는 작업들이 훨씬 질겨졌다. 예전 Linux 환경에선 제대로 컴퓨터를 끄지 않아 망가진 기록이 남으면, 시스템이 50초마다 스스로 목숨을 끊으며 돌고 있던 모든 작업까지 같이 죽여버리곤 했다. Mac에서 SSH로 원격 접속할 때도 켜지지 않는 일이 잦았고, 당신이 작업을 멈추라고 명령했는데도 시스템이 제멋대로 다시 켜버리기도 했지만 이런 기괴한 현상들이 모두 고쳐졌다. 컴퓨터 메모리가 부족할 때도 알아볼 수 없는 오류 코드 대신 '메모리를 비우라'고 똑똑히 말해준다. 서로 다른 폴더에서 Claude를 열 때 Chrome 플러그인이 미친 듯이 재연결 창을 띄워대던 일도 사라졌다. 예전엔 전날 누군가 퇴근 카드를 안 찍고 가면 다음 날 온 회사가 1분마다 정전되던 결함투성이 출퇴근 시스템이었다면, 이제는 완벽히 고쳐져 모두가 편안하게 일할 수 있게 된 것과 같다.

items.original:
Fixed the background-agent daemon on Linux killing itself and every running agent every ~50 seconds after an unclean shutdown left a corrupted worker record
Fixed background agents failing to cold-start over SSH on macOS with "Could not switch to audit session" (regression in 2.1.196)
Fixed `claude stop` being silently undone when it raced a background-agent respawn — the respawn now honors the stop
Fixed background job progress indicators stalling for minutes while the job ran long commands
Fixed background sessions on memory-starved machines showing a generic error — they now indicate low memory and suggest freeing resources
Fixed Claude in Chrome repeatedly opening the reconnect page when sessions run from different builds or config directories

title.zh-TW: 介面與防呆優化：技能可連發，不會把對話紀錄塞爆
title.zh-CN: 界面与防呆优化：技能可连发，不会把对话记录塞爆
title.en: UI and operation foolproof: Stacked skills, no bloated transcripts
title.ja: UIと操作の改善：スキルの連続発動、対話記録の肥大化防止
title.ko: UI 및 오류 방지 최적화: 스킬 연속 사용, 대화 기록 폭발 방지

body.zh-TW: 你可一次載入最多五個斜線技能，且空開對話不再把紀錄檔越撐越大。現在你可以一次呼叫多個斜線技能（像 `/skill-a /skill-b 幫我做某事`），它會乖乖把前五個技能都載入，不會只讀第一個。看代理清單時，如果子代理沒事做，它們會乖乖收成一行，不會直接消失讓你想找也找不到；當你在看子代理的畫面時，如果不小心打了切換模型的指令，它會提醒你這只對主代理有效，不會偷偷幫別人換模型。遇到設定檔壞掉要重設時，它也學會先幫你備份，不會直接把你過去的設定刪光光了。這就像你去點餐，以前一口氣點兩杯不同的飲料店員只會做第一杯，現在他能一口氣記住你的要求，而且結帳時不會因為你沒買新東西就多印一張空白發票給你。
body.zh-CN: 你可一次载入最多五个斜线技能，且空开对话不再把记录档越撑越大。现在你可以一次呼叫多个斜线技能（像 `/skill-a /skill-b 帮我做某事`），它会乖乖把前五个技能都载入，不会只读第一个。看代理清单时，如果子代理没事做，它们会乖乖收成一行，不会直接消失让你想找也找不到；当你在看子代理的画面时，如果不小心打了切换模型的指令，它会提醒你这只对主代理有效，不会偷偷帮别人换模型。遇到配置文件坏掉要重设时，它也学会先帮你备份，不会直接把你过去的设置删光光了。这就像你去点餐，以前一口气点两杯不同的饮料店员只会做第一杯，现在他能一口气记住你的要求，而且结账时不会因为你没买新东西就多印一张空白发票给你。
body.en: You can now load up to five slash skills at once, and opening empty sessions no longer bloats your transcript file. You can now stack multiple slash skills in one breath (like `/skill-a /skill-b do XYZ`) and it will properly load up to the first five, instead of stubbornly ignoring everything after the first. In the agent list, idle subagents now neatly collapse into a summary row instead of vanishing completely out of sight. If you accidentally type a model-switching command while looking at a subagent, it now warns you that this only applies to the main lead agent, rather than silently making unwanted changes. If your configuration file gets corrupted and needs resetting, the system now safely backs it up first instead of mercilessly wiping your old settings. It's like ordering at a cafe: the barista used to only make the first drink if you ordered two at once, but now remembers your whole order, and the register won't print a long blank receipt if you didn't end up buying anything.
body.ja: 最大5つのスラッシュスキルを一度に読み込めるようになり、空の対話を開いても履歴ファイルが無駄に肥大化しなくなった。複数のスラッシュスキルを一度に呼び出す（例えば `/skill-a /skill-b 何かして`）と、最初の1つだけでなく先頭から5つまで全て正常に読み込まれる。エージェント一覧を見る際、仕事のないサブエージェントは完全に消えて探せなくなるのではなく、1行に折りたたまれて表示される。サブエージェントの画面を見ている時にうっかりモデル変更のコマンドを打ってしまっても、主エージェントにしか効かないと警告を出してくれ、裏で勝手に他人のモデルを変えたりしない。設定ファイルが壊れてリセットが必要な時も、過去の設定を完全に消し飛ばす前にバックアップを取るようになった。カフェで注文する際、以前は一気に2杯頼んでも最初の1杯しか作ってくれなかった店員が、今は注文を全て覚えてくれるようになり、何も買わなかったのに無駄に白紙のレシートを印刷されることもなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 한 번에 최대 다섯 개의 슬래시 스킬을 불러올 수 있고, 빈 대화창을 열어도 대화 기록 파일이 쓸데없이 커지지 않는다. 이제 슬래시 스킬을 한 번에 여러 개 부를 때(예: `/skill-a /skill-b 이것 좀 해줘`) 첫 번째 스킬만 달랑 읽지 않고 앞의 다섯 개까지 알아서 잘 불러온다. 에이전트 목록을 볼 때 하위 에이전트가 할 일 없이 놀고 있으면 아예 화면에서 사라져버려 찾을 수 없게 만들지 않고, 한 줄로 깔끔하게 접어준다. 하위 에이전트 화면을 보다가 실수로 모델을 바꾸는 명령어를 쳐도, 남의 모델을 몰래 바꾸지 않고 주 에이전트에게만 적용된다고 친절히 알려준다. 설정 파일이 망가져서 초기화해야 할 때도 과거 설정을 다 날려버리기 전에 먼저 백업본을 챙겨둔다. 카페에서 주문할 때, 예전엔 숨도 안 쉬고 음료 두 잔을 시키면 첫 번째 것만 만들어주던 점원이 이제는 주문을 다 기억하고, 물건을 안 샀는데도 쓸데없이 긴 빈 영수증을 뽑아주지 않는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Stacked slash-skill invocations like `/skill-a /skill-b do XYZ` now load all leading skills (up to 5), not just the first
Fixed remote sessions briefly flapping between Working and Idle in the agent view when a background agent completes
Fixed idle subagents vanishing from the agent panel while other subagents were still working; surplus idle agents now collapse into an expandable summary row
Fixed typing `/model` or `/fast` while viewing a subagent silently opening the lead's model picker — a notice now explains the command applies to the lead
Fixed `SessionStart`, `Setup`, and `SubagentStart` hooks silently hiding stderr when exiting with code 2 — the error is now shown in the transcript
Fixed `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions daemon <subcommand>` being treated as a chat prompt instead of running the subcommand
Fixed `SendMessage` silently misrouting when a re-spawned agent reuses a previous agent's name — the tool now detects the mismatch and asks the caller to retarget
Fixed opening or resuming a session with no new messages needlessly growing the transcript file
Fixed backgrounding a session with `←` or `/background` dropping its `/color` from the agent view row
Fixed resetting a corrupted config file from the startup recovery dialog destroying it unrecoverably — it now backs up the file first
Fixed plan mode not prompting for state-changing browser tool calls; read-only `browser_batch` calls are now correctly auto-allowed
`claude agents` session rows now show pull-request links as bare `#N` without the redundant "PR" label

entries: Subagents now run in the background by default, so Claude keeps working while they run and is notified when they finish (previously a gradual rollout)
Claude in Chrome is now generally available
Added background agent notifications in `claude agents` — sessions that need input or finish now fire the `Notification` hook (`agent_needs_input` / `agent_completed`)
Added `/dataviz` skill for chart and dashboard design guidance with a runnable color-palette validator
Gateway: added Claude Platform on AWS (anthropicAws) as an upstream provider; model-not-found responses now advance the failover chain
Background agents launched from `claude agents` now commit, push, and open a draft PR when they finish code work in a worktree, instead of stopping to ask
The built-in Explore agent now inherits the main session's model (capped at opus) instead of running on haiku
Subagents and context compaction now inherit the session's extended thinking configuration, improving output quality on delegated tasks
Fixed brief network drops mid-response aborting the turn — transient errors like ECONNRESET now retry with backoff instead of failing
Fixed excessive background classifier requests when sandboxed processes repeatedly accessed the same network host
Fixed background tasks in web, desktop, and VS Code task panels getting stuck on "Running" after they finish or after resuming a session
Fixed agent teams: a teammate that dies on an API error now reports "failed" to the lead, and messaging a stuck teammate wakes it to retry immediately
Fixed the `/diff` panel not refreshing when you switch branches or commit outside the session
Fixed markdown tables overflowing and wrapping their right border when rendered in fullscreen mode
Fixed Claude Platform on AWS and Mantle sessions dead-ending with "Please run /login" when the STS token expires — `awsAuthRefresh` now runs automatically
Fixed "no route to host" for local-network hosts in macOS background agent sessions by declaring Local Network entitlements
Fixed `/desktop` failing with "Cannot determine working directory" after entering and exiting a worktree
Fixed background agents repeatedly showing "Reconnecting…" every ~52 seconds on macOS while the agents view was open
Fixed pressing `←` inside `claude attach <id>` exiting to the shell instead of opening the agent view
Fixed `claude --bg` silently creating an unattachable session when combined with `--print`/`-p`; the conflicting flags are now rejected up front
Fixed the workflow progress view dropping the earliest agents from the list while the phase counter stayed correct in SDK and desktop-app sessions
Fixed `.claude/rules/` conditional rules not loading when the target file is reached via a symlinked path
Fixed Cmd+click not opening URLs in fullscreen mode in Warp on macOS
Fixed double-click word selection in fullscreen mode to select the entire URL including the scheme
Fixed plan mode not auto-allowing read-only tool calls when a session starts in plan mode
Fixed `/branch` deriving its default fork name from the compaction summary instead of the first real prompt
Improved focus mode: subagents launched in a turn now appear in its activity summary, and completed background notifications fold into a single count
Improved syntax highlighting accuracy in code blocks, diffs, and file previews by upgrading to highlight.js 11
Keyboard shortcut hints now show opt/cmd instead of alt/super when connected from a Mac over SSH
Improved API retry UX: the error reason is now shown after the second attempt, and a status page link replaces the spinner tip when the API is overloaded
`/login` now opens the sign-in dialog from the `claude agents` view instead of saying it isn't available
Subagents now treat messages from the agent that launched them as normal task direction; an agent's message is still never treated as the user's approval
Removed the `/agents` wizard; ask Claude to create or manage subagents, or edit `.claude/agents/` directly

title.zh-TW: 子代理預設在背景默默做，自動提交程式碼
title.zh-CN: 子代理默认在背景默默做，自动提交代码
title.en: Subagents run in background by default and auto-commit code
title.ja: サブエージェントがデフォルトで背景実行になり、コードも自動コミット
title.ko: 하위 에이전트가 기본적으로 백그라운드에서 일하며, 코드를 자동 커밋함

body.zh-TW: 以前你派子代理（subagent，幫你跑腿的 AI 小助手）去工作時，你必須等它做完才能繼續跟主代理講話，現在它們預設全都在背景獨立運作了！主代理可以繼續幫你做別的事，等小助手做完再來回報。而且，如果小助手是在隔離的工作環境（worktree）裡改程式碼，它現在做完會自動幫你 commit、push 甚至開好草稿 PR（pull request，請求合併程式碼的流程），不用再停下來等你點頭。這就像你原本只能盯著助理把資料打完才能派下一個工作，現在你可以一口氣派十個助理各自回座位趕工，他們做完還會自動把報告放在你的桌上，不浪費你一點時間。
body.zh-CN: 以前你派子代理（subagent，帮你跑腿的 AI 小助手）去工作时，你必须等它做完才能继续跟主代理讲话，现在它们默认全都在背景独立运作了！主代理可以继续帮你做别的事，等小助手做完再来回报。而且，如果小助手是在隔离的工作环境（worktree）里改代码，它现在做完会自动帮你 commit、push 甚至开好草稿 PR（pull request，请求合并代码的流程），不用再停下来等你点头。这就像你原本只能盯着助理把资料打完才能派下一个工作，现在你可以一口气派十个助理各自回座位赶工，他们做完还会自动把报告放在你的桌上，不浪费你一点时间。
body.en: When you dispatch a subagent (an AI assistant running errands for you), you no longer have to twiddle your thumbs waiting for it to finish before talking to the main agent again; they now run independently in the background by default! The main agent can keep helping you while the assistants work and report back when done. Moreover, if an assistant modifies code inside an isolated Git worktree, it will now automatically commit, push, and open a draft PR (pull request, the process for merging code) when it finishes, instead of pausing to ask for your permission. It's like upgrading from standing over your assistant's shoulder while they type, to dispatching ten assistants to their desks simultaneously; they do the work in parallel and automatically leave the finished reports on your desk without wasting a second of your time.
body.ja: 以前はサブエージェント（subagent、お使いをしてくれる AI の助手）に仕事を頼むと、終わるまで主エージェントと話せずに待つ必要があったが、今後はデフォルトで全て背景で独立して動くようになった。助手が働いている間も主エージェントは別の仕事を手伝い、終わった後に報告を受けることができる。さらに、助手が隔離された作業環境（worktree）でコードを修正した場合、作業終了時に自動で commit、push、そして下書きの PR（pull request、コード統合を要求する手続き）の作成まで行い、いちいちあなたの許可を待って止まることがなくなった。以前は助手が資料を打ち終わるまで横で監視していないと次の仕事を出せなかったのが、今は一気に10人の助手を自分の席に帰らせて並行作業させ、終わったら自動で机の上に報告書を置いてくれるようになり、あなたの時間を1秒も無駄にしないようなものである。
body.ko: 예전엔 하위 에이전트(subagent, 당신의 심부름을 하는 AI 조수)에게 일을 시키면 일이 끝날 때까지 주 에이전트와 대화를 못 하고 기다려야 했지만, 이제는 기본적으로 모두 백그라운드에서 알아서 돌아간다! 조수가 일하는 동안 주 에이전트는 계속 당신을 돕고, 조수들은 일이 끝나면 보고만 올리면 된다. 게다가 조수가 격리된 작업 환경(worktree)에서 코드를 고쳤다면, 이제 일이 끝났을 때 당신의 허락을 기다리며 멈춰 서는 대신 알아서 commit, push를 하고 초안 PR(pull request, 코드 병합을 요청하는 과정)까지 척척 열어둔다. 예전엔 조수가 자료를 다 칠 때까지 등 뒤에서 지켜보고 있어야만 다음 일을 시킬 수 있었다면, 이제는 한 번에 조수 열 명을 각자의 자리로 돌려보내 일을 시키고, 다 끝나면 알아서 책상 위에 보고서를 올려두어 당신의 시간을 1초도 낭비하지 않는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Subagents now run in the background by default, so Claude keeps working while they run and is notified when they finish (previously a gradual rollout)
Added background agent notifications in `claude agents` — sessions that need input or finish now fire the `Notification` hook (`agent_needs_input` / `agent_completed`)
Background agents launched from `claude agents` now commit, push, and open a draft PR when they finish code work in a worktree, instead of stopping to ask
The built-in Explore agent now inherits the main session's model (capped at opus) instead of running on haiku
Subagents and context compaction now inherit the session's extended thinking configuration, improving output quality on delegated tasks
Subagents now treat messages from the agent that launched them as normal task direction; an agent's message is still never treated as the user's approval
Improved focus mode: subagents launched in a turn now appear in its activity summary, and completed background notifications fold into a single count

title.zh-TW: 各平台支援大躍進：Chrome 版上線，AWS 也能當備胎
title.zh-CN: 各平台支持大跃进：Chrome 版上线，AWS 也能当备胎
title.en: Platform support leaps forward: Chrome version lives, AWS joins as failover
title.ja: プラットフォーム対応が飛躍：Chrome版が登場、AWSも予備サーバーに
title.ko: 플랫폼 지원 대도약: Chrome 버전 출시, AWS도 예비 서버로 활용

body.zh-TW: 現在你可以在更多地方順暢使用 Claude 了！大家期待已久的「Claude in Chrome」功能正式上線，讓你可以直接在瀏覽器裡無縫操作。如果你有接各種不同的伺服器，現在系統加入了 AWS 上的 Claude Platform（企業雲端通道），如果在第一順位的伺服器找不到你要的模型，它現在聰明到會自動往下一個備用伺服器尋找（failover chain），不會直接兩手一攤說找不到。此外，用 AWS 或 Mantle 登入時，如果金鑰過期，它也會自動幫你重新刷新（awsAuthRefresh），不會再跑到一半突然卡死叫你重新登入。這就像你拿著提款卡，以前這台機器沒錢它就叫你回家，現在它會自動幫你連到隔壁銀行的金庫，而且卡片到期還會自動幫你展延。
body.zh-CN: 现在你可以在更多地方顺畅使用 Claude 了！大家期待已久的「Claude in Chrome」功能正式上线，让你可以在浏览器里无缝操作。如果你有接各种不同的服务器，现在系统加入了 AWS 上的 Claude Platform（企业云端通道），如果在第一顺位的服务器找不到你要的模型，它现在聪明到会自动往下一个备用服务器寻找（failover chain），不会直接两手一摊说找不到。此外，用 AWS 或 Mantle 登入时，如果密钥过期，它也会自动帮你重新刷新（awsAuthRefresh），不会再跑到一半突然卡死叫你重新登入。这就像你拿着提款卡，以前这台机器没钱它就叫你回家，现在它会自动帮你连到隔壁银行的金库，而且卡片到期还会自动帮你展延。
body.en: You can now use Claude smoothly across even more platforms! The highly anticipated "Claude in Chrome" feature is officially generally available, letting you operate seamlessly right in your browser. If you use multiple server setups, the system now includes Claude Platform on AWS (an enterprise cloud channel) as a provider. Even better, if the primary server doesn't have the AI model you requested, it's now smart enough to automatically try the next backup server in line (failover chain) rather than just giving up. Furthermore, when logging in via AWS or Mantle, if your authentication key expires mid-task, it will automatically refresh it (`awsAuthRefresh`) instead of halting the program and demanding you log in again. It's like using an ATM: previously, if a machine was empty, it sent you home; now it automatically wires the cash from a neighboring bank's vault, and gracefully renews your card if it happens to expire while you're standing there.
body.ja: Claude をさらに多くの場所でスムーズに利用できるようになった。待望の「Claude in Chrome」機能が正式リリースされ、ブラウザ上で直接シームレスに操作できる。複数のサーバーに接続している場合、システムは AWS 上の Claude Platform（企業向けクラウド経路）を新たに追加しただけでなく、最優先のサーバーで目的の AI モデルが見つからなかった場合に、諦めずに次の予備サーバーへ自動で探しに行く（failover chain）という賢さを身につけた。さらに、AWS や Mantle でログインしている最中に認証キーの期限が切れても、自動的にキーを更新（awsAuthRefresh）するため、作業の途中で突然フリーズして再ログインを求められることはなくなった。キャッシュカードを使ってお金を下ろす際、以前は ATM に現金がないと家に帰らされていたのが、今は隣の銀行の金庫から自動でお金を引いてきてくれ、さらにカードの期限が切れていてもその場で自動延長してくれるようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 더 많은 곳에서 Claude를 매끄럽게 쓸 수 있다! 많은 사람이 기다려온 'Claude in Chrome' 기능이 정식으로 열려, 브라우저 안에서 곧바로 작업할 수 있다. 여러 종류의 서버를 연결해 쓴다면, 이제 시스템에 AWS의 Claude Platform(기업용 클라우드 통로)이 추가되었을 뿐만 아니라, 첫 번째 서버에서 원하는 AI 모델을 찾지 못하면 두 손 들고 포기하는 대신 알아서 다음 예비 서버로 넘어가 찾는(failover chain) 똑똑함을 갖췄다. 게다가 AWS나 Mantle로 로그인해서 쓸 때 열쇠의 유효기간이 지나면, 가다가 갑자기 멈춰 서서 다시 로그인하라고 하는 대신 알아서 새로 갱신(awsAuthRefresh)해 준다. 현금카드를 쓸 때 예전엔 기계에 돈이 없으면 그냥 집에 가야 했지만, 이제는 알아서 옆 은행 금고로 연결해 주고 카드가 만료돼도 그 자리에서 알아서 연장해 주는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Claude in Chrome is now generally available
