body.zh-CN: 技能（skill，预先包好的一组命令模板，输入 `/` 开头调用）命令以前如果你是从自动完成（autocomplete，打到一半系统帮你列出建议选项）的清单里点选的，偶尔会发生输入框被清空、但命令根本没送出去执行的怪状况，等于你选了等于没选。现在修好了，从清单点选后会确实送出执行。
body.en: Skill (skill, a pre-packaged set of command templates invoked with a leading `/`) commands used to occasionally clear the input box without actually submitting, when you picked them from the autocomplete (autocomplete, the suggestion list that pops up partway through typing) list — selecting it had no effect. Now it's fixed: picking from the list reliably submits and runs.
body.ja: スキル（skill、`/` で呼び出す事前定義済みのコマンドテンプレート）コマンドは以前、オートコンプリート（autocomplete、入力途中で候補を表示してくれる機能）の一覧から選んだとき、入力欄が空になるのにコマンド自体は送信されないという奇妙な不具合がときどき起きていた。選んでも選んでいないのと同じだったわけである。今は修正され、一覧から選べば確実に送信・実行される。
body.ko: 스킬（skill，`/` 로 호출하는 미리 만들어진 명령 묶음）명령은 예전엔 자동완성（autocomplete，입력 도중 후보 목록을 보여주는 기능）목록에서 선택했을 때, 가끔 입력창만 비워지고 명령은 실제로 전송되지 않는 이상한 일이 있었다. 선택해도 선택 안 한 것과 같았다. 이제 수정되어, 목록에서 선택하면 확실히 전송되어 실행된다.

items.original: Resolved inconsistent behavior where selecting skill-derived slash commands from autocompletion suggestions cleared the input without executing. Autocompleted skill commands are now correctly submitted to the backend.

title.zh-TW: 「永遠允許」的指令規則預設改成「完全比對」，比較不會誤放行危險指令
title.zh-CN: “永远允许”的命令规则默认改成“完全比对”，比较不会误放行危险命令
title.en: "Always Approve" rules now default to exact matching, far less likely to wave through a dangerous lookalike command
title.ja: 「常に承認」ルールはデフォルトで完全一致に、危険な「なりすまし」コマンドを誤って通すリスクが減少
title.ko: "항상 허용" 규칙이 기본적으로 정확히 일치하는 것으로 바뀌어, 위험한 비슷한 명령을 잘못 통과시킬 위험이 줄어듦

body.zh-TW: 「永遠允許」（Always Approve，你設定好以後同類指令不用每次都跳出來問你同意）這種規則以前預設用比對範圍很寬的正規表示式（regex，一種可以模糊比對文字模式的寫法，但也容易不小心放行不該放行的東西）去判斷，現在預設改成「完全照字面比對」，比較不容易誤放行看起來像但其實不一樣的危險指令；如果你真的需要模糊比對的彈性，可以在規則前面加上 `regex:` 自己選擇開啟。這就像門禁系統以前刷「長得很像」的卡就放行，現在改成一定要刷一模一樣的卡才開門，除非你自己特別交代要放寬。
body.zh-CN: “永远允许”（Always Approve，你设定好以后同类命令不用每次都弹出来问你同意）这种规则以前默认用比对范围很宽的正则表达式（regex，一种可以模糊比对文字模式的写法，但也容易不小心放行不该放行的东西）去判断，现在默认改成“完全照字面比对”，比较不容易误放行看起来像但其实不一样的危险命令；如果你真的需要模糊比对的弹性，可以在规则前面加上 `regex:` 自己选择开启。这就像门禁系统以前刷“长得很像”的卡就放行，现在改成一定要刷一模一样的卡才开门，除非你自己特别交代要放宽。
body.en: 'Always Approve' rules (Always Approve, settings that let matching commands skip asking for your consent every time) used to default to matching with loose regular expressions (regex, a pattern-matching syntax that's flexible but can accidentally let through things that look similar but aren't), which now default to strict literal matching instead — much less likely to wave through a dangerous command that merely resembles an approved one. If you really need the flexibility of fuzzy matching, you can opt in by prefixing a rule with `regex:`. It's like an access card reader that used to accept cards that 'looked close enough'; now it requires an exact match unless you specifically tell it to relax.
body.ja: 「常に承認」（Always Approve、設定しておくと同じ種類のコマンドは毎回同意を聞かれなくなる仕組み）ルールは以前、緩い正規表現（regex、柔軟に文字パターンを照合できるが、似て非なるものまでうっかり通してしまいやすい書き方）でマッチング判定するのがデフォルトだった。今はデフォルトが「文字通り完全一致」に変わり、見た目は似ているが実は違う危険なコマンドを誤って通してしまうリスクが減った。あいまい一致の柔軟性が本当に必要な場合は、ルールの先頭に `regex:` を付けて自分でオプトインできる。これは入退室カードリーダーが以前「だいたい似ているカード」でも通していたのを、自分で緩めると指定しない限り完全一致のカードしか通さなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: “항상 허용”（Always Approve，설정해두면 같은 종류의 명령은 매번 동의를 묻지 않는 설정）규칙은 예전엔 매칭 범위가 넓은 정규표현식（regex，문자 패턴을 느슨하게 매칭할 수 있지만 비슷해 보이는 다른 것까지 실수로 통과시키기 쉬운 방식）을 기본값으로 썼다. 이제 기본값이 “글자 그대로 정확히 일치”로 바뀌어, 비슷해 보이지만 실제로는 다른 위험한 명령을 잘못 통과시킬 가능성이 줄었다. 정말 느슨한 매칭이 필요하면 규칙 앞에 `regex:` 를 붙여 직접 선택해 켤 수 있다. 출입 카드 리더기가 예전엔 “비슷하게 생긴” 카드도 통과시켰는데, 이제는 직접 완화하라고 지정하지 않는 한 똑같은 카드만 문을 열어주는 것과 같다.

items.original: Improved command permission security by making "Always Approve" rule matching strict (non-regex) by default, while allowing users to explicitly opt-in to regex matching by prepending rules with `regex:`.

title.zh-TW: 把指令結果存成檔案這種安全動作，現在不會每次都被擋下來要你重新核准
title.zh-CN: 把命令结果存成文件这种安全动作，现在不会每次都被挡下来要你重新核准
title.en: Safe output-redirection commands no longer get blocked for re-approval every single time
title.ja: コマンドの結果をファイルに保存するような安全な操作が、もう毎回再承認を求められなくなった
title.ko: 명령 결과를 파일로 저장하는 안전한 동작이 이제 매번 다시 승인받지 않아도 됨

body.zh-TW: 像 `tool > file`（把某個指令的輸出結果導向、存成一個檔案，> 符號叫做重新導向）這種其實很安全的常見寫法，以前因為系統比對規則太嚴格，常常被當成「跟之前核准過的指令不完全一樣」而要你重新核准一次。現在放寬了這類檢查，安全的輸出重新導向指令可以直接套用你之前設定好的允許規則，不用每次都被多問一次。
body.zh-CN: 像 `tool > file`（把某个命令的输出结果重定向、存成一个文件，> 符号叫做重定向）这种其实很安全的常见写法，以前因为系统比对规则太严格，常常被当成“跟之前核准过的命令不完全一样”而要你重新核准一次。现在放宽了这类检查，安全的输出重定向命令可以直接套用你之前设定好的允许规则，不用每次都被多问一次。
body.en: Genuinely safe, common patterns like `tool > file` (redirecting a command's output into a file, where `>` is a redirection symbol) used to often get flagged as 'not quite the same' as a previously approved command, forcing you to re-approve every time, because the matching rules were too strict. These checks are now relaxed — safe output-redirection commands can apply your existing approval rules directly, without being asked again every time.
body.ja: `tool > file`（あるコマンドの出力結果をリダイレクトしてファイルに保存する書き方で、`>` はリダイレクト記号）のような本来とても安全な書き方でも、以前はマッチングルールが厳しすぎて「以前承認したコマンドと完全には一致しない」と判定され、毎回再承認を求められることがよくあった。今はこの種のチェックが緩和され、安全な出力リダイレクトコマンドはあなたが以前設定した許可ルールをそのまま適用でき、毎回余計に聞かれることがなくなった。
body.ko: `tool > file`（어떤 명령의 출력 결과를 리다이렉트해 파일로 저장하는 방식으로, `>` 는 리다이렉트 기호）같은 본래 안전한 흔한 패턴도, 예전엔 매칭 규칙이 너무 엄격해 “이전에 승인한 명령과 완전히 같지 않다”고 판단되어 매번 다시 승인해야 하는 경우가 많았다. 이제 이런 검사가 완화되어, 안전한 출력 리다이렉트 명령은 당신이 이미 설정해둔 허용 규칙을 그대로 적용할 수 있어 매번 다시 묻지 않는다.

items.original: Improved command permission usability by relaxing redirection checks, allowing safe commands with output redirection (e.g., `tool > file`) to match without requiring strict full-command approval.

title.zh-TW: 終端機裡的連結變成可以直接點，看 diff 也能按 shift+n 往回翻
title.zh-CN: 终端里的链接变成可以直接点，看 diff 也能按 shift+n 往回翻
title.en: Links in the terminal are now clickable, and you can press shift+n to step backward through a diff
title.ja: ターミナル内のリンクがクリック可能に、diff の確認も shift+n で後戻りできるように
title.ko: 터미널 링크를 바로 클릭할 수 있고, diff 화면도 shift+n 으로 뒤로 넘길 수 있음

body.zh-TW: 支援的終端機現在能把網址顯示成真正可以點擊的連結（OSC8，一種讓終端機文字變成可點擊超連結的技術標準），舊版不支援的終端機則會自動退回成純文字、不會顯示亂碼。另外在統一差異檢視模式（diff review，比對程式碼修改前後差異的畫面）裡新增了 `shift+n` 快捷鍵，可以往回翻看上一段修改，不用只能往前翻。
body.zh-CN: 支持的终端现在能把网址显示成真正可以点击的链接（OSC8，一种让终端文字变成可点击超链接的技术标准），旧版不支持的终端则会自动退回成纯文本、不会显示乱码。另外在统一差异检视模式（diff review，比对代码修改前后差异的画面）里新增了 `shift+n` 快捷键，可以往回翻看上一段修改，不用只能往前翻。
body.en: Terminals that support it can now render URLs as genuinely clickable links (OSC8, a technical standard for clickable hyperlinks inside terminal text), while older unsupported terminals automatically fall back to plain text instead of garbled output. Also, the unified diff review screen (diff review, the view that compares code before and after a change) now has a `shift+n` shortcut to cycle backward through changes, instead of only being able to move forward.
body.ja: 対応しているターミナルでは、URL が本物のクリック可能なリンク（OSC8、ターミナル内のテキストをクリック可能なハイパーリンクにする技術標準）として表示されるようになり、対応していない古いターミナルでは自動的にプレーンテキストへフォールバックして文字化けしない。また統一差分レビュー画面（diff review、変更前後のコードを比較する画面）に `shift+n` ショートカットが追加され、前の変更へ後戻りできるようになった。以前は前へ進むことしかできなかった。
body.ko: 지원되는 터미널에서는 URL 이 진짜 클릭 가능한 링크（OSC8，터미널 텍스트를 클릭 가능한 하이퍼링크로 만드는 기술 표준）로 표시되며, 지원하지 않는 구형 터미널은 자동으로 일반 텍스트로 돌아가 깨진 글자가 나오지 않는다. 또한 통합 diff 검토 화면（diff review，코드 변경 전후를 비교하는 화면）에 `shift+n` 단축키가 추가되어, 이전 변경으로 되돌아가며 볼 수 있다. 예전엔 앞으로만 넘길 수 있었다.

items.original: Added dynamic OSC8 terminal hyperlink support to render clickable links in supporting terminals, with automatic fallback stripping for backward compatibility. Introduced reverse diff cycling navigation mapped to `shift+n` in unified diff review mode to allow users to easily cycle backwards through diff blocks.

title.zh-TW: 程式碼區塊裡的 Makefile 語法不會再被誤判成數學公式、印出亂碼
title.zh-CN: 代码块里的 Makefile 语法不会再被误判成数学公式、打出乱码
title.en: Makefile syntax inside code blocks no longer gets mistaken for math formulas and garbled
title.ja: コードブロック内の Makefile 構文が数式と誤認識されて文字化けすることがなくなった
title.ko: 코드 블록 안 Makefile 문법이 더 이상 수식으로 오인되어 깨진 글자가 나오지 않음

body.zh-TW: Antigravity 支援 LaTeX（一種專門用來排版數學公式的標記語法）數學公式渲染，但以前連程式碼區塊裡 Makefile（一種寫建置指令的設定檔語法）的 `$(call ...)` 這類寫法都會被誤判成數學公式語法去解析，結果印出一團亂碼。現在加了一道判斷機制，只在一般文字段落才會嘗試解析數學公式，程式碼區塊裡的內容不會被誤傷。
body.zh-CN: Antigravity 支持 LaTeX（一种专门用来排版数学公式的标记语法）数学公式渲染，但以前连代码块里 Makefile（一种写构建命令的配置文件语法）的 `$(call ...)` 这类写法都会被误判成数学公式语法去解析，结果打印出一团乱码。现在加了一道判断机制，只在普通文本段落才会尝试解析数学公式，代码块里的内容不会被误伤。
body.en: Antigravity supports LaTeX (a markup syntax dedicated to typesetting math formulas) math rendering, but it used to misread Makefile (a config syntax for writing build instructions) patterns like `$(call ...)` inside code blocks as math formula syntax, garbling the output. A new state machine now restricts math-formula parsing to plain prose paragraphs only, so code block contents no longer get caught in the crossfire.
body.ja: Antigravity は LaTeX（数式組版専用のマークアップ記法）の数式レンダリングに対応しているが、以前はコードブロック内の Makefile（ビルド手順を書く設定ファイルの記法）の `$(call ...)` のような記述まで数式構文だと誤認識して解析してしまい、文字化けして表示されることがあった。今は状態管理の仕組みが追加され、数式の解析は通常の地の文の段落でのみ行われるようになり、コードブロックの内容が巻き添えを食うことはなくなった。
body.ko: Antigravity 는 LaTeX（수식 조판 전용 마크업 문법）수식 렌더링을 지원하지만, 예전엔 코드 블록 안 Makefile（빌드 명령을 적는 설정 파일 문법）의 `$(call ...)` 같은 표기까지 수식 문법으로 오인해 분석하는 바람에 깨진 글자가 출력되곤 했다. 이제 상태 판별 장치가 추가되어, 수식 분석은 일반 본문 단락에서만 시도되며 코드 블록 안 내용은 영향을 받지 않는다.

items.original: Fixed a rendering bug where Makefile syntax (like `$(call ...)`) inside code blocks was mistakenly parsed and mangled by LaTeX math expansion, by introducing a state machine that restricts expansion to prose segments.

entries: Fixed a bug where the CLI would temporarily render skill commands without their slash prefix during optimistic updates by deferring prefix stripping to the serialization boundary, ensuring the UI always displays exactly what the user typed.
Fixed a redundant CLI exit message by removing the "Resume in the same project" hint line, leaving only the standard resume command to simplify exit output.

Resolved bugs during UI transitions (such as opening subagent details or logging out) by introducing a unified synchronization mechanism that prevents key lockups and ensures overlay panels like the /help view are properly reset.

Improved command permission security by making "Always Approve" rule matching strict (non-regex) by default, while allowing users to explicitly opt-in to regex matching by prepending rules with `regex:`.
Improved command permission usability by relaxing redirection checks, allowing safe commands with output redirection (e.g., `tool > file`) to match without requiring strict full-command approval.
Fixed a bug in the CLI prompt editor where undo and redo history stacks could become desynchronized during rapid mutations by decoupling the history state into a unified, pointer-backed structure.
Fixed a bug where browser-related prompt sections were missing from the agent's prompt registry, ensuring browser-based tasks execute reliably.

title.zh-TW: 指令放行機制更聰明，認得輸出轉向也更安全
title.zh-CN: 指令放行机制更聪明，认得输出转向也更安全
title.en: Smarter command approvals: strict matching and redirection awareness
title.ja: コマンド承認ルールが賢くなり、より安全で出力リダイレクトにも対応
title.ko: 명령어 승인 규칙이 똑똑해져, 더 안전하고 출력 방향 바꾸기에도 잘 대처한다.

body.zh-TW: 現在「永遠允許執行」的指令名單變得更嚴謹也更聰明了。以前只要指令名字有部分對得上，系統可能就會放行，現在預設改成必須「完全一模一樣」才算數，除非你自己加上 regex: 前綴來指定使用正規表示式（regular expression，一種用符號表示文字特徵的寫法）。同時，它也沒那麼死板了：如果你只是把原本已經允許的指令結果輸出存進檔案（像 `指令 > 檔案` 這樣），系統不會因為你多加了輸出轉向的寫法就把你擋下來。就像大樓警衛，以前只要名牌上有一樣的字就放人，現在預設只認全名，但如果你只是手上多拿了個要存進倉庫的箱子，他也不會故意刁難你。
body.zh-CN: 现在「永远允许执行」的指令名单变得更严谨也更聪明了。以前只要指令名字有部分对得上，系统可能就会放行，现在默认改成必须「完全一模一样」才算数，除非你自己加上 regex: 前缀来指定使用正则表达式（regular expression，一种用符号表示文字特征的写法）。同时，它也没那么死板了：如果你只是把原本已经允许的指令结果输出存进文件（像 `指令 > 文件` 这样），系统不会因为你多加了输出转向的写法就把你挡下来。就像大楼警卫，以前只要名牌上有一样的字就放人，现在默认只认全名，但如果你只是手上多拿了个要存进仓库的箱子，他也不会故意刁难你。
body.en: The "Always Approve" command list is now both stricter and smarter. Previously, partial name matches might slip through, but now the default requires an exact, full-string match unless you explicitly prepend rules with regex: to use regular expressions (a pattern-matching syntax). At the same time, it's less rigid about minor additions: if you just pipe the output of an already-approved command into a file (like `command > file`), the system will no longer block you simply because you added redirection syntax. Like a building security guard who used to let people in if their badge had any matching words, but now strictly checks the full name — yet won't maliciously stop you just because you're holding a box destined for the warehouse.
body.ja: 「常に許可」のコマンドリストがより厳密で賢くなった。以前はコマンド名が一部でも一致すれば通してしまっていたが、今後はデフォルトで「完全に一致」しなければ認められなくなり、正規表現（regular expression、記号を使って文字のパターンを表す書き方）を使いたい場合はわざわざ regex: を先頭に付けねばならない。一方で融通も利くようになり、既に許可されたコマンドの出力をファイルに保存するだけ（`コマンド > ファイル` のような書き方）なら、出力リダイレクトが追加されたからといって理不尽にブロックされることはなくなった。ビルの警備員が、以前は名札の文字が一部でも同じなら通していたのが今はフルネームを厳密に確認するようになり、それでも倉庫に入れる箱を手に持っているからといってわざといじわるして止めたりはしなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: '항상 허용'하는 명령어 목록이 더 깐깐하고 똑똑해졌다. 예전엔 명령어 이름이 대충 비슷하기만 해도 시스템이 통과시켜 줬을 수 있지만, 이제는 기본적으로 '글자 하나 안 틀리고 똑같아야' 인정하며 정규 표현식(regular expression, 기호를 써서 글자 패턴을 나타내는 방식)을 쓰려면 규칙 앞에 굳이 regex:를 붙여야 한다. 그러면서도 융통성이 생겨서, 이미 허락받은 명령어의 결과를 파일에 저장하려고(예를 들어 `명령어 > 파일`처럼) 출력 방향을 바꾸는 기호를 덧붙였다고 해서 시스템이 무작정 막아서지 않는다. 빌딩 경비원이 예전엔 이름표에 비슷한 글자만 있어도 들여보내 주다가 이제는 무조건 전체 이름을 깐깐하게 확인하지만, 그렇다고 창고에 넣을 상자 하나를 들고 있다고 해서 일부러 딴지를 걸며 막지는 않는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Improved command permission security by making "Always Approve" rule matching strict (non-regex) by default, while allowing users to explicitly opt-in to regex matching by prepending rules with `regex:`.
Improved command permission usability by relaxing redirection checks, allowing safe commands with output redirection (e.g., `tool > file`) to match without requiring strict full-command approval.

title.zh-TW: 修好畫面切換死當與打字復原失效問題
title.zh-CN: 修好画面切换死当与打字复原失效问题
title.en: Fixes UI transition lockups and editor undo history failures
title.ja: 画面切り替え時のフリーズとキー入力の取り消しが効かなくなる不具合を修正
title.ko: 화면 전환 시 멈춤 현상과 타이핑 되돌리기 실패 문제 해결

body.zh-TW: 切換畫面、快速復原不再卡死。現在當你在不同畫面間切換（例如打開子代理詳情或登出）時，鍵盤不會再突然完全沒反應卡死，輔助說明的面板也會正確關閉。如果你在輸入框裡打字太快並頻繁按復原（undo）或重做（redo），歷史紀錄也不會再亂掉。打上帶有斜線的特殊捷徑指令時，送出的瞬間那個斜線也不會因為畫面更新而短暫消失，你打什麼它就顯示什麼。此外，退出程式時也不會再囉嗦地印出兩行重複的提示，清爽多了；而叫代理去瀏覽網頁時，它也不會因為忘記帶上瀏覽器專用的內部提示詞而失敗。就像開車，以前切換排檔時方向盤偶爾會卡死，音響也會短暫消音，現在整台車的操控變得順暢無比。
body.zh-CN: 切换画面、快速复原不再卡死。现在当你在不同画面间切换（例如打开子代理详情或登出）时，键盘不会再突然完全没反应死机，辅助说明的面板也会正确关闭。如果你在输入框里打字太快并频繁按复原（undo）或重做（redo），历史记录也不会再乱掉。打上带有斜线的特殊快捷指令时，送出的瞬间那个斜线也不会因为画面更新而短暂消失，你打什么它就显示什么。此外，退出程序时也不会再啰嗦地印出两行重复的提示，清爽多了；而叫代理去浏览网页时，它也不会因为忘记带上浏览器专用的内部提示词而失败。就像开车，以前切换排挡时方向盘偶尔会死机，音响也会短暂消音，现在整台车的操控变得顺畅无比。
body.en: A bunch of annoying hiccups that made navigating the terminal feel clunky have been fixed. Now, when transitioning between different views (like opening subagent details or logging out), the keyboard won't suddenly lock up and stop responding, and help overlay panels will close properly. If you type rapidly in the input box and frequently mash undo or redo, your edit history stack won't get hopelessly desynchronized anymore. When you type special slash commands, the slash prefix will no longer flicker and momentarily disappear from the screen right as you hit send; it exactly displays what you typed. Moreover, exiting the program no longer spams redundant reminder lines, making the output much cleaner, and asking agents to browse the web won't randomly fail because it forgot to load the browser-specific internal prompts. Like driving a car: shifting gears used to occasionally lock the steering wheel and briefly mute the radio, but now the entire driving experience handles flawlessly.
body.ja: 端末内での操作をもたつかせていた数々の不具合が解消された。今後、異なる画面間（サブエージェントの詳細を開く、ログアウトするなど）を移動する際、キーボードが突然一切反応しなくなるフリーズが起きなくなり、ヘルプのパネルも正しく閉じるようになる。入力ボックスで高速でタイピングしながら取り消し（undo）ややり直し（redo）を連打しても、履歴がぐちゃぐちゃに狂うことはなくなった。スラッシュから始まる特殊なショートカットコマンドを打った際、送信した瞬間に画面の更新に巻き込まれてスラッシュが一瞬消えることもなくなり、打った文字がそのまま表示される。さらに、プログラムの終了時に重複した注意書きが2行も表示されるのをやめ、すっきりしたほか、エージェントにウェブを閲覧させた際、ブラウザ専用の内部指示を忘れて失敗することもなくなった。車を運転する際、以前はギアを切り替えるとたまにハンドルがロックし、オーディオの音が一瞬消えていたのが、今は車の操縦全体が信じられないほどスムーズになったようなものである。
body.ko: 터미널에서 작업할 때 답답하게 만들던 자잘한 오류들을 한꺼번에 고쳤다. 이제 하위 에이전트의 자세한 정보를 보거나 로그아웃하는 등 다른 화면으로 넘어갈 때, 갑자기 키보드가 아예 먹통이 되어 멈추는 일이 없고 도움말 화면도 제대로 닫힌다. 입력 칸에서 글자를 너무 빨리 치면서 되돌리기(undo)나 다시 실행(redo)을 마구 눌러도 기록이 엉망진창으로 꼬이지 않는다. 슬래시(/)가 붙은 특수 단축 명령어를 칠 때도, 전송하는 찰나에 화면이 새로 고쳐지며 슬래시가 잠깐 사라지던 일이 없어 당신이 친 그대로 똑똑히 보여준다. 게다가 프로그램을 끄고 나갈 때 똑같은 안내 문구를 두 줄이나 구시렁대며 띄우지 않아 한결 깔끔해졌고, 에이전트에게 웹 서핑을 시켰을 때 브라우저 전용 내부 지시어를 빼먹는 바람에 실패하는 일도 없어졌다. 차를 몰 때 예전엔 기어를 바꾸면 가끔 운전대가 굳어버리거나 오디오가 잠깐 끊기곤 했는데, 이제는 차 전체가 막힘없이 부드럽게 움직이는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Resolved bugs during UI transitions (such as opening subagent details or logging out) by introducing a unified synchronization mechanism that prevents key lockups and ensures overlay panels like the /help view are properly reset.
Fixed a bug in the CLI prompt editor where undo and redo history stacks could become desynchronized during rapid mutations by decoupling the history state into a unified, pointer-backed structure.
Fixed a bug where the CLI would temporarily render skill commands without their slash prefix during optimistic updates by deferring prefix stripping to the serialization boundary, ensuring the UI always displays exactly what the user typed.
Fixed a redundant CLI exit message by removing the "Resume in the same project" hint line, leaving only the standard resume command to simplify exit output.
Fixed a bug where browser-related prompt sections were missing from the agent's prompt registry, ensuring browser-based tasks execute reliably.

entries: Added support for `--project` and `--new-project` launch flags to allow users to explicitly set or create projects, and updated the project resolution logic to default regardless of the active workspace.
Added a confirmation prompt when pressing `Esc` in comment mode with unsaved modifications to prevent users from accidentally discarding their work in review views.
Added dynamic OSC8 terminal hyperlink support to render clickable links in supporting terminals, with automatic fallback stripping for backward compatibility.
Introduced reverse diff cycling navigation mapped to `shift+n` in unified diff review mode to allow users to easily cycle backwards through diff blocks.

Improved permission config merging priorities by ensuring project-specific configurations (located in `~/.gemini/config/projects/`) take precedence over global settings in `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json`.
Fixed a regression where `ctrl+o` scrollback clearing failed by restoring the use of cached fields rather than shared pointer comparisons for trajectory toggle detection.

Fixed a rendering bug where Makefile syntax (like `$(call ...)`) inside code blocks was mistakenly parsed and mangled by LaTeX math expansion, by introducing a state machine that restricts expansion to prose segments.

Fixed an enterprise network connectivity issue by restoring AES-NI compile-time optimizations, which prevents Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) firewalls from incorrectly flagging and resetting TLS connections.
Fixed incorrect key strings by removing the unsupported backtab default binding and correcting invalid `pgdn` references to `pgdown` to align with Bubble Tea v2 canonical names.

title.zh-TW: 預覽與留言更順手，連結能點且不怕誤刪
title.zh-CN: 预览与留言更顺手，链接能点且不怕误删
title.en: Smoother review mode, clickable links, and safeguarded comments
title.ja: プレビューとコメントがスムーズになり、リンククリック対応と誤削除防止を追加
title.ko: 미리보기와 메모 작성이 더 편해지고, 링크를 누를 수 있으며 실수로 지워지는 일도 없다.

body.zh-TW: 現在在終端機裡審閱差異與留註解變得更安全也更靈活了。以前你在註解模式打字打到一半，如果不小心按到 Esc，千辛萬苦打好的字就會瞬間灰飛煙滅；現在它會貼心跳出確認對話框攔住你。看程式碼差異時，如果你不小心按下一筆跳過了想看的地方，現在可以按 shift+n 直接「倒車」回去看上一筆。此外，現在終端機裡的網址連結真的可以點擊了，按住熱鍵點一下就能直接在瀏覽器打開；清空歷史對話畫面的快捷鍵（ctrl+o）也修好重新復活，不會再失靈。就像看實體報紙變成看電子書一樣，現在不但可以在文章上點連結，不小心翻頁還能一鍵退回，而且寫在旁邊的便條紙也不會因為風吹就飛走。
body.zh-CN: 现在在终端机里审阅差异与留注解变得更安全也更灵活了。以前你在注解模式打字打到一半，如果不小心按到 Esc，千辛万苦打好的字就会瞬间灰飞烟灭；现在它会贴心跳出确认对话框拦住你。看代码差异时，如果你不小心按下一笔跳过了想看的地方，现在可以按 shift+n 直接「倒车」回去看上一笔。此外，现在终端机里的网址连结真的可以点击了，按住热键点一下就能直接在浏览器打开；清空历史对话画面的快捷键（ctrl+o）也修好重新复活，不会再失灵。就像看实体报纸变成看电子书一样，现在不但可以在文章上点连结，不小心翻页还能一键退回，而且写在旁边的便条纸也不会因为风吹就飞走。
body.en: Reviewing diffs and leaving comments in the terminal is now safer and more flexible. Previously, if you accidentally hit Esc while halfway through typing a comment, your hard work would instantly vanish into thin air; now, a thoughtful confirmation dialog pops up to stop you. When reviewing code changes, if you accidentally skip past a section you wanted to see, you can now press shift+n to instantly "reverse" back to the previous diff block. Furthermore, web links in the terminal are now genuinely clickable—just hold the modifier key and click to open them straight in your browser. The shortcut for clearing the conversation history screen (ctrl+o) has also been resurrected and fixed. Like upgrading from a physical newspaper to an e-book: you can now tap links on the page, instantly flip back if you turn a page by mistake, and your sticky notes won't blow away in the wind.
body.ja: 端末内での差分確認やコメントの書き込みが、より安全で柔軟になった。以前はコメントモードで文字を打っている途中にうっかり Esc を押してしまうと、苦労して書いた文章が一瞬で消え去っていたが、今は親切な確認ダイアログが出て引き止めてくれる。コードの差分を見ている際、間違えて「次へ」を押して見たい箇所を飛ばしてしまっても、shift+n を押せばすぐに「バック」して前の差分に戻れるようになった。さらに、端末内の URL リンクが本当にクリックできるようになり、修飾キーを押しながらクリックするだけでブラウザが開く。履歴画面を消去するショートカット（ctrl+o）も直って復活した。紙の新聞から電子書籍に乗り換えたようなもので、記事のリンクを直接クリックでき、ページをめくり間違えてもボタン一つで戻れ、余白に書いた付箋が風で飛んでいくこともなくなったわけである。
body.ko: 이제 터미널에서 차이점을 살펴보고 메모를 남기는 일이 더 안전하고 자유로워졌다. 예전엔 메모 모드에서 글을 치다 실수로 Esc를 누르면 기껏 쳐둔 글이 순식간에 날아갔지만, 이제는 확인 창이 떠서 막아준다. 코드 차이를 볼 때, 실수로 '다음'을 눌러 보고 싶던 부분을 지나쳐 버렸더라도 이제 shift+n을 눌러 바로 이전 부분으로 '후진'할 수 있다. 게다가 이제 터미널 안의 인터넷 주소도 정말로 누를 수 있게 되어, 단축키를 누른 채 클릭하면 바로 브라우저가 열린다. 이전 대화 화면을 싹 지워주는 단축키(ctrl+o)도 고쳐져 다시 제대로 돌아간다. 종이 신문을 보다가 전자책으로 바꾼 것과 같다. 이제 기사에서 링크를 누를 수 있고, 실수로 페이지를 넘겨도 버튼 한 번에 되돌릴 수 있으며, 옆에 붙여둔 포스트잇이 바람에 날아갈 일도 없어진 셈이다.

items.original:
Added a confirmation prompt when pressing `Esc` in comment mode with unsaved modifications to prevent users from accidentally discarding their work in review views.
Introduced reverse diff cycling navigation mapped to `shift+n` in unified diff review mode to allow users to easily cycle backwards through diff blocks.
Added dynamic OSC8 terminal hyperlink support to render clickable links in supporting terminals, with automatic fallback stripping for backward compatibility.
Fixed a regression where `ctrl+o` scrollback clearing failed by restoring the use of cached fields rather than shared pointer comparisons for trajectory toggle detection.
Fixed incorrect key strings by removing the unsupported backtab default binding and correcting invalid `pgdn` references to `pgdown` to align with Bubble Tea v2 canonical names.

title.zh-TW: 啟動專案更直覺，設定檔優先順序與企業連線不再雷人
title.zh-CN: 启动项目更直觉，配置文件优先顺序与企业连接不再雷人
title.en: Intuitive project launching, smarter config priorities, and reliable enterprise connections
title.ja: プロジェクト起動が直感的になり、設定の優先順位と企業内ネットワーク接続の問題を解消
title.ko: 프로젝트 시작이 더 직관적이고, 설정 파일 우선순위와 기업 망 연결 문제가 해결되었다.

body.zh-TW: 你可以更直接地管理並啟動不同專案了。現在只要在啟動時加上 `--project` 或 `--new-project`，就能直接指定或建立專案，不用管你現在人在哪個資料夾。設定檔的優先順序也變聰明了，專案專屬的權限設定現在會確實蓋過全域設定，不會再發生「明明專案設定了卻不理我」的窘境。如果你在公司裡使用，以前因為企業防火牆的深度封包檢測（DPI）會誤擋系統的加密連線，導致你一直斷線；現在系統找回了最佳化設定，連線能順利穿透防火牆了。另外，系統也不會再自作聰明把你寫在程式碼區塊裡的 Makefile 語法當成數學公式亂改一通了。就像去不同的分公司上班，現在你只要報上分公司名字就能直接上工，當地的員工守則會確實蓋過總公司的規定，而且公司的門禁系統也不會再把你的正常公事包誤認為危險物品而被警衛攔下。
body.zh-CN: 你可以更直接地管理并启动不同项目了。现在只要在启动时加上 `--project` 或 `--new-project`，就能直接指定或建立项目，不用管你现在人在哪个文件夹。配置文件的优先顺序也变聪明了，项目专属的权限设置现在会确实盖过全局设置，不会再发生「明明项目设置了却不理我」的窘境。如果你在公司里使用，以前因为企业防火墙的深度包检测（DPI）会误挡系统的加密连接，导致你一直断线；现在系统找回了优化设置，连接能顺利穿透防火墙了。另外，系统也不会再自作聪明把你写在代码区块里的 Makefile 语法当成数学公式乱改一通了。就像去不同的分公司上班，现在你只要报上分公司名字就能直接上工，当地的员工守则会确实盖过总公司的规定，而且公司的门禁系统也不会再把你的正常公文包误认为危险物品而被警卫拦下。
body.en: Managing and launching different projects is now much more straightforward. By simply adding the `--project` or `--new-project` flags at startup, you can directly specify or create a project without worrying about which folder you are currently in. Config priorities are also smarter now: project-specific permission settings will reliably override global settings, ending the frustration of "I set it for this project but it's ignoring me." If you use the tool at a corporate office, Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) firewalls used to falsely block the system's encrypted connections causing endless disconnects; optimizations have now been restored so traffic passes smoothly through the firewall. Additionally, the system will no longer foolishly misinterpret your Makefile syntax inside code blocks as math formulas and mangle them. Like reporting to work at different branch offices: you can now just state the branch name to get straight to work, the local branch rules will properly override corporate headquarters' policies, and the building's security scanner will no longer mistake your everyday briefcase for contraband and block you at the door.
body.ja: 異なるプロジェクトの管理と起動がより直感的になった。起動時に `--project` や `--new-project` を付けるだけで、今どのフォルダにいるかを気にせず直接プロジェクトを指定・作成できる。設定ファイルの優先順位も賢くなり、プロジェクト専用の権限設定が確実にグローバル設定を上書きするようになったため、「プロジェクトごとに設定したのに無視される」というもどかしさが解消された。会社内で使用している場合、以前は企業のファイアウォールによるディープパケットインスペクション（DPI）がシステムの暗号化通信を誤遮断し、切断が相次いでいたが、今は最適化設定を取り戻し、通信がスムーズにファイアウォールを抜けられるようになった。また、システムがコードブロック内に書かれた Makefile の文法を数式だと勘違いして文字化けさせることもなくなった。別の支社に出勤する際、支社名を告げるだけで直接働き始められ、その支社の就業規則が本社の規定よりも優先して適用され、さらにビルのセキュリティゲートがあなたの普通の鞄を危険物と勘違いして足止めすることもなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 다른 프로젝트를 관리하고 시작하는 일이 훨씬 직접적이고 쉬워졌다. 프로그램을 켤 때 `--project`나 `--new-project`를 붙이기만 하면, 지금 어느 폴더에 있든 상관없이 바로 프로젝트를 지정하거나 새로 만들 수 있다. 설정 파일의 우선순위도 똑똑해져서, 이제 프로젝트 전용 권한 설정이 전체 설정보다 확실하게 앞서 적용되므로 '분명히 프로젝트 설정을 바꿨는데 왜 말을 안 듣지' 하는 답답함이 사라졌다. 회사에서 쓸 때 예전엔 기업 방화벽의 심층 패킷 분석(DPI)이 시스템의 암호화된 통신을 오해해 자꾸 연결을 끊었지만, 이제 최적화 설정을 되찾아 방화벽을 무사히 통과한다. 또한, 코드 블록 안에 적어둔 Makefile 문법을 수학 공식으로 착각해 제멋대로 망가뜨리는 일도 더는 없다. 다른 지사에 출근할 때, 이제 지사 이름만 대면 바로 일을 시작할 수 있고 그곳의 지사 규칙이 본사 규정을 확실히 덮어쓰며, 건물 검색대에서 평범한 서류 가방을 위험한 물건으로 오해해 경비원에게 막히는 일이 없어진 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added support for `--project` and `--new-project` launch flags to allow users to explicitly set or create projects, and updated the project resolution logic to default regardless of the active workspace.
Improved permission config merging priorities by ensuring project-specific configurations (located in `~/.gemini/config/projects/`) take precedence over global settings in `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json`.
Fixed an enterprise network connectivity issue by restoring AES-NI compile-time optimizations, which prevents Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) firewalls from incorrectly flagging and resetting TLS connections.
Fixed a rendering bug where Makefile syntax (like `$(call ...)`) inside code blocks was mistakenly parsed and mangled by LaTeX math expansion, by introducing a state machine that restricts expansion to prose segments.

entries: Added `ctrl+c` as an exit and interrupt key: the first press cancels active agent operations (like streaming responses), and a double-press triggers the exit flow. Also added a dynamic exit hint in the status line.
Fixed `ctrl+d` behavior to act as a forward-delete when the input prompt contains text, only triggering the exit flow when the prompt is empty.

Improved `/resume` loading performance by implementing a persistent metadata cache and parallel loader, eliminating severe latency with large conversation histories and preventing background loading log spam.

Added an expanded AltScreen view for tool confirmations (accessible via `ctrl+g`), allowing users to view and edit the full command and associated permissions in a dedicated full-screen view, replacing the inline edit (`e`) key.
Added the `AGY_CLI_CMD_OUTPUT_PERCENTAGE` environment variable, allowing users to customize the maximum height of command outputs in the TUI as a percentage of the terminal height.
Added strict key name validation to the keybindings system to reject invalid key names (like typos) and suggest canonical alternatives, preventing "dead keys" from being registered.

Added a validation warning when `ctrl+c` is mapped to a non-default action, clarifying that the system always intercepts `ctrl+c` to interrupt active operations or exit, and providing instructions on how to resolve the warning.
Improved command output rendering by making the output height dynamic, improving the readability of commands like `/keybindings`.
Improved text rendering with ANSI-aware word wrapping at word boundaries and prevented URLs containing hyphens from being incorrectly split across lines.

Improved the `/resume` experience: added support for pasting clipboard text into the search filter and rename fields, upgraded the rename input to a multiline editor to prevent long titles from being hidden, and fixed a bug where the navigation cursor could disappear.
Improved keybinding validation warning messages to use user-facing names (e.g., `cli.escape`) instead of internal representation names.

Improved startup behavior by only creating the `keybindings.json` configuration file when the user explicitly runs the `/keybindings` customization command, rather than automatically generating it on every startup.
Improved keybinding error presentation by replacing the persistent error footer with transient error alerts, freeing up valuable terminal space.
Fixed the `ctrl+c` exit safety valve to ensure it always works as an interrupt or exit key, regardless of how it is mapped in the user's custom keybindings configuration.

Fixed VCS commit tree rendering to reserve the `@` marker exclusively for the actual current commit in the VCS history rather than the synthetic "Working Copy" entry, helping users easily identify the working copy parent.
Fixed authentication error handling to gracefully handle unsigned-in states by returning an empty configuration and suppressing noisy error logs.

title.zh-TW: 快捷鍵與中斷操作更直覺，設定防呆不卡死
title.zh-CN: 快捷键与中断操作更直觉，设置防呆不死机
title.en: Intuitive shortcuts and interrupt operations with foolproof keybinding settings
title.ja: ショートカットと中断操作が直感的になり、設定のフリーズ防止機能を追加
title.ko: 단축키와 중단 조작이 더 직관적이고, 설정 시 실수로 먹통이 되는 것을 막아준다.

body.zh-TW: 現在鍵盤快捷鍵的行為更符合你的直覺了。按 ctrl+c 第一下會中斷代理正在做的事（例如打斷它還在碎碎唸的回覆），連按兩下則會退出程式，而且這是一道防死當的安全閥，就算你自己在設定裡把 ctrl+c 綁成別的功能，它依然會強制攔截以防你卡死，並會給你明確的修改建議。按 ctrl+d 時，如果你正在打字，它會正常把游標後面的字刪掉，只有在輸入框全空時才會退出程式，不會再因為想刪字就不小心關掉整個軟體了。自訂快捷鍵時，系統也變聰明了：如果你打錯按鍵名稱，它會直接挑錯並推薦正確寫法，不會再讓你設定出根本按不出來的「死鍵」；而且錯誤提示也會用人話（像是 cli.escape）告訴你，還改成彈出式警告，不再霸佔畫面底部的寶貴空間。就像搭電梯，以前你可能按了開門鍵結果電梯卻關機，或者設定保全時不小心把自己反鎖，現在不但緊急停止鈕絕對有效，設定時如果密碼格式不對也會當場糾正你。
body.zh-CN: 现在键盘快捷键的行为更符合你的直觉了。按 ctrl+c 第一下会中断代理正在做的事（例如打断它还在碎碎念的回复），连按两下则会退出程序，而且这是一道防死机的安全阀，就算你自己在设置里把 ctrl+c 绑成别的功能，它依然会强制拦截以防你卡死，并会给你明确的修改建议。按 ctrl+d 时，如果你正在打字，它会正常把游标后面的字删掉，只有在输入框全空时才会退出程序，不会再因为想删字就不小心关掉整个软件了。自定义快捷键时，系统也变聪明了：如果你打错按键名称，它会直接挑错并推荐正确写法，不会再让你设置出根本按不出来的「死键」；而且错误提示也会用人话（像是 cli.escape）告诉你，还改成弹出式警告，不再霸占画面底部的宝贵空间。就像搭电梯，以前你可能按了开门键结果电梯却关机，或者设置保全时不小心把自己反锁，现在不但紧急停止钮绝对有效，设置时如果密码格式不对也会当场纠正你。
body.en: Keyboard shortcuts now behave much more intuitively. Pressing ctrl+c once interrupts whatever the agent is currently doing (like stopping a rambling, streaming response), and pressing it twice exits the program. Furthermore, this acts as a fail-safe safety valve: even if you mapped ctrl+c to another function in your settings, the system forcibly intercepts it to prevent you from getting permanently locked up, offering clear suggestions on how to fix your config. When pressing ctrl+d while typing, it now correctly forward-deletes text, and only exits the app if the input box is completely empty — no more accidentally closing the whole program just because you tried to delete a typo. The custom keybinding system is also smarter now: if you misspell a key name, it will outright reject it and suggest the correct spelling, ensuring you don't register "dead keys" that can never be pressed; the error messages also use human-readable names (like cli.escape) and appear as transient alerts instead of permanently hogging valuable space at the bottom of the screen. Like riding an elevator: you used to press the "open door" button and the elevator might shut down, or you might accidentally lock yourself out while setting up the security system; now, the emergency stop button is guaranteed to work, and if you punch in the wrong passcode format, it corrects you on the spot.
body.ja: キーボードショートカットの挙動がより直感的になった。今後 ctrl+c を1回押すとエージェントが実行中の作業（長々と出力中の応答など）を中断し、2回連続で押すとプログラムを終了する。しかもこれはフリーズを防ぐ安全弁であり、自分で設定ファイルから ctrl+c に別の機能を割り当ててしまっていても、操作不能になるのを防ぐためシステムが強制的に割り込み、修正のヒントを出してくれる。文字入力中に ctrl+d を押した際は、入力欄が完全に空の時だけプログラムを終了し、文字があればカーソルの後ろの文字を削除する通常の挙動になったため、文字を消そうとしてうっかりソフト全体を閉じてしまう事故は起きない。ショートカットを自作する際もシステムが賢くなった。キーの名前を打ち間違えると直接弾いて正しい表記を提案してくれるため、物理的に押せない「死にキー」を設定してしまうことがなくなった。エラーメッセージも（内部名ではなく）分かりやすい名前（cli.escape など）で教えてくれ、画面下の貴重なスペースを占拠し続けるのではなくポップアップ警告に変わった。エレベーターに乗る際、以前は「開」ボタンを押したのに電源が落ちたり、セキュリティ設定中にうっかり自分を締め出したりしていたのが、今は非常停止ボタンが確実に効き、パスワードの形式を間違えてもその場で正してくれるようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 키보드 단축키가 훨씬 직관적으로 움직인다. ctrl+c를 한 번 누르면 에이전트가 하던 일(예를 들어 주저리주저리 떠드는 답변)을 끊고, 두 번 누르면 프로그램을 종료한다. 게다가 이는 먹통이 되는 것을 막는 안전장치라서, 당신이 직접 설정 파일에서 ctrl+c를 다른 기능으로 바꿔 놓았더라도 시스템이 강제로 가로채 멈춤을 막아주며 어떻게 고쳐야 할지 똑똑히 알려준다. 글자를 치는 도중 ctrl+d를 누르면 커서 뒤의 글자를 지워주며, 입력 칸이 완전히 비어 있을 때만 프로그램을 끝내므로 글자를 지우려다 실수로 소프트웨어 전체를 닫아버리는 일이 없어졌다. 단축키를 직접 설정할 때도 시스템이 똑똑해졌다. 키 이름을 잘못 치면 바로 짚어내고 올바른 표기법을 추천해 주어, 아예 누를 수 없는 '죽은 키'를 만들 일이 없다. 오류 안내도 내부 이름 대신 사람이 읽기 편한 이름(예: cli.escape)으로 알려주며, 화면 아래의 귀중한 공간을 차지하던 방식에서 팝업창으로 바뀌었다. 엘리베이터를 탔을 때 예전엔 열림 버튼을 누르면 엘리베이터가 꺼지거나 보안 설정을 하다 실수로 자신을 가둬버릴 수 있었지만, 이제는 비상정지 버튼이 무조건 작동하고 비밀번호 형식이 틀리면 그 자리에서 바로잡아 주는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added `ctrl+c` as an exit and interrupt key: the first press cancels active agent operations (like streaming responses), and a double-press triggers the exit flow. Also added a dynamic exit hint in the status line.
Fixed `ctrl+d` behavior to act as a forward-delete when the input prompt contains text, only triggering the exit flow when the prompt is empty.
Added strict key name validation to the keybindings system to reject invalid key names (like typos) and suggest canonical alternatives, preventing "dead keys" from being registered.
Added a validation warning when `ctrl+c` is mapped to a non-default action, clarifying that the system always intercepts `ctrl+c` to interrupt active operations or exit, and providing instructions on how to resolve the warning.
Improved keybinding error presentation by replacing the persistent error footer with transient error alerts, freeing up valuable terminal space.
Improved keybinding validation warning messages to use user-facing names (e.g., `cli.escape`) instead of internal representation names.
Improved startup behavior by only creating the `keybindings.json` configuration file when the user explicitly runs the `/keybindings` customization command, rather than automatically generating it on every startup.
Fixed the `ctrl+c` exit safety valve to ensure it always works as an interrupt or exit key, regardless of how it is mapped in the user's custom keybindings configuration.

title.zh-TW: 歷史對話載入神速，搜尋與改名更順利
title.zh-CN: 历史对话载入神速，搜寻与改名更顺利
title.en: Blazing fast history loading with improved search and rename features
title.ja: 履歴の読み込みが爆速になり、検索や名前変更もスムーズに
title.ko: 대화 기록을 눈 깜짝할 새 불러오고, 검색과 이름 바꾸기가 편해졌다.

body.zh-TW: 你現在打開 /resume 查看歷史對話時會發現順暢無比。以前如果你的歷史紀錄太多，打開這個畫面會卡很久，背後還會狂印載入日誌；現在系統加了快取機制和同步載入，點開瞬間就能看到清單。在這畫面裡搜尋或改名時，現在終於支援直接從剪貼簿貼上文字了。幫對話改名時，輸入框也升級成可以多行顯示的版本，再長的名字都不會被卡掉一半，而且選單游標也不會再莫名其妙消失了。就像去圖書館找書，以前圖書館員要一本本翻找還會一直碎碎唸，現在有了最新的電子目錄，一秒就能找到，而且要幫借閱清單加備註時，終於可以直接貼上整段字，不會再被限制只能打一行字了。
body.zh-CN: 你现在打开 /resume 查看历史对话时会发现顺畅无比。以前如果你的历史纪录太多，打开这个画面会卡很久，背后还会狂印载入日志；现在系统加了快取机制和同步载入，点开瞬间就能看到清单。在这画面里搜寻或改名时，现在终于支持直接从剪贴板贴上文字了。帮对话改名时，输入框也升级成可以多行显示的版本，再长的名字都不会被卡掉一半，而且菜单游标也不会再莫名其妙消失了。就像去图书馆找书，以前图书馆员要一本本翻找还会一直碎碎念，现在有了最新的电子目录，一秒就能找到，而且要帮借阅清单加备注时，终于可以直接贴上整段字，不会再被限制只能打一行字了。
body.en: Opening /resume to view your conversation history is now blazingly fast and smooth. Previously, if you had a massive chat history, loading this screen would freeze for a long time while spamming loading logs in the background; now, thanks to a new caching mechanism and parallel loader, the list pops up instantly. When searching or renaming conversations in this view, you can finally paste text directly from your clipboard. The rename input box has also been upgraded to a multiline editor, so long titles won't get chopped off halfway, and the menu cursor will no longer mysteriously vanish. Like searching for a book at the library: the librarian used to flip through cards one by one while mumbling non-stop, but now there's an electronic catalog that finds it in a second, and when you want to add a note to your reading list, you can finally paste an entire paragraph instead of being restricted to a single line.
body.ja: 今後 /resume を開いて過去の会話を確認する際、驚くほどスムーズになったことに気づくだろう。以前は履歴が多すぎると、この画面を開くのに長い時間フリーズし、裏で大量の読み込みログが垂れ流されていたが、キャッシュ機能と並列読み込みの導入により、開いた瞬間に一覧が表示されるようになった。この画面での検索や名前変更の際、ようやくクリップボードからのテキスト貼り付けに対応した。名前を変更する際の入力枠も複数行表示にアップグレードされたため、長い名前が途中で切れて見えなくなることがなくなり、選択カーソルが謎に消えるバグも直った。図書館で本を探す際、以前は司書が一冊一冊探しながらずっとブツブツ文句を言っていたのが、最新の電子カタログのおかげで1秒で見つかるようになり、貸出リストにメモを書き込む際もようやくコピーした長文を直接貼り付けられるようになり、1行しか書けない制限から解放されたようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 /resume를 열어 과거 대화를 볼 때 엄청나게 부드러워진 것을 느낄 수 있다. 예전엔 대화 기록이 너무 많으면 화면을 여는 데 한참 동안 멈춰 있고 뒤에서는 로딩 로그를 쏟아냈지만, 이제 캐시(cache) 기능과 동시 불러오기가 들어가 누르는 순간 바로 목록이 뜬다. 이 화면에서 검색하거나 이름을 바꿀 때, 드디어 클립보드에 복사해 둔 글자를 바로 붙여넣을 수 있게 되었다. 대화 이름을 바꿀 때 입력 칸도 여러 줄을 보여주도록 업그레이드되어 이름이 길어도 중간에 잘리지 않으며, 메뉴 커서가 뜬금없이 사라지던 일도 없어졌다. 도서관에 책을 찾으러 갔을 때, 예전엔 사서가 책을 하나하나 뒤지며 계속 혼잣말을 했지만 이제는 최신 전자 목록으로 1초 만에 찾을 수 있고, 대출 목록에 메모를 남길 때도 드디어 문단을 통째로 붙여넣을 수 있게 되어 한 줄만 써야 하는 제약에서 벗어난 것과 같다.

items.original:
Improved `/resume` loading performance by implementing a persistent metadata cache and parallel loader, eliminating severe latency with large conversation histories and preventing background loading log spam.
Improved the `/resume` experience: added support for pasting clipboard text into the search filter and rename fields, upgraded the rename input to a multiline editor to prevent long titles from being hidden, and fixed a bug where the navigation cursor could disappear.

title.zh-TW: 排版更漂亮，全螢幕審查指令與更清晰的版本紀錄
title.zh-CN: 排版更漂亮，全屏审查指令与更清晰的版本纪录
title.en: Better formatting, full-screen command review, and clearer version history
title.ja: レイアウトが美しくなり、全画面でのコマンド審査と分かりやすいバージョン履歴に対応
title.ko: 배치가 더 예뻐지고, 전체 화면으로 명령어를 살펴볼 수 있으며 버전 기록이 더 뚜렷해졌다.

body.zh-TW: 現在終端機裡的文字與畫面排版更友善了。當系統跳出工具確認對話框問你要不要執行指令時，你可以按 ctrl+g 切換到全螢幕模式，舒舒服服地查看並編輯完整指令和權限，不再只能擠在原本小小的單行修改框裡。指令輸出的高度現在會自動調整，你甚至可以用 AGY_CLI_CMD_OUTPUT_PERCENTAGE 這個環境變數（設定程式環境的參數）來控制它最多能佔畫面的幾成。文字排版時也不會再發生「網址裡有連字號就被硬生生切成兩半」的糗事。在看版本控制（VCS，像是 Git 紀錄）的樹狀圖時，代表當前位置的 `@` 符號現在會精準標示在你真正所在的版本上，不會再跑去標記「還沒存檔的工作區」，讓你一眼看出自己到底在哪裡。就像看電影時，以前字幕遇到長網址會被隨便切斷，重點片段只能在小視窗看，現在不但字幕排版完美，遇到重要確認還能一鍵放大到全螢幕看個仔細。
body.zh-CN: 现在终端机里的文字与画面排版更友善了。当系统跳出工具确认对话框问你要不要执行指令时，你可以按 ctrl+g 切换到全屏模式，舒舒服服地查看并编辑完整指令和权限，不再只能挤在原本小小的单行修改框里。指令输出的高度现在会自动调整，你甚至可以用 AGY_CLI_CMD_OUTPUT_PERCENTAGE 这个环境变量（设置程序环境的参数）来控制它最多能占画面的几成。文字排版时也不会再发生「网址里有连字号就被硬生生切成两半」的糗事。在看版本控制（VCS，像是 Git 纪录）的树状图时，代表当前位置的 `@` 符号现在会精准标示在你真正所在的版本上，不会再跑去标记「还没存档的工作区」，让你一眼看出自己到底在哪里。就像看电影时，以前字幕遇到长网址会被随便切断，重点片段只能在小窗口看，现在不但字幕排版完美，遇到重要确认还能一键放大到全屏看个仔细。
body.en: The text and layout in the terminal are now much friendlier. When the tool confirmation dialog pops up asking if you want to run a command, you can press ctrl+g to switch to a full-screen view, allowing you to comfortably inspect and edit the entire command and its permissions rather than cramming into a tiny single-line box. Command output heights now adjust dynamically, and you can even set a maximum terminal height percentage using the AGY_CLI_CMD_OUTPUT_PERCENTAGE environment variable (a parameter used to configure the program's environment). Text formatting has also been improved to stop awkwardly splitting URLs in half just because they contain a hyphen. When viewing the version control system (VCS, like Git) tree history, the `@` marker representing your current position now accurately highlights your actual committed state, rather than pointing to the uncommitted "Working Copy", letting you see exactly where you stand. Like watching a movie: the subtitles used to awkwardly chop long URLs in half, and crucial scenes were forced into a tiny window; now the subtitles are perfectly formatted, and you can instantly expand important prompts to full-screen to read every detail clearly.
body.ja: 端末内のテキストや画面のレイアウトがより親切になった。システムがツールの確認ダイアログを出してコマンドを実行するかどうか尋ねてきた際、ctrl+g を押すと全画面モードに切り替わり、小さな一行だけの修正枠に窮屈に収まることなく、コマンドの全体像と権限を快適に確認・編集できるようになった。コマンドの出力の高さは自動で調整されるようになり、AGY_CLI_CMD_OUTPUT_PERCENTAGE という環境変数（プログラムの動作環境を決めるパラメータ）を使えば、画面の何割まで占有してよいかを自分で指定できる。テキストの折り返しも改善され、ハイフンが含まれているというだけで URL が真っ二つに切られるような無様な事態は起きなくなった。また、バージョン管理（VCS、Git など）のツリー図を見る際、現在の位置を示す `@` マークが未保存の「作業領域」ではなく、あなたが実際にいるコミットに正確に付くようになったため、今自分がどこにいるのか一目で分かる。映画を見る際、以前は字幕に長い URL が出ると適当にぶつ切りにされ、重要なシーンも小窓でしか見られなかったのが、今は字幕のレイアウトが完璧になり、重要な確認画面はボタン一つで全画面に拡大してじっくり見られるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 터미널 화면의 글자와 배치 모양새가 훨씬 친절해졌다. 시스템이 도구 확인 창을 띄워 명령어를 실행할지 물어볼 때, 이제 ctrl+g를 눌러 전체 화면 모드로 바꾸면 조그만 한 줄짜리 수정 칸에 억지로 욱여넣을 필요 없이 편안하게 전체 명령어와 권한을 살펴보고 고칠 수 있다. 명령어 출력 칸의 높이도 알아서 조절되며, AGY_CLI_CMD_OUTPUT_PERCENTAGE라는 환경 변수(프로그램 환경을 설정하는 변수)를 쓰면 출력이 화면의 몇 퍼센트까지 차지할지 직접 정할 수도 있다. 글자를 줄바꿈할 때 인터넷 주소 안에 하이픈(-)이 있다고 해서 주소를 얄밉게 반 토막 내는 일도 없어졌다. 버전 관리(VCS, Git 등) 기록의 나무 구조를 볼 때 현재 위치를 나타내는 `@` 기호가 이제 '아직 저장 안 한 작업 구역'을 가리키지 않고 당신이 진짜 서 있는 버전에 정확히 찍혀, 내가 어디에 있는지 한눈에 알 수 있다. 영화를 볼 때 예전엔 자막에 긴 주소가 나오면 아무 데서나 뚝 끊기고 중요한 장면도 조그만 창으로만 봐야 했다면, 이제는 자막 배치도 완벽하고 중요한 확인 사항이 생기면 버튼 한 번에 전체 화면으로 키워 꼼꼼히 살펴볼 수 있게 된 셈이다.

items.original:
Added an expanded AltScreen view for tool confirmations (accessible via `ctrl+g`), allowing users to view and edit the full command and associated permissions in a dedicated full-screen view, replacing the inline edit (`e`) key.
Added the `AGY_CLI_CMD_OUTPUT_PERCENTAGE` environment variable, allowing users to customize the maximum height of command outputs in the TUI as a percentage of the terminal height.
Improved command output rendering by making the output height dynamic, improving the readability of commands like `/keybindings`.
Improved text rendering with ANSI-aware word wrapping at word boundaries and prevented URLs containing hyphens from being incorrectly split across lines.
Fixed VCS commit tree rendering to reserve the `@` marker exclusively for the actual current commit in the VCS history rather than the synthetic "Working Copy" entry, helping users easily identify the working copy parent.
Fixed authentication error handling to gracefully handle unsigned-in states by returning an empty configuration and suppressing noisy error logs.

entries: Improved compatibility with a broader set of ARM64 devices (e.g. raspberry pi 4b).
Added `antigravity_guide` builtin skill to provide instant, in-context reference guides for the Antigravity 2.0, CLI, IDE, and SDK.
Improved commit history navigation: scrolling now immediately loads and displays changed files and diffs.
Improved Git integration by enabling ASCII node graphs (`git log --graph`) for visual parity with hg/jj.
Improved commit hash matching to seamlessly resolve short (6-char) to long (64-char) hashes via prefix comparison.
Added alert message type for system errors/warnings, separating them from standard command output.
Added the CLI log file path to the `/help` menu for easy troubleshooting.
Improved markdown rendering by upgrading `glamour` to v2.0.1 for cleaner headings and block padding.
Improved authentication to automatically launch browser sign-in via `rundll32`.
Fixed a bug where "ask" permissions were dropped during settings updates, ensuring `settings.json` preservation.
Fixed permission engine matching bugs by escaping regex metacharacters (like `$` or `.`) in saved rules, preventing infinite prompt loops.
Fixed environment flag parsing to prevent ignored disablement flags.
Fixed bash mode argument escaping (preventing swallowed stdout) and defaulted shell resolution to PowerShell.

title.zh-TW: 內建萬事通導遊，排版與警告訊息更清楚
title.zh-CN: 内建万事通导游，排版与警告消息更清楚
title.en: Built-in guide skill with cleaner markdown and explicit alert messages
title.ja: 万能ガイドの組み込み、レイアウトと警告メッセージの明確化
title.ko: 만능 가이드 내장, 더 깔끔해진 배치와 경고 메시지

body.zh-TW: 現在系統裡多了一個叫 antigravity_guide 的內建技能，就像是個隨傳隨到的導遊，當你對 CLI 終端機介面、IDE 或 SDK 有任何疑問時，它可以立刻為你翻找說明書並提供解答。畫面排版也升級了，文件裡的標題和段落間距現在變得更乾淨整齊；系統出錯或給警告時，也會改用專門的「警告訊息」樣式跳出來，不會再跟普通的指令輸出混在一起。如果遇到問題想除錯，/help 選單裡也直接列出了日誌檔（log）的存放位置，不用再自己瞎找了。就像你去博物館，以前只能自己看破舊的解說牌，現在不但拿到了一本排版精美的新導覽手冊，還配了一個專屬解說員，而且緊急廣播也不會再被一般的背景音樂蓋過了。
body.zh-CN: 现在系统里多了一个叫 antigravity_guide 的内建技能，就像是个随传随到的导游，当你对 CLI 终端界面、IDE 或 SDK 有任何疑问时，它可以立刻为你翻找说明书并提供解答。画面排版也升级了，文件里的标题和段落间距现在变得更干净整齐；系统出错或给警告时，也会改用专门的「警告消息」样式跳出来，不会再跟普通的指令输出混在一起。如果遇到问题想除错，/help 菜单里也直接列出了日志档（log）的存放位置，不用再自己瞎找了。就像你去博物馆，以前只能自己看破旧的解说牌，现在不但拿到了一本排版精美的新导览手册，还配了一个专属解说员，而且紧急广播也不会再被一般的背景音乐盖过了。
body.en: There is now a built-in skill called antigravity_guide acting as your personal on-call tour guide; whenever you have questions about the CLI, IDE, or SDK, it can instantly dig through the manuals to provide answers. The layout has also been upgraded: headings and paragraph spacing in documents are much cleaner now. When the system encounters errors or warnings, it now uses a dedicated "alert message" style to pop up, ensuring they no longer blend in with standard command output. If you run into issues and need to troubleshoot, the /help menu now explicitly lists the exact path to your log files so you don't have to hunt them down. Like visiting a museum: you used to have to read tattered old signs by yourself, but now you not only get a beautifully typeset new guidebook, you also get a dedicated human guide, and emergency announcements are no longer drowned out by the background music.
body.ja: システム内に antigravity_guide という内蔵スキルが追加され、いつでも呼べる専属ガイドのように、CLI 端末、IDE、SDK についての疑問があれば即座にマニュアルをめくって答えてくれるようになった。画面のレイアウトもアップグレードされ、文書の見出しや段落の余白がより綺麗に整えられた。システムがエラーや警告を出す際も、専用の「警告メッセージ」スタイルで表示されるようになり、普通のコマンド出力に紛れ込むことはなくなった。問題が起きて原因を探りたい場合も、/help メニューの中にログファイルの保存場所が直接明記されたため、自力で探し回る必要はない。博物館に行く際、以前はボロボロの解説板を自分で読むしかなかったのが、今は綺麗にレイアウトされた新しいガイドブックをもらえたうえに専属の案内人が付き、緊急放送が普通のBGMに掻き消されることもなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 시스템 안에 antigravity_guide라는 내장 기술이 생겼다. 언제든 부를 수 있는 가이드처럼 CLI 터미널 창이나 IDE, SDK에 대해 궁금한 점이 생기면 곧바로 설명서를 뒤져 답을 찾아준다. 화면 배치도 업그레이드되어 문서의 제목이나 문단 사이 간격이 훨씬 깔끔하고 보기 좋아졌다. 시스템에 오류가 나거나 경고를 할 때도 전용 '경고 메시지' 모양으로 튀어나와서 더 이상 평범한 명령어 출력과 섞여 헷갈리지 않는다. 문제가 생겨 원인을 찾고 싶을 때도 /help 메뉴에 로그 파일이 어디 있는지 대놓고 적혀 있어 더는 헤매지 않아도 된다. 박물관에 갔을 때, 예전엔 낡은 설명판을 혼자 읽어야 했지만 이제는 배치가 아름다운 새 안내 책자를 받고 전담 해설사까지 생겼으며, 긴급 방송이 일반 배경 음악에 묻히는 일도 없어진 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added `antigravity_guide` builtin skill to provide instant, in-context reference guides for the Antigravity 2.0, CLI, IDE, and SDK.
Improved markdown rendering by upgrading `glamour` to v2.0.1 for cleaner headings and block padding.
Added alert message type for system errors/warnings, separating them from standard command output.
Added the CLI log file path to the `/help` menu for easy troubleshooting.

title.zh-TW: 瀏覽 Git 歷史更順利，看圖認版本不再卡卡
title.zh-CN: 浏览 Git 历史更顺利，看图认版本不再卡卡
title.en: Smoother Git history browsing with visual graphs and smart hash resolution
title.ja: Git 履歴の閲覧がスムーズになり、ツリー図表示と短いハッシュでの特定に対応
title.ko: Git 기록 보기가 훨씬 매끄러워지고, 그림으로 버전을 확인하며 짧은 이름도 잘 알아본다.

body.zh-TW: 在終端機裡看程式碼的版本歷史變得更舒服了。以前看 Git 歷史時只有純文字列表，現在它會畫出漂亮的 ASCII 樹狀圖（就是用線條畫出分支合流的圖），讓你一眼看懂版本的來龍去脈。當你捲動歷史紀錄時，旁邊會立刻載入並秀出這個版本改了哪些檔案、改了什麼內容，不用再另外點開。而且系統現在變聰明了，就算你只給它前 6 碼的短版本代號（hash），它也能瞬間認出你指的是哪個長達 64 碼的完整版本。就像看家族族譜，以前只有一堆寫著名字的抽屜，現在不但畫出了清晰的血脈關聯圖，而且你只要拉開抽屜，裡面的人的身世背景就會立刻攤開給你看，就算你只喊他們的小名也能準確找到人。
body.zh-CN: 在终端机里看代码的版本历史变得更舒服了。以前看 Git 历史时只有纯文本列表，现在它会画出漂亮的 ASCII 树状图（就是用线条画出分支合流的图），让你一眼看懂版本的来龙去脉。当你滚动历史纪录时，旁边会立刻载入并秀出这个版本改了哪些文件、改了什么内容，不用再另外点开。而且系统现在变聪明了，就算你只给它前 6 码的短版本代号（hash），它也能瞬间认出你指的是哪个长达 64 码的完整版本。就像看家族族谱，以前只有一堆写着名字的抽屉，现在不但画出了清晰的血脉关联图，而且你只要拉开抽屉，里面的人的身世背景就会立刻摊开给你看，就算你只喊他们的小名也能准确找到人。
body.en: Browsing code version history in the terminal is now a much more pleasant experience. Previously, viewing Git history just gave you a plain text list; now, it draws beautiful ASCII node graphs (using lines to show branching and merging), letting you understand the flow of versions at a glance. As you scroll through the history, the side panel immediately loads and displays exactly which files were changed and what the diffs are, without requiring extra clicks to open them. Moreover, the system is smarter now: even if you only give it a short 6-character version hash, it instantly resolves it to the full 64-character version you meant. Like looking through a family tree: instead of just staring at a wall of drawers with names, you now get a clear diagram of bloodlines, and simply pulling a drawer instantly reveals that person's entire life story right beside it — and you can accurately find anyone just by calling out their nickname.
body.ja: 端末内でのコードのバージョン履歴確認がより快適になった。以前 Git 履歴を見る際はただのテキストの羅列だったが、今は綺麗な ASCII ツリー図（分岐や合流を線で描いた図）を描画するようになり、バージョンの経緯が一目で分かるようになった。履歴をスクロールすると、そのバージョンでどのファイルがどう書き換えられたかの差分がすぐ横に読み込まれて表示され、わざわざ別の画面を開く必要がない。さらにシステムが賢くなり、最初の 6 文字だけの短いバージョン代号（ハッシュ）を渡しても、瞬時にそれがどの 64 文字のフルバージョンを指しているかを特定できるようになった。家系図を見る際、以前は名前の書かれた引き出しが並んでいるだけだったのが、今は明確な血縁関係の図が描かれ、引き出しを引けばその人の生い立ちが横にすぐ広げて見られるようになり、あだ名で呼んだだけでも誰のことか正確に探し出せるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 터미널에서 코드 버전 기록을 보기가 훨씬 편해졌다. 예전엔 Git 기록을 볼 때 그냥 글자만 주르륵 나왔지만, 이제는 예쁜 ASCII 트리 그림(선을 그어 갈라지고 합쳐지는 모습을 보여주는 그림)을 그려주어 버전의 앞뒤 맥락을 한눈에 알 수 있다. 기록을 아래위로 넘길 때마다 그 버전에서 어떤 파일을 어떻게 고쳤는지 차이점을 바로바로 불러와 옆에 보여주므로 따로 눌러서 열어볼 필요가 없다. 게다가 시스템이 똑똑해져서, 앞 6자리짜리 짧은 버전 이름(해시)만 알려줘도 길이가 64자리나 되는 원래 버전이 무엇인지 곧바로 알아챈다. 집안의 족보를 볼 때 예전엔 이름만 적힌 서랍장만 덩그러니 놓여 있었다면, 이제는 핏줄이 어떻게 이어지는지 그림으로 또렷하게 보여주고 서랍을 열기만 하면 그 사람의 살아온 내력이 바로 펼쳐지며, 별명만 불러도 누구인지 찰떡같이 찾아내는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Improved commit history navigation: scrolling now immediately loads and displays changed files and diffs.
Improved Git integration by enabling ASCII node graphs (`git log --graph`) for visual parity with hg/jj.
Improved commit hash matching to seamlessly resolve short (6-char) to long (64-char) hashes via prefix comparison.

title.zh-TW: 解決權限鬼打牆與 Windows 登入卡關問題
title.zh-CN: 解决权限鬼打墙与 Windows 登录卡关问题
title.en: Fixes infinite permission loops and Windows login hurdles
title.ja: 権限確認の無限ループと Windows でのログイン失敗問題を解消
title.ko: 권한 확인이 무한히 맴도는 문제와 Windows 로그인 막힘 현상 해결

body.zh-TW: 已同意的指令不會再反覆跳權限詢問。以前你明明同意了某個指令權限，但因為系統沒把指令裡的特殊符號（像 $ 或 .）當作普通文字處理，導致它一直認不出你同意過，不停跳出警告鬼打牆；現在這些符號都會被正確辨識了，而且你在設定裡選了「每次都要問」的權限也不會在更新設定檔時被偷偷刪掉。對於 Windows 使用者，現在需要登入時，系統會自動幫你順利叫出瀏覽器畫面，不用再手動複製網址；在執行指令時也不會再遇到因為符號沒處理好導致輸出被默默吞掉的狀況，預設也會改用 PowerShell 來執行了。另外，這次也改善了對 ARM64 設備（像是樹莓派 Raspberry Pi 4B）的相容性。就像去銀行辦事，以前你明明蓋了章，行員卻因為你的印章花紋太複雜而一直叫你重蓋，現在機器終於換新了，不但能精準辨識印章，甚至幫你把本來卡住的號碼牌機也修好了。
body.zh-CN: 已同意的指令不会再反复跳权限询问。以前你明明同意了某个指令权限，但因为系统没把指令里的特殊符号（像 $ 或 .）当作普通文字处理，导致它一直认不出你同意过，不停跳出警告鬼打墙；现在这些符号都会被正确辨识了，而且你在设置里选了「每次都要问」的权限也不会在更新配置文件时被偷偷删掉。对于 Windows 用户，现在需要登录时，系统会自动帮你顺利叫出浏览器画面，不用再手动复制网址；在执行指令时也不会再遇到因为符号没处理好导致输出被默默吞掉的状况，默认也会改用 PowerShell 来执行了。另外，这次也改善了对 ARM64 设备（像是树莓派 Raspberry Pi 4B）的相容性。就像去银行办事，以前你明明盖了章，行员却因为你的印章花纹太复杂而一直叫你重盖，现在机器终于换新了，不但能精准辨识印章，甚至帮你把本来卡住的号码牌机也修好了。
body.en: Several blood-pressure-raising system issues have been ironed out. Previously, even if you explicitly approved a command's permission, the system would fail to treat special characters (like $ or .) as plain text, constantly failing to recognize your approval and trapping you in an endless loop of permission prompts; these characters are now correctly escaped, and permissions marked "ask" won't secretly get deleted when your settings file updates. For Windows users, when authentication is required, the system now automatically and smoothly pops open your browser, saving you from manually copying URLs. Also, command outputs on Windows will no longer be silently swallowed due to poor argument escaping, and PowerShell is now the default shell. Finally, compatibility with ARM64 devices (like the Raspberry Pi 4B) has been improved. Like dealing with bank paperwork: you used to clearly stamp your seal, but the clerk kept making you re-stamp it because the pattern was "too complex"; now they've upgraded their scanner to recognize it perfectly, and they even fixed the broken queue ticket machine while they were at it.
body.ja: ユーザーの血圧を上げるようなシステムの不具合をいくつか直した。以前は、あるコマンドの権限を許可したにもかかわらず、システムがコマンド内の特殊記号（$ や . など）をただの文字として扱えなかったせいで、許可したことをいつまでも認識できず、無限に警告を出し続けることがあった。今はこれらの記号が正しく認識され、設定で「毎回確認する（ask）」にした権限が設定更新時にこっそり消されるバグも直った。Windows ユーザーにとっては、ログインが必要な際に手動で URL をコピーしなくてもシステムが自動でブラウザを立ち上げてくれるようになった。コマンド実行時に引数の記号処理のせいで出力が黙って握り潰されることもなくなり、デフォルトで PowerShell を使うように変更された。さらに、ARM64 デバイス（Raspberry Pi 4B など）との互換性も向上した。銀行での手続きの際、以前はきちんとハンコを押したのに、模様が複雑すぎるという理由で行員に何度も押し直しをさせられていたのが、今は機械が新しくなって正確に印鑑を読み取れるようになり、おまけに壊れていた整理券の発券機まで直してくれたようなものである。
body.ko: 사람 뒷목 잡게 만들던 시스템 문제 몇 가지를 고쳤다. 예전엔 당신이 어떤 명령어의 권한을 분명히 허락했는데도, 시스템이 명령어 안에 든 특수 기호($나 . 같은 것)를 평범한 글자로 다루지 못한 탓에 허락받은 줄도 모르고 끝없이 경고 창을 띄우며 맴돌았다. 이제 이런 기호들을 제대로 알아채며, 설정에서 '매번 묻기'로 해둔 권한이 설정 파일을 업데이트할 때 몰래 지워지는 일도 없다. Windows 사용자의 경우, 이제 로그인이 필요할 때 시스템이 알아서 브라우저 창을 띄워주므로 인터넷 주소를 일일이 복사할 필요가 없다. 명령어를 칠 때 기호 처리를 잘못해서 출력 내용이 소리 없이 먹혀버리는 문제도 사라졌고, 기본 셸도 PowerShell을 쓰도록 바뀌었다. 또한 ARM64 기기(라즈베리파이 4B 등)와의 호환성도 좋아졌다. 은행에 일을 보러 갔을 때, 예전엔 도장을 제대로 찍었는데도 도장 무늬가 복잡하다며 직원이 계속 다시 찍으라고 우기더니, 이제는 기계가 새 걸로 바뀌어 도장을 찰떡같이 알아보고 내친김에 고장 났던 번호표 기계까지 싹 고쳐놓은 것과 같다.

items.original:
Improved compatibility with a broader set of ARM64 devices (e.g. raspberry pi 4b).
Improved authentication to automatically launch browser sign-in via `rundll32`.
Fixed a bug where "ask" permissions were dropped during settings updates, ensuring `settings.json` preservation.
Fixed permission engine matching bugs by escaping regex metacharacters (like `$` or `.`) in saved rules, preventing infinite prompt loops.
Fixed environment flag parsing to prevent ignored disablement flags.
Fixed bash mode argument escaping (preventing swallowed stdout) and defaulted shell resolution to PowerShell.

entries: Added submodule support for plugins installation. External plugin installation now automatically resolves and initializes Git submodules.
Optimized customizations permissions: Automatically grants read-only access to the builtin customizations directory, eliminating redundant permission prompts on startup.
Improved glamour parser error handling (like nested checkboxes inside list emphasis) and preventing it from crashing the TUI, falling back to raw text with a warning banner.

Updated bubbletea to v2.0.7: Resolves a potential TUI panic when terminal input is unavailable, fixes a data race in mouse handling within the Cursed Renderer, and corrects mouse release behavior under the Kitty Keyboard protocol.

Hardened command execution permission checks by enforcing strict exact-match verification for PowerShell scripts, complex shell redirections ( `>` , `2>&1` ), and unparseable strings to prevent sandbox escapes.
Hardened sandbox execution by adding `.git` to the core list of dangerous paths, preventing unauthorized or destructive repository modifications.
Fixed a bug where allowlisted terminal commands with quoted arguments (e.g., `python -c "print(1)"`) would silently fail to match at runtime due to flawed whitespace tokenization.

Fixed a bug in headless print mode resumption (`--conversation`/`-c` `-p ...`) where the CLI would dump the entire historical conversation transcript instead of only printing the newly generated response.
Fixed a CPU compatibility issue on ARM64 devices without AES hardware support.

title.zh-TW: 介面更穩不崩潰，無頭模式不再洗畫面，外掛安裝更自動
title.zh-CN: 界面更稳不崩溃，无头模式不再洗画面，插件安装更自动
title.en: TUI won't crash on bad formatting, headless mode stops spamming history, and plugins auto-fetch submodules
title.ja: 画面がフリーズしにくくなり、ヘッドレスモードの余計な出力が消え、プラグインのインストールも全自動に
title.ko: 화면이 멈추지 않고, 화면 없는 모드에서 기록을 도배하지 않으며, 플러그인 설치가 알아서 진행된다.

body.zh-TW: 終端機介面（TUI）現在變得更強韌了。以前如果畫面要渲染的格式太複雜（像是清單裡面又包了打勾方塊），程式可能會直接崩潰死當；現在它懂得出錯時退回顯示純文字並給你警告，不會整台罷工。滑鼠操作與鍵盤協定的底層引擎也升級了，修好了許多可能導致畫面當機的隱患。如果你在純文字的無頭模式（headless mode，不跳出互動視窗直接執行）下接續之前的對話，系統現在只會印出最新的回覆，不會再把你過去聊過的幾百行歷史紀錄全部印出來洗畫面。此外，現在安裝外部外掛（plugin）時，系統會自動幫你抓齊底下包含的 Git 子模組（submodule），不需要你手動去設定；而且系統啟動時也不會再囉嗦地問你「能不能讀取內建的設定檔目錄」了。對了，這次也修復了某些沒有 AES 硬體加速的 ARM 設備的相容問題。就像買家具，以前買組合包還要自己去配螺絲，現在全套幫你配好，而且說明書要是印錯了，也不會害你整櫃子組到一半垮掉。
body.zh-CN: 终端机界面（TUI）现在变得更强韧了。以前如果画面要渲染的格式太复杂（像是清单里面又包了打勾方块），程序可能会直接崩溃死机；现在它懂得出错时退回显示纯文字并给你警告，不会整台罢工。鼠标操作与键盘协议的底层引擎也升级了，修好了许多可能导致画面死机的隐患。如果你在纯文本的无头模式（headless mode，不跳出互动窗口直接执行）下接续之前的对话，系统现在只会印出最新的回复，不会再把你过去聊过的几百行历史纪录全部印出来洗画面。此外，现在安装外部插件（plugin）时，系统会自动帮你抓齐底下包含的 Git 子模块（submodule），不需要你手动去设置；而且系统启动时也不会再啰嗦地问你「能不能读取内建的配置文件目录」了。对了，这次也修复了某些没有 AES 硬件加速的 ARM 设备的相容问题。就像买家具，以前买组合包还要自己去配螺丝，现在全套帮你配好，而且说明书要是印错了，也不会害你整柜子组到一半垮掉。
body.en: The terminal user interface (TUI) is now much more robust. Previously, if the text formatting was too complex (like checkboxes nested inside lists), the program could outright crash; now, it gracefully falls back to plain text with a warning banner instead of giving up completely. The underlying engine handling mouse and keyboard protocols has also been upgraded, fixing several data races and bugs that could cause panics. If you continue an existing conversation in headless mode (running in pure text without interactive windows), the system will now only print the newest response, instead of spamming your screen with hundreds of lines of historical chat logs. Furthermore, when installing external plugins, the system automatically fetches and initializes any included Git submodules, saving you the manual work; and it no longer redundantly begs for permission to read its own built-in settings directory on startup. Lastly, a compatibility issue on ARM devices lacking AES hardware acceleration has been fixed. Like buying flat-pack furniture: you used to have to go buy the screws separately, but now everything comes in one box, and if the instructions have a typo, it won't cause the whole cabinet to collapse halfway through assembly.
body.ja: 端末のインターフェース（TUI）がさらに頑丈になった。以前は描画する書式が複雑すぎる（リストの中にチェックボックスが入れ子になっているなど）とプログラムがそのままクラッシュして死んでいたが、今はエラー時に警告を添えたプレーンテキスト表示に切り替え、ストライキを起こさなくなった。マウス操作やキーボード規約の基盤エンジンも更新され、フリーズの原因となっていた潜伏バグが多数修正された。また、文字だけのヘッドレスモード（インタラクティブな画面を出さずに直接実行するモード）で過去の会話の続きを実行した際、以前は過去に交わした数百行のやり取りまで全部吐き出して画面を埋め尽くしていたが、今は最新の回答だけを印字するようになった。さらに、外部プラグインをインストールする際、システムがその中に含まれる Git サブモジュール（submodule）も自動で全て引っ張ってきてくれるようになり、手作業での設定が不要になった。起動時に「内蔵の設定ディレクトリを読み込んでもよいか」といちいち聞いてくる面倒もなくなった。ちなみに、AES ハードウェア支援がない一部の ARM 機器の互換性問題も修正されている。家具を買った際、以前は部品のネジを自分で買いに行かされたのが今は全部セットで付いてくるようになり、もし説明書に誤植があっても、そのせいで組み立て中の棚が全壊したりはしなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 터미널 화면(TUI)이 훨씬 튼튼해졌다. 예전엔 화면에 그려야 할 형식이 너무 복잡하면(예: 목록 안에 체크박스가 또 들어간 경우) 프로그램이 그대로 뻗어버리곤 했는데, 이제는 오류가 나면 일반 글자로 바꿔 보여주고 경고를 띄울 뿐 멈추지 않는다. 마우스 조작과 키보드 통신을 맡는 바탕 엔진도 업그레이드되어 화면을 먹통으로 만들던 숨은 문제들이 여럿 고쳐졌다. 글자만 나오는 헤드리스 모드(headless mode, 대화 창을 띄우지 않고 바로 실행하는 모드)로 예전 대화를 이어갈 때, 예전엔 과거에 나눴던 수백 줄의 대화 기록까지 몽땅 쏟아내 화면을 도배했지만 이제는 딱 최신 답변만 뱉어낸다. 게다가 이제 외부 플러그인을 깔 때 시스템이 그 안에 든 Git 하위 모듈(submodule)까지 알아서 가져와 주어 일일이 설정할 필요가 없으며, 프로그램이 켜질 때마다 '내장 설정 폴더를 읽어도 되냐'고 깐깐하게 묻지도 않는다. 덧붙여 AES 하드웨어 가속이 없는 일부 ARM 기기에서 호환되지 않던 문제도 고쳤다. 가구를 샀을 때, 예전엔 조립용 나사를 따로 사러 가야 했지만 이제는 다 알아서 챙겨주고, 설명서에 오타가 좀 있다고 해서 조립하던 장식장이 와르르 무너지지는 않게 된 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added submodule support for plugins installation. External plugin installation now automatically resolves and initializes Git submodules.
Optimized customizations permissions: Automatically grants read-only access to the builtin customizations directory, eliminating redundant permission prompts on startup.
Improved glamour parser error handling (like nested checkboxes inside list emphasis) and preventing it from crashing the TUI, falling back to raw text with a warning banner.
Updated bubbletea to v2.0.7: Resolves a potential TUI panic when terminal input is unavailable, fixes a data race in mouse handling within the Cursed Renderer, and corrects mouse release behavior under the Kitty Keyboard protocol.
Fixed a bug in headless print mode resumption (`--conversation`/`-c` `-p ...`) where the CLI would dump the entire historical conversation transcript instead of only printing the newly generated response.
Fixed a CPU compatibility issue on ARM64 devices without AES hardware support.

title.zh-TW: 沙盒安全大升級，帶引號的指令終於能順利放行
title.zh-CN: 沙盒安全大升级，带引号的指令终于能顺利放行
title.en: Hardened sandbox security and proper quoting for approved commands
title.ja: サンドボックスの安全性が向上し、引用符付きの許可コマンドも正しく実行可能に
title.ko: 샌드박스 보안이 튼튼해지고, 따옴표가 든 허용 명령어도 제대로 알아본다.

body.zh-TW: 未授權程式不能碰 `.git`，而已允許的帶引號指令能正常放行。系統現在嚴禁未經授權的程式去亂動你專案裡的 .git 資料夾（這是存放版本控制紀錄的心臟地帶），防止重要的歷史紀錄被惡意竄改。在檢查你想執行的指令有沒有權限時也變得更嚴格，對於 PowerShell 腳本、複雜的輸出轉向符號（像 > 或 2>&1），都會要求「完全一模一樣」的嚴格比對，防堵那些想繞過沙盒（sandbox，限制程式權限的安全隔離區）的鑽漏洞行為。不過它也不是只會擋人，以前你如果把一個「帶有引號的指令」（像是 python -c "print(1)"）加進白名單，系統會因為不懂得處理引號裡面的空白而認不得它，害你還是得手動批准；現在這個笨問題修好了，白名單終於能發揮正常作用。就像公司的門禁，現在不但嚴禁外人偷偷跑去檔案室亂翻，而且警衛也終於學會看懂外國訪客名字裡面的空格，不會再因為名字有空格就把原本已經預約好的客人擋在門外了。
body.zh-CN: 未授权程序不能碰 `.git`，而已允许的带引号指令能正常放行。系统现在严禁未经授权的程序去乱动你项目里的 .git 文件夹（这是存放版本控制纪录的心脏地带），防止重要的历史纪录被恶意窜改。在检查你想执行的指令有没有权限时也变得更严格，对于 PowerShell 脚本、复杂的输出转向符号（像 > 或 2>&1），都会要求「完全一模一样」的严格比对，防堵那些想绕过沙盒（sandbox，限制程序权限的安全隔离区）的钻漏洞行为。不过它也不是只会挡人，以前你如果把一个「带有引号的指令」（像是 python -c "print(1)"）加进白名单，系统会因为不懂得处理引号里面的空白而认不得它，害你还是得手动批准；现在这个笨问题修好了，白名单终于能发挥正常作用。就像公司的门禁，现在不但严禁外人偷偷跑去文件室乱翻，而且警卫也终于学会看懂外国访客名字里面的空格，不会再因为名字有空格就把原本已经预约好的客人挡在门外了。
body.en: The system's defense lines are now drawn much tighter. The system strictly forbids unauthorized programs from messing with your project's .git folder (the heart of your version control history), preventing any malicious tampering with your crucial history. It is also much stricter when checking command permissions: PowerShell scripts and complex output redirections (like > or 2>&1) now require an exact string match, plugging loopholes that might let bad actors escape the sandbox (a secure isolation zone that restricts program privileges). But it's not all restrictions: previously, if you allowlisted a "command with quotes" (like python -c "print(1)"), the system would fail to handle the spaces inside the quotes and wouldn't recognize it, forcing you to manually approve it anyway; this silly bug is now fixed, and the allowlist works as intended. Like corporate security: it now strictly forbids strangers from sneaking into the archives room, but the guards have finally learned how to read foreign visitor names with spaces in them, so they no longer turn away guests who already made a reservation.
body.ja: システムの防衛線がより厳重に張られた。システムは今後、無許可のプログラムがプロジェクト内の .git フォルダ（バージョン管理の記録が保存されている心臓部）を荒らすことを固く禁じ、重要な履歴が手荒に書き換えられるのを防ぐ。実行したいコマンドの権限をチェックする際も厳格になり、PowerShell スクリプトや複雑な出力リダイレクト記号（> や 2>&1 など）が含まれる場合は「完全に一致」しない限り許可せず、サンドボックス（プログラムの権限を制限する安全な隔離エリア）の抜け穴を塞いだ。とはいえ、厳しくなっただけではない。以前は「引用符付きのコマンド」（python -c "print(1)" など）をホワイトリストに入れても、システムが引用符内の空白をうまく処理できずに別物と判定し、結局手動で許可させられていたが、この馬鹿げたバグが直り、ホワイトリストが正常に機能するようになった。会社のセキュリティシステムのようなもので、部外者が勝手に資料室を荒らすのを厳禁するようになった一方で、警備員が外国人の名前にあるスペースの読み方をようやく覚え、ちゃんと予約済みの客を名前の空白のせいで門前払いすることはなくなったわけである。
body.ko: 시스템의 방어선을 한층 더 빈틈없이 당겼다. 이제 시스템은 허락받지 않은 프로그램이 프로젝트 안의 .git 폴더(버전 관리 기록이 담긴 심장부)를 함부로 건드리는 것을 엄격히 막아, 중요한 옛날 기록이 나쁜 뜻으로 바뀌는 일을 예방한다. 실행하려는 명령어에 권한이 있는지 검사할 때도 훨씬 깐깐해져서, PowerShell 스크립트나 복잡한 출력 방향 바꾸기 기호(> 또는 2>&1 등)가 들어가면 '글자 하나 안 틀리고 똑같을' 때만 통과시켜 주어 샌드박스(프로그램 권한을 묶어두는 안전한 격리 구역)를 빠져나가려는 꼼수를 차단한다. 그렇다고 무조건 막기만 하는 건 아니다. 예전엔 '따옴표가 들어간 명령어'(예: python -c "print(1)")를 허용 목록에 넣어두어도, 시스템이 따옴표 안의 띄어쓰기를 제대로 처리하지 못해 딴판인 줄 알고 일일이 직접 허락을 받아야 했지만, 이 바보 같은 문제가 고쳐져 허용 목록이 제구실을 하게 됐다. 회사 경비와 비슷하다. 이제 외부인이 몰래 기록실에 들어가 뒤지는 걸 엄격히 막으면서도, 경비원이 드디어 외국인 방문객 이름에 들어간 띄어쓰기를 읽을 줄 알게 되어 분명히 예약된 손님을 이름 띄어쓰기 탓에 문전박대하는 일이 없어진 셈이다.

items.original:
Hardened command execution permission checks by enforcing strict exact-match verification for PowerShell scripts, complex shell redirections ( `>` , `2>&1` ), and unparseable strings to prevent sandbox escapes.
Hardened sandbox execution by adding `.git` to the core list of dangerous paths, preventing unauthorized or destructive repository modifications.
Fixed a bug where allowlisted terminal commands with quoted arguments (e.g., `python -c "print(1)"`) would silently fail to match at runtime due to flawed whitespace tokenization.

entries: Added support for capturing slash command history, allowing users to use the up arrow to replay previously entered slash commands.

Redesigned the "Models & Quota" page (enabled by default, replacing the legacy usage page) to gracefully handle disabled quota buckets by displaying a dimmed "Disabled" status and omitting the progress bar.
Added display of quota usage and execution mode in the status line.
Improved `/btw` to be more token efficient and support streaming responses for a smoother user experience and fixed premature truncation.

Fixed a bug where the `/hooks` command wrote configurations to `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/hooks.json` instead of the shared `~/.gemini/config/hooks.json`, ensuring hooks remain synchronized between the TUI and the backend.
Fixed a CPU compatibility issue (SIGILL on non-AES-NI CPUs), preventing immediate crashes on startup on older CPUs (like Intel Ivy Bridge) or VM environments that lack AES-NI support.
Added a per-line guard against extremely long single-line pastes in the TUI prompt editor to prevent performance lag, replacing them with an expandable placeholder.
Redesigned the `/resume` conversation picker to align the workspace column and added adaptive column dropping (workspace, time, steps) to support narrow terminals.
Redesigned the `/tasks` list and detail views for better alignment and readability, placing start times on the left, right-aligning status, and capping the panel height.
Fixed dynamic reloading of custom skills and system slash commands, ensuring they are instantly discovered in autocomplete upon conversation switch or `/add-dir`.
Improved configuration saving by propagating write failures as transient error flashes on the statusline.
Improved settings inheritance by ensuring the CLI inherits the `use_ai_credits` setting from global user settings on startup.
Fixed a TUI hang in the artifact view during long sessions by optimizing the rendering complexity of large step histories.
Fixed an autocomplete bug where a command that is an exact prefix of another (e.g., `/conv` vs `/conv-switch`) would aggressively auto-complete and hide the suggestions menu.
Fixed a race condition where sending a message immediately after denying a permission request would fail due to incomplete backend cleanup.
Fixed potential OOM risks when reading large clipboard files by verifying file size before reading.
Fixed Windows and Wayland-only Linux distributions clipboard image and file reading.

title.zh-TW: 「模型與額度」頁面重新設計
title.zh-CN: 「模型与额度」页面重新设计
title.en: Smarter UI layout and slash command history support
title.ja: 画面レイアウトが賢くなり、ショートカットコマンドの履歴機能も追加
title.ko: 화면 배치가 더 똑똑해지고, 단축 명령어에도 드디어 기록이 남는다.

body.zh-TW: 終端機介面變得更實用也更美觀了。現在你可以像一般打指令一樣，按方向鍵「上」來找回之前打過的快捷指令（slash commands，像 /plan 這些），不用每次都重打，而且在選單裡打字時，也不會再發生「打 /conv 結果系統硬是幫你補全成 /conv-switch 並關掉選單」這種自作聰明的毛病。「模型與額度」頁面重新設計，畫面最底下的狀態列也會隨時告訴你現在用了多少額度和處於什麼執行模式。當你在看歷史對話或任務清單時，如果你的視窗太窄，系統會自動隱藏不重要的欄位以免版面擠爆，而且時間和狀態也會對齊得清清楚楚。就像你常去的咖啡廳重新裝潢，不但點單機終於會記住你常點的隱藏菜單，而且就算用小桌子，服務生也會幫你把餐盤排得整整齊齊。
body.zh-CN: 终端机界面变得更实用也更美观了。现在你可以像一般打指令一样，按方向键「上」来找回之前打过的快捷指令（slash commands，像 /plan 这些），不用每次都重打，而且在菜单里打字时，也不会再发生「打 /conv 结果系统硬是帮你补全成 /conv-switch 并关掉菜单」这种自作聪明的毛病。「模型与额度」页面重新设计，画面最底下的状态列也会随时告诉你现在用了多少额度和处于什么执行模式。当你在看历史对话或任务清单时，如果你的窗口太窄，系统会自动隐藏不重要的栏位以免版面挤爆，而且时间和状态也会对齐得清清楚楚。就像你常去的咖啡厅重新装潢，不但点单机终于会记住你常点的隐藏菜单，而且就算用小桌子，服务生也会帮你把餐盘排得整整齐齐。
body.en: The terminal interface is now much more practical and better looking. You can finally press the "Up" arrow key to recall previously entered slash commands (like /plan), saving you from retyping them every time. When typing in the autocomplete menu, it will no longer mistakenly "help" you by forcefully auto-completing /conv into /conv-switch and then abruptly closing the menu. The completely redesigned "Models & Quota" page is now live, and the status bar at the very bottom will always keep you informed of your current quota usage and execution mode. When viewing your conversation history or task lists, if your terminal window is too narrow, the system will automatically drop less important columns to prevent layout chaos, while ensuring times and statuses align perfectly. Like your favorite cafe getting a remodel: the register finally remembers your secret menu orders, and even if you sit at a tiny table, the waiter still manages to arrange your plates perfectly.
body.ja: 端末のインターフェースがより実用的で美しくなった。今後、普通のコマンドと同じように「上」矢印キーを押すだけで、以前入力したショートカットコマンド（/plan などの slash commands）を呼び出せるようになり、毎回打ち直す手間が省ける。また、メニューで文字を打っている最中に「/conv と打ったのに、システムが勝手に /conv-switch と補完してメニューを閉じてしまう」というおせっかいなバグも直った。刷新された「モデルとクレジット（Models & Quota）」ページが標準となり、画面の一番下のステータス行でも現在のクレジット使用量と実行モードがいつでも確認できるようになった。過去の会話やタスクのリストを見る際、ウィンドウの幅が狭すぎるとシステムが自動で重要でない列を隠してレイアウトの崩壊を防ぎ、時間やステータスの文字の縦のラインも綺麗に揃うようになった。行きつけのカフェが改装され、レジがようやくあなたの裏メニューを覚えてくれるようになり、小さなテーブルに座ってもウェイターが綺麗にお皿を並べてくれるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 터미널 화면이 훨씬 쓸모 있고 보기 좋게 바뀌었다. 이제 일반 명령어를 칠 때처럼 '위' 방향키를 눌러 예전에 쳤던 단축 명령어(/plan 같은 slash commands)를 불러올 수 있어 매번 다시 칠 필요가 없다. 또한 메뉴에서 글자를 칠 때 '/conv를 쳤더니 시스템이 억지로 /conv-switch로 완성해 버리고 메뉴를 닫아버리는' 오지랖도 더는 부리지 않는다. 새롭게 단장한 '모델 및 크레딧' 페이지가 기본으로 열리며, 화면 맨 아래 상태 줄에서도 지금 크레딧을 얼마나 썼고 어떤 모드로 실행 중인지 언제든 알려준다. 이전 대화나 작업 목록을 볼 때 창이 너무 좁으면 시스템이 알아서 덜 중요한 칸을 숨겨 화면이 터져나가는 걸 막아주고, 시간과 상태 글자도 반듯하게 맞춰준다. 단골 카페가 새로 단장을 해서, 이제 포스기가 당신이 자주 찾는 비밀 메뉴를 기억해 주고 좁은 테이블에 앉아도 종업원이 그릇을 가지런히 놓아주는 것과 같다.

items.original:
Added support for capturing slash command history, allowing users to use the up arrow to replay previously entered slash commands.
Redesigned the "Models & Quota" page (enabled by default, replacing the legacy usage page) to gracefully handle disabled quota buckets by displaying a dimmed "Disabled" status and omitting the progress bar.
Added display of quota usage and execution mode in the status line.
Redesigned the `/resume` conversation picker to align the workspace column and added adaptive column dropping (workspace, time, steps) to support narrow terminals.
Redesigned the `/tasks` list and detail views for better alignment and readability, placing start times on the left, right-aligning status, and capping the panel height.
Fixed an autocomplete bug where a command that is an exact prefix of another (e.g., `/conv` vs `/conv-switch`) would aggressively auto-complete and hide the suggestions menu.

title.zh-TW: 解決貼上大量文字與舊電腦當機的問題
title.zh-CN: 解决贴上大量文字与旧电脑死机的问题
title.en: Fixes performance on large text pastes, legacy CPUs, and clipboard issues
title.ja: 大量のテキスト貼り付けや古い PC でのクラッシュ問題、クリップボードの不具合を解消
title.ko: 엄청나게 긴 글을 붙여넣거나 오래된 컴퓨터에서 멈추는 문제, 클립보드 오류 해결

body.zh-TW: 大量單行貼上不再拖慢輸入框。以前如果你一次貼上超級長（例如好幾萬字）的一行文字，輸入框會因為來不及處理而卡住很久；現在它會聰明地把它折疊成一個小圖示，不再拖垮效能。用 /btw 更省 token，並支援串流回覆，也改用一邊生成一邊印字的方式，不再斷尾。如果你用的是很舊的電腦（沒有支援硬體加速的 CPU），以前一開程式就會直接崩潰，現在也能正常打開了。另外，Windows 與部分 Linux 系統（Wayland）的剪貼簿讀取也修好了，而且系統現在會檢查剪貼簿裡的檔案大小，防止你貼上超大檔案時把記憶體整個吃光。就像換了更強的抽水馬達，以前如果一次倒太多水進去水管就會塞住甚至爆管，現在它會先幫你打包分流，連舊房子的老水管也能撐得住，而且還順便把幾個地方漏水的問題修好了。
body.zh-CN: 这次解决了一堆会让程序卡死或当掉的性能问题。以前如果你一次贴上超级长（例如好几万字）的一行文字，输入框会因为来不及处理而卡住很久；现在它会聪明地把它折叠成一个小图示，不再拖垮性能。用 /btw 更省 token，并支持串流回复，也改用一边生成一边印字的方式，不再断尾。如果你用的是很旧的电脑（没有支持硬件加速的 CPU），以前一开程序就会直接崩溃，现在也能正常打开了。另外，Windows 与部分 Linux 系统（Wayland）的剪贴板读取也修好了，而且系统现在会检查剪贴板里的文件大小，防止你贴上超大文件时把内存整个吃光。就像换了更强的抽水马达，以前如果一次倒太多水进去水管就会塞住甚至爆管，现在它会先帮你打包分流，连旧房子的老水管也能撑得住，而且还顺便把几个地方漏水的问题修好了。
body.en: A slew of performance issues that could freeze or crash the program have been resolved. Previously, if you pasted a ridiculously long single line of text (like tens of thousands of characters), the input box would choke and freeze for ages; now, it smartly collapses it into a little placeholder icon, keeping performance smooth. When you use /btw to ask the agent for a quick favor, its replies are now faster and stream in word by word instead of getting prematurely truncated. If you're on a very old computer (with a CPU that lacks hardware acceleration), the program used to instantly crash on startup, but now it opens perfectly. In addition, clipboard reading on Windows and certain Linux setups (Wayland) has been fixed, and the system now checks the file size before reading the clipboard so pasting massive files won't devour all your RAM. Like installing a much stronger water pump: previously, dumping too much water at once would clog or burst the pipes, but now it automatically bundles and reroutes the flow so even the old plumbing in an aging house can handle it, while fixing a few leaks along the way.
body.ja: プログラムをフリーズさせたりクラッシュさせたりしていたパフォーマンス問題が多数解決した。以前、何万文字にも及ぶ超長文を1行のテキストとして貼り付けると、入力ボックスの処理が追いつかず長引くフリーズを引き起こしていたが、今はそれを賢く小さなプレースホルダーのアイコンに折りたたみ、動作を重くさせない。/btw を使ってエージェントにちょっとしたお願いをする際も、返答が速くなり、途中で途切れることなく一文字ずつ生成しながら表示するようになった。ハードウェア支援に対応していない非常に古い CPU の PC を使っている場合、以前は起動した瞬間にクラッシュしていたが、今は正常に起動する。また、Windows や一部の Linux（Wayland）でのクリップボードからの読み取りも修正され、システムがクリップボード内のファイルサイズを事前に確認するようになったため、巨大なファイルを貼り付けてもメモリを食い潰されることはなくなった。より強力な給水ポンプに交換したようなもので、以前は一度に大量の水を流すと管が詰まったり破裂したりしていたのが、今は自動で束ねて水流を分散させるため古い家の配管でも耐えられるようになり、ついでに水漏れも直してくれたわけである。
body.ko: 프로그램을 멈추거나 튕기게 만들던 성능 문제를 한꺼번에 해결했다. 예전엔 수만 글자에 달하는 엄청나게 긴 글을 한 줄로 통째로 붙여넣으면, 입력 칸이 처리하지 못하고 오랫동안 멈춰 있었지만 이제는 똑똑하게 작은 아이콘 하나로 접어두어 성능을 깎아먹지 않는다. /btw를 써서 에이전트에게 간단한 일을 부탁할 때, 답변 속도가 빨라졌고 도중에 잘리는 일 없이 글자가 만들어지는 대로 바로바로 찍어준다. 하드웨어 가속을 지원하지 않는 아주 오래된 컴퓨터(CPU)를 쓰는 경우, 예전엔 프로그램을 켜자마자 뻗어버렸지만 이제는 무사히 켜진다. 아울러 Windows와 일부 Linux(Wayland)에서 클립보드를 제대로 못 읽던 문제도 고쳐졌고, 이제 시스템이 클립보드에 든 파일 크기를 먼저 확인하므로 엄청나게 큰 파일을 붙여넣어도 램(메모리)을 몽땅 잡아먹는 일이 없다. 훨씬 힘 좋은 물 펌프로 바꾼 것과 같다. 예전엔 한꺼번에 물을 너무 많이 부으면 배관이 막히거나 터졌지만, 이제는 알아서 물줄기를 나눠주어 낡은 집의 오래된 배관도 버틸 수 있게 되었고, 내친김에 곳곳의 물새는 곳도 싹 고친 셈이다.

items.original:
Improved `/btw` to be more token efficient and support streaming responses for a smoother user experience and fixed premature truncation.
Fixed a CPU compatibility issue (SIGILL on non-AES-NI CPUs), preventing immediate crashes on startup on older CPUs (like Intel Ivy Bridge) or VM environments that lack AES-NI support.
Added a per-line guard against extremely long single-line pastes in the TUI prompt editor to prevent performance lag, replacing them with an expandable placeholder.
Fixed a TUI hang in the artifact view during long sessions by optimizing the rendering complexity of large step histories.
Fixed potential OOM risks when reading large clipboard files by verifying file size before reading.
Fixed Windows and Wayland-only Linux distributions clipboard image and file reading.

title.zh-TW: 設定檔終於寫對位置，拒絕權限後不再卡死
title.zh-CN: 配置文件终于写对位置，拒绝权限后不再卡死
title.en: Hooks save to the correct path, and denying permissions no longer causes hangs
title.ja: 設定ファイルの保存先が正しくなり、権限拒否後のフリーズも解消
title.ko: 설정 파일이 제자리에 저장되고, 권한을 거절한 뒤 멈추는 현상이 사라졌다.

body.zh-TW: 系統裡的設定與狀態同步現在變得更精準了。以前你用 /hooks 幫系統掛上自動執行腳本時，它會傻傻地把設定檔寫錯資料夾，導致你設定半天背後的程式卻讀不到；現在終於會乖乖寫進共用的設定檔目錄裡了。當你切換專案或加入新目錄時，你自己寫的快捷指令和技能也會立刻在自動補齊選單裡現身，不用再重開程式。如果你儲存設定失敗，狀態列現在會立刻閃紅燈警告你。另外，以前如果你拒絕了代理的某個執行權限，然後馬上又傳訊息給它，它會因為還沒從被拒絕的錯愕中回過神來而當機；現在這個「反應慢半拍」的毛病也治好了。就像你去辦公所，以前你在櫃檯填的申請單會被收進錯的檔案櫃，而且就算你剛加入新部門的通訊錄，也要等隔天大家才查得到你；現在這些資料都即時連線了，而且如果你剛拒絕推銷員，他也不會再擋在門口不讓你跟下一個客人講話。
body.zh-CN: 系统里的设置与状态同步现在变得更精准了。以前你用 /hooks 帮系统挂上自动执行脚本时，它会傻傻地把配置文件写错文件夹，导致你设置半天背后的程序却读不到；现在终于会乖乖写进共用的配置文件目录里了。当你切换项目或加入新目录时，你自己写的快捷指令和技能也会立刻在自动补齐菜单里现身，不用再重开程序。如果你保存设置失败，状态列现在会立刻闪红灯警告你。另外，以前如果你拒绝了代理的某个执行权限，然后马上又传消息／提示给它，它会因为还没从被拒绝的错愕中回过神来而死机；现在这个「反应慢半拍」的毛病也治好了。就像你去办公所，以前你在柜台填的申请单会被收进错的文件柜，而且就算你刚加入新部门的通讯录，也要等隔天大家才查得到你；现在这些资料都实时连接了，而且如果你刚拒绝推销员，他也不会再挡在门口不让你跟下一个客人讲话。
body.en: Settings and state synchronization within the system are now much more precise. Previously, when you used /hooks to attach automated scripts, the system would foolishly write the config file into the wrong folder, meaning your backend wouldn't read anything despite all your setup work; it now correctly writes to the shared configuration directory. When you switch projects or add a new directory, any custom slash commands or skills you wrote will instantly appear in the autocomplete menu without you needing to restart the program. If saving a configuration fails, the status bar will now immediately flash a red warning alert. Additionally, if you denied an agent's permission request and then immediately sent it a new message, the backend used to hang because it hadn't finished cleaning up after the denial; this "slow reaction" bug is now cured. Like visiting a government office: the application forms you filled out at the counter used to be filed in the wrong cabinet, and if you just joined a new department, it took a whole day before anyone could find you in the directory; now everything is instantly synced, and if you turn away a salesperson, they no longer block the doorway preventing you from talking to the next person.
body.ja: システム内の設定と状態の同期がより正確になった。以前、/hooks を使って自動実行スクリプトを設定した際、システムが馬鹿正直に間違ったフォルダに設定ファイルを書き込んでいたため、裏で動くプログラムがそれを読み取れずに設定が無駄になっていたが、ようやく共有の設定フォルダに正しく保存されるようになった。プロジェクトを切り替えたり新しいディレクトリを追加したりした際も、自分で書いたショートカットコマンドやスキルが再起動なしで即座に補完メニューに現れる。設定の保存に失敗した場合は、ステータス行がすぐに赤く光って警告を出してくれる。また、エージェントの権限要求を「拒否」した直後に新しいメッセージを送ると、裏側で拒否の処理が完了しきれずにフリーズしてしまうバグがあったが、この「反応の遅れ」も直った。役所での手続きの際、以前は窓口で書いた申請書が間違った戸棚にしまわれたり、新しい部署に配属されても翌日にならないと内線名簿に載らなかったりしたが、今はすべてが即座に同期され、セールスマンを断った直後でも彼らがドアを塞いで次の客と話せなくなるような事態は起きなくなったわけである。
body.ko: 시스템 안의 설정과 상태를 맞추는 일이 훨씬 정확해졌다. 예전엔 /hooks를 써서 자동 실행 스크립트를 걸어두면, 시스템이 멍청하게 설정 파일을 엉뚱한 폴더에 쓰는 바람에 기껏 설정해 두고도 뒤에서 도는 프로그램이 이를 읽지 못했지만 이제는 드디어 공용 설정 폴더에 제대로 저장된다. 프로젝트를 바꾸거나 새 폴더를 더할 때도, 당신이 직접 짠 단축 명령어와 기술이 프로그램을 다시 켤 필요 없이 자동 완성 메뉴에 바로 나타난다. 설정을 저장하다 실패하면 상태 줄이 즉시 빨간불을 반짝이며 경고해 준다. 또한 예전엔 에이전트가 권한을 달라는 걸 거절한 직후에 바로 새 메시지를 보내면, 뒤에서 거절 처리를 다 끝내기도 전에 꼬여버려 멈추곤 했는데, 이제 이 '굼뜬 반응' 문제도 고쳐졌다. 관공서에 갔을 때, 예전엔 창구에서 쓴 신청서가 엉뚱한 캐비닛에 들어가 버리고 새 부서로 옮겨도 다음 날이 되어야 연락망에서 나를 찾을 수 있었지만 이제는 이 모든 게 실시간으로 바로 연결되며, 물건 파는 사람을 거절했다고 해서 그 사람이 문 앞을 틀어막고 다음 사람과 말하는 걸 방해하는 일도 없어진 것과 같다.

items.original:
Fixed a bug where the `/hooks` command wrote configurations to `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/hooks.json` instead of the shared `~/.gemini/config/hooks.json`, ensuring hooks remain synchronized between the TUI and the backend.
Fixed dynamic reloading of custom skills and system slash commands, ensuring they are instantly discovered in autocomplete upon conversation switch or `/add-dir`.
Improved configuration saving by propagating write failures as transient error flashes on the statusline.
Improved settings inheritance by ensuring the CLI inherits the `use_ai_credits` setting from global user settings on startup.
Fixed a race condition where sending a message immediately after denying a permission request would fail due to incomplete backend cleanup.

entries: Added a configurable timeout for launching MCP servers, allowing users to specify a custom timeout or set it to `-1` to disable the timeout completely.

Revamped the artifact viewer gutter numbering and line mapping to accurately align terminal viewport lines with actual 1-based source file line numbers, including support for wrapped lines and collapsed Mermaid diagrams.
Fixed a bug where the CLI could get stuck in a pending state (showing a transient spinner) after sending a message due to stale status updates.
Fixed a bug where the wrong workspace directory was displayed in the header and `/help` menu when multiple workspaces were active.
Fixed a desync bug in the agent state management where stale callbacks from previous runs could be used upon cache hits in new agent state.
Fixed Windows-specific sandbox network proxy issues, resolving a hang during connection hijacking and correcting tunnel response protocols.
Fixed a bug where the archival status timestamp was not correctly saved when archiving conversations.
Fixed a potential stack overflow crash by introducing a non-recursive warning output mechanism for pre-conversation errors.
Increased the maximum tool calls limit to 512 for Gemini models, allowing agents to perform significantly more complex, multi-step tasks in a single turn.
Added support for installing plugins directly from GitHub subpaths (with branch resolution).
Fixed variable resolution in plugins, ensuring gemini cli variables like `${extensionPath}` correctly resolves to the final installation directory.
Added native Wayland clipboard support (wl-paste) on Linux, falling back to `xclip` for X11 environments, and prioritized copied files (from file managers) over raw image data.
Preserved unknown fields in `settings.json` during read, write, and merge operations, preventing settings from being silently wiped out when switching between different CLI versions or builds.
Fixed layout boundary overflow, scrolling visibility, and out-of-bounds scrolling bugs in the artifact detail view when inline comments are present.

title.zh-TW: 看程式碼與留言不再破圖，行號終於對準了
title.zh-CN: 看代码与留言不再破图，行号终于对准了
title.en: Accurate line numbers and flawless layouts in the artifact viewer
title.ja: コードとコメントの表示崩れが直り、行番号が正確に揃うように
title.ko: 코드와 메모가 깨지지 않고 줄 번호가 드디어 딱 들어맞는다.
