**In-app update check (Stage 1)**: On launch, usage pings GitHub Releases for a newer version (rate-limited to once per 24h so you're not nagged every time you open the app). When a newer version is found, an NSAlert shows the version + release notes with three buttons: **Download**, **Later**, **Skip this version**. "Download" opens the Release page in your default browser — manually replace the old `.app` with the new one. (Stage 2 will bring Sparkle-style auto download + replace.)
**Two new entries in the "Switch panel" menu**:
- **Automatically Check for Updates** (toggleable): unchecking it disables the launch-time auto check entirely; the manual entry below still works.
- **Check for Updates Now**: manually triggers a check, bypassing the 24h cooldown and skip-version preference. If you're already up to date, an alert says so; on network error you see "Update check failed".
Preferences are stored in the existing `~/.claude/usage-preferences.json`, with three new keys: `auto_update_check` (default true), `update_dismissed_at` (Unix timestamp), `update_skipped_version` (skipped version string).
`setup_app.py` now bundles `pyproject.toml` and `update_checker` into the py2app build — so the packaged `.app` can fall back to reading `pyproject.toml` when `importlib.metadata` can't resolve the version.

entries: **Weekly burn-rate warning false positive**: Extrapolating the last 10 minutes of usage slope onto a 7-day weekly quota was too aggressive (e.g. 56% used → projected 5h50m to exhaustion → "Runs out in 5h50m (resets in 4d6h)" warning), since users don't sustain that rate 24/7. Fix: `_quota_row` gained a `warning_max_seconds` parameter, and the three weekly call sites pass a 24h ceiling — projections beyond 24 hours no longer trigger the warning. Session warnings are unchanged.

title.zh-TW: 每週額度的用完警告不再過度恐慌
title.zh-CN: 每周额度的用完警告不再过度恐慌
title.en: Weekly quota burn-rate warnings are no longer overly dramatic
title.ja: 週間制限の使い切り警告が過敏に反応しなくなった
title.ko: 주간 한도 소진 경고가 더 이상 호들갑을 떨지 않는다

body.zh-TW: 現在系統預估「每週額度（weekly quota）」什麼時候會用完時，不會再隨便嚇你了。以前它會拿你最近 10 分鐘瘋狂輸出的速度，直接推算你接下來整週都會不眠不休地工作，然後在你額度其實還剩近一半時，就急著跳出「剩不到 6 小時就用完」的紅字警告。現在系統加上了 24 小時的預測上限，如果按照目前速度算出來還能撐超過一整天，它就不會跳警告來煩你；但針對單次對話（session）的額度警告則維持原樣。這就像手機電量預估，以前你只是剛好開了五分鐘的耗電遊戲，系統就斷言你手機半小時後會沒電並狂響警報，現在它學會考量你不會一直玩下去，不再過度反應。
body.zh-CN: 现在系统预估「每周额度（weekly quota）」什么时候会用完时，不会再随便吓你了。以前它会拿你最近 10 分钟疯狂输出的速度，直接推算你接下来整周都会不眠不休地工作，然后在你额度其实还剩近一半时，就急着跳出「剩不到 6 小时就用完」的红字警告。现在系统加上了 24 小时的预测上限，如果按照目前速度算出来还能撑超过一整天，它就不会跳警告来烦你；但针对单次对话（session）的额度警告则维持原样。这就像手机电量预估，以前你只是刚好开了五分钟的耗电游戏，系统就断言你手机半小时后会没电并狂响警报，现在它学会考量你不会一直玩下去，不再过度反应。
body.en: The system will no longer cause unnecessary panic when predicting when your weekly quota will run out. Previously, it would take your furious typing speed over the last 10 minutes and extrapolate that you'd be working non-stop 24/7, prematurely flashing a red "runs out in 6 hours" warning even when your quota was only half empty. Now, the system enforces a 24-hour prediction ceiling — if your current pace indicates you'll survive for more than a full day, it won't bother you with a warning. Short-term session quota warnings remain unchanged. It's like your phone's battery estimator: it used to panic and scream that your phone would die in 30 minutes just because you launched a heavy game for five minutes, but now it understands you won't be playing forever and stops overreacting.
body.ja: 今後、システムが「週間制限（weekly quota）」の枯渇時期を予測する際、無駄に脅かしてくることはなくなった。これまでは、直近10分間の猛烈な使用ペースを見て、この先1週間ずっと不眠不休で作業し続けると決めつけ、制限枠がまだ半分近く残っているのに「あと6時間で使い切る」という赤字の警告を急いで出していた。今後は予測に24時間の上限が設けられ、現在のペースで計算してまだ丸1日以上もつ場合は警告で煩わせることはなくなった。ただし、1回のセッション制限に対する警告は従来通り機能する。スマホのバッテリー残量予測が、以前は重いゲームを5分開いただけで「あと30分で電池が切れる」と大騒ぎしていたのが、今は「ずっとゲームし続けるわけではない」と理解して過剰反応しなくなったようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 시스템이 '주간 한도(weekly quota)'가 언제 다 닳을지 예측할 때 쓸데없이 겁주지 않는다. 예전엔 최근 10분 동안 당신이 미친 듯이 작업한 속도만 보고 앞으로 일주일 내내 잠도 안 자고 일할 거라고 멋대로 추측해, 한도가 아직 절반 가까이 남았는데도 '6시간 뒤 소진됨'이라는 빨간 경고를 다급하게 띄우곤 했다. 이제는 시스템에 24시간 예측 상한선을 두어, 지금 속도로 계산했을 때 하루 이상 버틸 수 있다면 경고를 띄워 귀찮게 하지 않는다. 단, 단일 대화(session) 한도에 대한 경고는 그대로 유지된다. 스마트폰 배터리 예상 시간이, 예전엔 무거운 게임을 딱 5분 켰을 뿐인데 30분 뒤에 방전될 거라고 발칵 뒤집히던 것에서, 이제는 당신이 게임만 계속하지는 않을 거란 사실을 깨닫고 과민 반응을 멈춘 것과 같다.

items.original: **Weekly burn-rate warning false positive**: Extrapolating the last 10 minutes of usage slope onto a 7-day weekly quota was too aggressive (e.g. 56% used → projected 5h50m to exhaustion → "Runs out in 5h50m (resets in 4d6h)" warning), since users don't sustain that rate 24/7. Fix: `_quota_row` gained a `warning_max_seconds` parameter, and the three weekly call sites pass a 24h ceiling — projections beyond 24 hours no longer trigger the warning. Session warnings are unchanged.

entries: **HTML report Share button**: A new Share button in the top-right opens a file-share modal with two actions — "Download .html" and "Copy file path" — so you can send the report via AirDrop / Mail / Slack / iMessage to a colleague or manager. Recipients open it in any browser on mobile or desktop.

**"Hide project names" toggle on download**: A checkbox inside the share modal (default ON, privacy-first) swaps every project name to `Project 1 / Project 2 / ...` before the HTML is serialized for download. The on-screen report is unaffected.

**HTML report sponsor section reworked**: Two Ko-fi badges now flank the brand slogan `No cloud. No tracking. Just yours.` (kept in English across all five UI languages). The slogan carries a subtle wobble animation to draw the eye, and the GitHub link (github.com/aqua5230/usage) appears below.

**statusLine second line removed**: The cumulative token totals / cache / cost line has been dropped to simplify visuals. Key info now lives on line 1 (5h / 7d / Context window) and line 3 (session duration, model).

**HTML report KPI card widths rebalanced**: tokens / cost are now wider; sessions / messages / active days narrower (grid ratio 1.5fr 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr), preventing 9-digit token counts from wrapping.
HTML report footer line `usage · Local-first analytics · Data stays on device` — replaced by the GitHub link in the sponsor section.

title.zh-TW: 報告可一鍵分享，還能自動把專案名稱打碼
title.zh-CN: 报告可一键分享，还能自动把项目名称打码
title.en: Share your report in one click with built-in project name redaction
title.ja: レポートをワンクリックで共有、プロジェクト名も自動で隠せる
title.ko: 클릭 한 번으로 보고서를 공유하고, 프로젝트 이름도 알아서 가려준다

body.zh-TW: 現在你可以把分析報告輕鬆傳給主管或同事看了。報告右上角多了一顆分享按鈕，點開就能選擇「另存一份 .html」或「複製檔案路徑」，透過 AirDrop、信箱或通訊軟體傳送，對方用手機或電腦的瀏覽器都能直接打開看。而且，下載介面裡多了一個預設打勾的「隱藏專案名稱」選項，勾著下載的話，檔案裡的專案名字都會被自動替換成「Project 1、Project 2」這類代號，不用擔心機密外洩，而你螢幕上看的畫面仍然維持原樣。就像你拿提款機的明細給別人看，以前要自己拿黑筆塗掉帳號，現在列印時機器就自動幫你打好星號了。
body.zh-CN: 现在你可以把分析报告轻松传给主管或同事看了。报告右上角多了一颗分享按钮，点开就能选择「另存一份 .html」或「复制文件路径」，透过 AirDrop、邮箱或通讯软件发送，对方用手机或电脑的浏览器都能直接打开看。而且，下载界面里多了一个默认打勾的「隐藏项目名称」选项，勾着下载的话，文件里的项目名字都会被自动替换成「Project 1、Project 2」这类代号，不用担心机密外泄，而你屏幕上看的画面仍然维持原样。就像你拿提款机的明细给别人看，以前要自己拿黑笔涂掉账号，现在打印时机器就自动帮你打好星号了。
body.en: You can now easily share your usage analysis with managers or colleagues. A new Share button in the top-right corner of the report lets you "Download .html" or "Copy file path" to send via AirDrop, email, or messaging apps, and recipients can open it in any browser on mobile or desktop. Plus, there's a privacy-first "Hide project names" checkbox in the download modal that's checked by default. When enabled, all project names in the downloaded file are automatically swapped to generic labels like "Project 1" or "Project 2" to prevent leaking sensitive information, while your on-screen view remains unchanged. It's like handing someone your bank receipt — you used to have to cross out the account number with a sharpie, but now the machine prints asterisks for you automatically.
body.ja: 分析レポートを上司や同僚に簡単に送れるようになった。レポートの右上に共有ボタンが追加され、「.html をダウンロード」または「ファイルパスをコピー」を選んで、AirDrop やメール、チャットツール経由で送信できる。相手はスマホでもパソコンでもブラウザで開くだけで読める。さらに、ダウンロード画面にはデフォルトでチェックが入っている「プロジェクト名を隠す」オプションがあり、これをオンにしてダウンロードすると、ファイル内のプロジェクト名が自動的に「Project 1」「Project 2」のような代名詞に置き換わるため、機密漏洩の心配がない。もちろん、あなたの画面上の表示はそのまま維持される。他人に銀行の明細を見せる際、以前は口座番号を自力で黒塗りしていたのが、今は印刷時に機械が自動で伏せ字にしてくれるようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 분석 보고서를 상사나 동료에게 쉽게 보낼 수 있다. 보고서 오른쪽 위에 공유 버튼이 생겨, '.html 다운로드'나 '파일 경로 복사'를 선택해 AirDrop, 이메일, 메신저 등으로 보낼 수 있다. 받는 사람은 휴대폰이든 컴퓨터든 브라우저로 열기만 하면 된다. 또한 다운로드 창에 기본으로 체크되어 있는 '프로젝트 이름 숨기기' 옵션이 추가되어, 체크한 채로 다운로드하면 파일 안의 프로젝트 이름이 모두 'Project 1', 'Project 2' 같은 가명으로 바뀐다. 기밀 유출 걱정 없이 안심하고 공유할 수 있으며, 내 화면에 보이는 내용은 원래대로 유지된다. 다른 사람에게 은행 명세서를 보여줄 때 예전엔 계좌번호를 직접 까만 펜으로 칠해야 했지만, 이제는 기계가 알아서 별표를 쳐서 인쇄해 주는 것과 같다.

items.original:
**HTML report Share button**: A new Share button in the top-right opens a file-share modal with two actions — "Download .html" and "Copy file path" — so you can send the report via AirDrop / Mail / Slack / iMessage to a colleague or manager. Recipients open it in any browser on mobile or desktop.
**"Hide project names" toggle on download**: A checkbox inside the share modal (default ON, privacy-first) swaps every project name to `Project 1 / Project 2 / ...` before the HTML is serialized for download. The on-screen report is unaffected.

title.zh-TW: 介面大掃除，終端機與報告畫面更俐落
title.zh-CN: 界面大扫除，终端与报告画面更利落
title.en: Visual cleanup makes the terminal and reports much sleeker
title.ja: インターフェースの大掃除で、端末やレポートの画面がすっきり
title.ko: 인터페이스 대청소로 터미널과 보고서 화면이 깔끔해졌다

body.zh-TW: 這次為終端機的狀態列（statusLine，在輸入框上方顯示額度的區塊）和分析報告做了視覺瘦身。狀態列移除了原本顯示累計問答、快取和花費的第二行，讓版面更清爽，只把最重要的限額和模型資訊留在第一跟第三行。報告畫面的上方指標卡片（KPI 卡）也調整了寬度比例，把 token 與成本的卡片拉寬，避免累積到上億的長數字被折到下一行；報告底部則重新設計了贊助區塊，用會微微晃動的品牌標語取代了原本死板的頁尾文字，並補上 GitHub 連結。就像把儀表板上平時用不到的繁雜指針拆掉，並把最重要的油量表放大，讓你開車時一眼就能看清重點。
body.zh-CN: 这次为终端的状态栏（statusLine，在输入框上方显示额度的区块）和分析报告做了视觉瘦身。状态栏移除了原本显示累计问答、缓存和花费的第二行，让版面更清爽，只把最重要的限额和模型信息留在第一跟第三行。报告画面的上方指标卡片（KPI 卡）也调整了宽度比例，把 token 与成本的卡片拉宽，避免累积到上亿的长数字被折到下一行；报告底部则重新设计了赞助区块，用会微微晃动的品牌标语取代了原本死板的页脚文字，并补上 GitHub 链接。就像把仪表盘上平时用不到的繁杂指针拆掉，并把最重要的油量表放大，让你开车时一眼就能看清重点。
body.en: We've put the terminal status line (the block above your input showing quotas) and the HTML report on a visual diet. The status line drops its second row that showed cumulative totals, cache, and costs, keeping the layout clean and focusing only on crucial limits and model info on the first and third lines. In the report, the top KPI cards have rebalanced widths — the tokens and cost cards are now wider so massive 9-digit numbers won't awkwardly wrap to the next line. We also reworked the sponsor section at the bottom, replacing the static footer text with a subtly wobbling brand slogan and adding a GitHub link. It's like removing the clutter of rarely-used gauges from your car's dashboard and enlarging the gas gauge so you can read what matters at a glance.
body.ja: 今回、端末のステータスバー（statusLine、入力欄の上で制限枠を示すブロック）と分析レポートの見た目をスマートにした。ステータスバーは、累計のやり取りやキャッシュ、コストを表示していた2行目を削除してレイアウトをすっきりさせ、最も重要な制限枠やモデル情報だけを1行目と3行目に残した。レポート画面の上部にある指標カード（KPIカード）は幅の比率を調整し、トークンとコストのカードを広くすることで、1億を超えるような長い数字が不自然に改行されるのを防いだ。レポート下部もスポンサーエリアを再設計し、堅苦しいフッター文字を、かすかに揺れるブランドスローガンに置き換え、GitHub のリンクを添えた。車のダッシュボードから普段使わないごちゃごちゃしたメーターを外し、一番重要なガソリンメーターを大きくして、運転中に一目で要点が分かるようにしたようなものである。
body.ko: 이번엔 터미널의 상태 표시줄(statusLine, 입력창 위에서 한도를 보여주는 구역)과 분석 보고서의 시각적 군더더기를 뺐다. 상태 표시줄은 누적 문답, 캐시, 비용을 보여주던 두 번째 줄을 아예 치워버려 화면을 시원하게 만들었고, 가장 중요한 한도와 모델 정보만 첫 번째와 세 번째 줄에 남겼다. 보고서 화면 맨 위의 지표 카드(KPI 카드) 역시 너비 비율을 손봐, 토큰과 비용 카드를 넓힘으로써 1억 단위가 넘는 긴 숫자가 다음 줄로 어색하게 꺾이는 일을 막았다. 보고서 맨 아래는 후원 구역을 새로 꾸며, 딱딱하던 바닥글 대신 살짝 흔들리는 브랜드 슬로건을 넣고 GitHub 링크를 달았다. 자동차 계기판에서 평소에 안 보는 복잡한 바늘들을 다 떼어내고, 가장 중요한 기름 게이지를 큼직하게 키워 운전할 때 한눈에 알아보기 쉽게 만든 것과 같다.

items.original:
**HTML report sponsor section reworked**: Two Ko-fi badges now flank the brand slogan `No cloud. No tracking. Just yours.` (kept in English across all five UI languages). The slogan carries a subtle wobble animation to draw the eye, and the GitHub link (github.com/aqua5230/usage) appears below.
**statusLine second line removed**: The cumulative token totals / cache / cost line has been dropped to simplify visuals. Key info now lives on line 1 (5h / 7d / Context window) and line 3 (session duration, model).
**HTML report KPI card widths rebalanced**: tokens / cost are now wider; sessions / messages / active days narrower (grid ratio 1.5fr 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr), preventing 9-digit token counts from wrapping.
HTML report footer line `usage · Local-first analytics · Data stays on device` — replaced by the GitHub link in the sponsor section.

entries: **TUI polling never updated after first fetch**: a `continue` in `poll_usage` caused every timeout to jump back to the loop head, leaving the UI frozen at the initial state. Changed to `pass` so the polling path is actually reached.
**Inconsistent env var name**: `USAG_FORCE_GROUP` (v0.1.x legacy prefix) renamed to `USAGE_FORCE_GROUP` to match all other env vars in the project.

**Redundant filesystem scans per refresh**: `_refresh_in_background` was calling `history_loader.load_entries` four times per cycle (24h × 2, 168h × 1, 720h × 1). Now loads the 720h superset once and passes it down, eliminating the duplicate I/O.
`pricing.py` User-Agent updated from the stale `usage/0.2` to `usage/0.9`.
`--setup` no longer prints a "no migration needed" message on clean installs.

title.zh-TW: 終端機介面不再卡死，底層檔案掃描更省力
title.zh-CN: 终端界面不再卡死，底层文件扫描更省力
title.en: Terminal UI stops freezing, and underlying file scans are much more efficient
title.ja: 端末画面がフリーズしなくなり、ファイルのバックグラウンドスキャンも効率化
title.ko: 터미널 화면이 더 이상 멈추지 않고, 밑바탕 파일 스캔도 훨씬 효율적으로 바뀜

body.zh-TW: 之前在終端機裡看用量時，因為一個程式迴圈寫錯（不小心跳過了更新步驟），導致畫面永遠凍結在剛打開的那一秒，再也不會自動更新。現在這個迴圈修好了，畫面會乖乖定時刷新。同時，我們也優化了底層的檔案掃描：以前每次更新畫面，系統都會笨笨地把同一個歷史紀錄檔案重複讀 4 次來算不同時間區間的數字；現在它學聰明了，一次讀完最長的區間然後直接往下分派，大幅省下白費力氣的硬碟讀取。另外，舊版的環境變數和過時的內部代號也一併統一了。就像是顧門口的警衛以前一直忘記看手錶導致從來不換班，而且查房時還同一層樓爬上爬下巡了四遍，現在終於準時交接，而且知道從頂樓一次巡下來最省事。
body.zh-CN: 之前在终端里看用量时，因为一个程序循环写错（不小心跳过了更新步骤），导致画面永远冻结在刚打开的那一秒，再也不会自动更新。现在这个循环修好了，画面会乖乖定时刷新。同时，我们也优化了底层的文件扫描：以前每次更新画面，系统都会笨笨地把同一个历史记录文件重复读 4 次来算不同时间区间的数字；现在它学聪明了，一次读完最长的区间然后直接往下分派，大幅省下白费力气的硬盘读取。另外，旧版的环境变量和过时的内部代号也一并统一了。就像是顾门口的警卫以前一直忘记看手表导致从来不换班，而且查房时还同一楼层爬上爬下巡了四遍，现在终于准时交接，而且知道从顶楼一次巡下来最省事。
body.en: Previously, when viewing your usage in the terminal, a buggy programming loop (which accidentally skipped the update step) caused the screen to freeze permanently at the exact second you opened it, never automatically refreshing again. This loop is now fixed, and the screen faithfully updates on time. Simultaneously, we've optimized the underlying file scans: before, every time the screen refreshed, the system foolishly read the exact same history file 4 times to calculate numbers for different time ranges; it's now smart enough to read the longest range once and pass the data down, drastically cutting down on wasted hard drive reads. Additionally, legacy environment variables and stale internal names have been unified. It's like a security guard who used to forget to check his watch and never changed shifts, while also climbing up and down the same floor four times during a patrol — now he hands over exactly on time and knows it's easiest to just patrol from the top floor down once.
body.ja: 以前、端末で自身の使用量を見る際、プログラムのループの記述ミス（誤って更新のステップを飛ばしていた）により、開いた瞬間の状態で画面が永久に凍りつき、自動更新されなくなる問題があった。今回このループを修正し、画面がきちんと定期的に更新されるようになった。同時に、裏側のファイルスキャンも最適化した。以前は画面を更新するたびに、システムが愚直に同じ履歴ファイルを4回も読み込んで異なる期間の数値を計算していたが、今では最も長い期間のデータを一度だけ読み込んで振り分けるように賢くなり、無駄なハードディスクの読み込みを大幅に削減した。さらに、旧バージョンの環境変数や古びた内部コードも統一された。門番が以前は時計を見るのを忘れて一向に交代せず、見回りの時も同じ階を4回も上り下りしていたのが、今は時間通りに引き継ぎを行い、最上階から一度に巡回して降りてくるのが一番楽だと学習したようなものである。
body.ko: 예전엔 터미널에서 사용량을 볼 때 프로그램 반복문에 오류가 있어(실수로 업데이트 단계를 건너뜀) 화면이 갓 열렸던 그 1초에 영원히 얼어붙은 채 다신 알아서 새로고침되지 않았다. 이제 이 반복문을 고쳐서 화면이 얌전히 제때 갱신된다. 이와 함께 밑바탕의 파일 스캔도 다듬었다. 예전엔 화면을 새로고침할 때마다 시스템이 멍청하게 똑같은 대화 기록 파일을 4번씩 다시 읽어가며 여러 시간대의 숫자를 계산했다. 이제는 제일 긴 구간을 한 번에 다 읽고 아래로 나눠 주는 법을 배워서, 헛수고하던 하드디스크 읽기를 크게 줄였다. 또한, 구버전 환경 변수와 낡은 내부 이름도 함께 통일했다. 정문을 지키던 경비원이 예전엔 시계 보는 걸 깜빡해 아예 교대하지도 않고, 순찰할 땐 똑같은 층을 네 번씩 오르락내리락하던 것을, 이제는 제시간에 딱 맞춰 교대하고 꼭층에서부터 한 번에 쭉 순찰하며 내려오는 게 제일 편하다는 걸 알게 된 것과 같다.

items.original:
**TUI polling never updated after first fetch**: a `continue` in `poll_usage` caused every timeout to jump back to the loop head, leaving the UI frozen at the initial state. Changed to `pass` so the polling path is actually reached.
**Inconsistent env var name**: `USAG_FORCE_GROUP` (v0.1.x legacy prefix) renamed to `USAGE_FORCE_GROUP` to match all other env vars in the project.
**Redundant filesystem scans per refresh**: `_refresh_in_background` was calling `history_loader.load_entries` four times per cycle (24h × 2, 168h × 1, 720h × 1). Now loads the 720h superset once and passes it down, eliminating the duplicate I/O.
`pricing.py` User-Agent updated from the stale `usage/0.2` to `usage/0.9`.
`--setup` no longer prints a "no migration needed" message on clean installs.

entries: **New "World Cup 2026" panel**: FIFA broadcast HUD style. Top-down green pitch with grass stripes, white field markings (halfway line, centre circle, penalty boxes, corner arcs), dark broadcast scoreboard showing Claude / Codex Session percentages as large numerals (38 px), bidirectional duel bar (Claude ← centre line → Codex) replacing the standard progress bar. Canvas animation: a pentagon-pattern football rolling in the lower pitch area, 12 stick-figure players (6 per team) roaming their zones — the nearest player chases the ball at 0.8 px/frame and kicks it on contact (60-frame cooldown per team), directing it toward the opponent's goal. Bottom section shows a MATCH STATS standings board. Triggers a golden GOAL! celebration overlay when either side's usage hits ≥ 85 %.

title.zh-TW: 用量對決變成一場足球轉播，世界盃面板登場
title.zh-CN: 用量对决变成一场足球转播，世界杯面板登场
title.en: The usage duel becomes a football broadcast — the World Cup panel is here
title.ja: 使用量対決がサッカー中継に、ワールドカップパネルが登場
title.ko: 사용량 대결이 축구 중계로, 월드컵 패널이 등장했다

body.zh-TW: 你可以把用量監控畫面換成一場足球賽。新加的「世界盃 2026」面板把 Claude 和 Codex（兩套 AI 工具）的用量對決，做成 FIFA 電視轉播的樣子——綠色球場俯視圖配白色場線、深色計分板用大數字秀出兩邊各用了多少 session（一段對話的額度單位）百分比，中間一條雙向對戰條取代原本單向的進度條。畫面上還有一顆五邊形足球在下半場滾、兩隊各 6 個棒人球員在自己的區域跑位，離球最近的球員會追上去、碰到就踢，把球往對方的球門送（各隊踢完有 60 格的冷卻時間）。底部有積分榜；當任一邊用量衝到 85% 以上，還會跳出黃金「進球！」彩蛋慶祝。就像把原本枯燥的用量電表，換成一場會自己播的足球轉播，看著兩邊你來我往，快爆量的時候直接給你一記進球慶祝。
body.zh-CN: 你可以把用量监控画面换成一场足球赛。新加的「世界杯 2026」面板把 Claude 和 Codex（两套 AI 工具）的用量对决，做成 FIFA 电视转播的样子——绿色球场俯视图配白色场线、深色计分板用大数字秀出两边各用了多少 session（一段对话的额度单位）百分比，中间一条双向对战条取代原本单向的进度条。画面上还有一颗五边形足球在下半场滚、两队各 6 个棒人球员在自己的区域跑位，离球最近的球员会追上去、碰到就踢，把球往对方的球门送（各队踢完有 60 格的冷却时间）。底部有积分榜；当任一边用量冲到 85% 以上，还会跳出黄金「进球！」彩蛋庆祝。就像把原本枯燥的用量电表，换成一场会自己播的足球转播，看着两边你来我往，快爆量的时候直接给你一记进球庆祝。
body.en: You can swap the usage monitor for a football match. The new "World Cup 2026" panel turns the usage duel between Claude and Codex (two AI tools) into a FIFA-style TV broadcast — a top-down green pitch with white field lines, a dark scoreboard showing each side's session (a quota unit measured per conversation) percentage in big numerals, and a bidirectional duel bar replacing the old one-way progress bar. A pentagon-pattern football rolls across the lower pitch while twelve stick-figure players (six per team) roam their zones; the nearest player chases the ball and kicks it toward the opponent's goal (each team has a 60-frame cooldown after a kick). A MATCH STATS standings board sits at the bottom, and when either side's usage hits 85% or more, a golden GOAL! celebration overlay pops up. It's like swapping a boring electricity meter for a sports channel that plays its own match, with back-and-forth action and a goal celebration right when you're about to max out.
body.ja: 使用量監視画面をサッカーの試合に切り替えられる。「ワールドカップ 2026」パネルは、Claude と Codex（二つの AI ツール）の使用量対決を FIFA 風のテレビ中継に仕立てる。上から見た緑のピッチに白のライン、ダークカラーのスコアボードが両者の session（一回の対話につき計上される枠の単位）パーセンテージを大きな数字で示し、従来の一方向のプログレスバーに代わって双方向の対決バーが置かれる。五角形の模様のサッカーボールが下半分を転がり、12人の棒人間プレイヤー（各チーム6人）が持ち場を動き回る。ボールに最も近いプレイヤーが追いかけて蹴り、相手のゴールへ向かわせる（蹴った後は各チーム60フレームのクールダウン）。下部には MATCH STATS の順位表があり、どちらかの使用量が85%以上に達すると黄金の GOAL! お祝い演出が飛び出す。単調な使用量メーターを、勝手に試合を流すスポーツチャンネルに取り替えたようなものである。
body.ko: 사용량 화면을 축구 경기로 바꿀 수 있다. 새로운 '월드컵 2026' 패널은 Claude와 Codex(두 가지 AI 도구)의 사용량 대결을 FIFA 스타일 TV 중계로 만든다. 위에서 내려다본 초록 피치에 하얀 선, 어두운 색 점수판이 양측의 session(대화 한 번 단위로 잡히는 한도) 백분율을 큰 숫자로 보여 주고, 예전의 일방향 진행 막대 대신 양방향 대결 막대가 자리한다. 오각형 무늬 축구공이 아래쪽을 굴러가고, 12명의 막대 인간 선수(팀당 6명)가 제자리를 돌아다닌다. 공에 가장 가까운 선수가 쫓아가 차서 상대 골대 쪽으로 보낸다(찬 뒤에는 팀당 60 프레임의 쿨다운). 아래에는 MATCH STATS 순위표가 있고, 어느 한쪽 사용량이 85% 이상에 달하면 황금색 GOAL! 축하 연출이 튀어나온다. 지루한 사용량 계량기를, 알아서 경기를 중계하는 스포츠 채널로 바꾼 것과 같다.

items.original: **New "World Cup 2026" panel**: FIFA broadcast HUD style. Top-down green pitch with grass stripes, white field markings (halfway line, centre circle, penalty boxes, corner arcs), dark broadcast scoreboard showing Claude / Codex Session percentages as large numerals (38 px), bidirectional duel bar (Claude ← centre line → Codex) replacing the standard progress bar. Canvas animation: a pentagon-pattern football rolling in the lower pitch area, 12 stick-figure players (6 per team) roaming their zones — the nearest player chases the ball at 0.8 px/frame and kicks it on contact (60-frame cooldown per team), directing it toward the opponent's goal. Bottom section shows a MATCH STATS standings board. Triggers a golden GOAL! celebration overlay when either side's usage hits ≥ 85 %.

entries: **New "Prism Arcade" panel**: deep purple-black background, Canvas conic rainbow halo rotating slowly, geometric prism shards (triangles/diamonds) drifting randomly, coloured light particles flickering, cards with holographic gradient borders (CSS background-clip technique), full-spectrum rainbow progress bars with sweep animation.

**New "Black Hole" panel**: pure-black space background, Canvas 2D star field (120 stars with twinkling), rotating accretion disk (orange-yellow-white gradient ellipse, Doppler brighter-left/darker-right), photon ring, event horizon with blue-purple glow, orange particles orbiting the ellipse, amber glass cards.
**Fix extra space at bottom of three panels**: added `flex: 1` to `.projects-card` in Aquarium, Prism Arcade, and Black Hole so content fills the full panel height.
**Reduce card opacity in three animated panels**: card background opacity lowered from 0.5–0.75 to 0.14–0.28 in Aquarium, Prism Arcade, and Black Hole so the background animations show through more.

title.zh-TW: 新增稜鏡街機面板
title.zh-CN: 新增棱镜街机面板
title.en: New Prism Arcade panel added
title.ja: プリズムアーケードパネルを追加
title.ko: 프리즘 아케이드 패널 추가

body.zh-TW: 現在多了一款「稜鏡街機（Prism Arcade）」面板可以選了！它有著深紫黑色的背景，中央有一圈緩慢旋轉的彩虹光暈，搭配隨機漂移的幾何碎片（三角形與菱形）和閃爍的彩色光點粒子。卡片邊框採用了全息漸層效果，進度條更是全光譜的彩虹色並帶有掃光動畫，看起來非常酷炫。就像是在你的電腦桌面上擺了一台充滿復古霓虹燈效的經典大型機台。
body.zh-CN: 现在多了一款「棱镜街机（Prism Arcade）」面板可以选了！它有着深紫黑色的背景，中央有一圈缓慢旋转的彩虹光晕，搭配随机漂移的几何碎片（三角形与菱形）和闪烁的彩色光点粒子。卡片边框采用了全息渐变效果，进度条更是全光谱的彩虹色并带有扫光动画，看起来非常酷炫。就像是在你的电脑桌面上摆了一台充满复古霓虹灯效的经典大型街机。
body.en: You can now choose the new "Prism Arcade" panel! It features a deep purple-black background with a slowly rotating rainbow halo in the center, accompanied by randomly drifting geometric shards (triangles and diamonds) and flickering colored light particles. The cards sport holographic gradient borders, and the progress bars boast a full-spectrum rainbow sweep animation, making the whole thing look incredibly cool. It's like placing a classic arcade cabinet glowing with retro neon lights right on your computer desktop.
body.ja: 新たに「プリズムアーケード（Prism Arcade）」パネルが選べるようになった。深い紫黒色の背景に、中央でゆっくりと回転する虹色の光の輪、そしてランダムに漂う幾何学的な破片（三角形やひし形）と点滅するカラフルな光の粒子が特徴である。カードの枠線にはホログラムのようなグラデーション効果が施され、プログレスバーは全スペクトルの虹色に光が走るアニメーション付きで、非常にクールな仕上がりになっている。レトロなネオンの光に包まれた昔ながらのアーケードゲーム機をパソコンのデスクトップに置いたようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 '프리즘 아케이드(Prism Arcade)' 패널을 고를 수 있다! 짙은 자주색이 섞인 검은색 배경에 한가운데서 천천히 도는 무지갯빛 후광, 무작위로 떠다니는 기하학적 파편(삼각형과 마름모)과 깜빡이는 알록달록한 빛 입자들이 어우러져 있다. 카드 테두리는 홀로그램 그라데이션 효과를 입혔고, 진행 표시줄은 빛이 훑고 지나가는 애니메이션이 달린 모든 스펙트럼의 무지개색이라 무척 멋져 보인다. 레트로 네온 조명으로 가득한 클래식 오락기를 컴퓨터 바탕화면에 가져다 놓은 것과 같다.

items.original: **New "Prism Arcade" panel**: deep purple-black background, Canvas conic rainbow halo rotating slowly, geometric prism shards (triangles/diamonds) drifting randomly, coloured light particles flickering, cards with holographic gradient borders (CSS background-clip technique), full-spectrum rainbow progress bars with sweep animation.

title.zh-TW: 新增黑洞視界面板，動畫背景更清晰、版面更服貼
title.zh-CN: 新增黑洞视界面板，动画背景更清晰、版面更服贴
title.en: Black Hole panel added, and animated backgrounds are now clearer and properly fitted
title.ja: ブラックホールパネルを追加し、アニメーション背景がより鮮明でレイアウトもぴったりに
title.ko: 블랙홀 패널 추가, 애니메이션 배경이 더 선명해지고 화면 배치도 깔끔해짐

body.zh-TW: 現在多了一款「黑洞視界（Black Hole）」面板可以選了！它有著純黑的宇宙背景、120 顆閃爍的星星，中央是一個有著藍紫光暈的事件視界和旋轉的漸層吸積盤，搭配琥珀色的玻璃卡片，科幻感十足。同時，我們把水族箱、稜鏡街機與黑洞視界這三款動畫面板的卡片背景調得更透明，讓背後的動畫能更清楚地透出來；我們也修復了這些面板底部會莫名其妙留白的問題，現在內容會完美撐滿整個視窗高度了。就像是幫家裡的窗戶換了更透光的玻璃，而且原本裝歪、底部漏風的窗框也重新打上矽利康封滿了。
body.zh-CN: 现在多了一款「黑洞视界（Black Hole）」面板可以选了！它有着纯黑的宇宙背景、120 颗闪烁的星星，中央是一个有着蓝紫光晕的事件视界和旋转的渐变吸积盘，搭配琥珀色的玻璃卡片，科幻感十足。同时，我们把水族箱、棱镜街机与黑洞视界这三款动画面板的卡片背景调得更透明，让背后的动画能更清楚地透出来；我们也修复了这些面板底部会莫名其妙留白的问题，现在内容会完美撑满整个窗口高度了。就像是帮家里的窗户换了更透光的玻璃，而且原本装歪、底部漏风的窗框也重新打上硅酮封满了。
body.en: You can now choose the new "Black Hole" panel! It features a pure-black space background with 120 twinkling stars, centered around an event horizon with a blue-purple glow and a rotating gradient accretion disk, paired with amber glass cards for a deeply sci-fi feel. Simultaneously, we've reduced the background opacity of the cards in the Aquarium, Prism Arcade, and Black Hole animated panels, allowing the animations behind them to show through much more clearly. We also fixed an issue where these panels had inexplicable empty space at the bottom, so their content now perfectly stretches to fill the full window height. It's like replacing your home's windows with clearer glass, and finally caulking up the crooked frames that were leaving a drafty gap at the bottom.
body.ja: 新たに「ブラックホール（Black Hole）」パネルが選べるようになった。純黒の宇宙背景に120個の星が瞬き、中央には青紫の光を放つ事象の地平線と回転するグラデーションの降着円盤があり、琥珀色のガラス風カードと組み合わさってSF感満載である。同時に、水族館、プリズムアーケード、ブラックホールの3つのアニメーションパネルにおいて、カードの背景の透明度を高め、背後のアニメーションがよりはっきりと透けて見えるようにした。さらに、これらのパネルの底に不自然な余白ができる問題も修正し、中身がウィンドウの高さ全体にぴったりと収まるようになった。家の窓ガラスをより透明度の高いものに交換し、斜めに取り付けられて隙間風が吹き込んでいた窓枠の底をシリコンでしっかりと塞ぎ直したようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 '블랙홀(Black Hole)' 패널을 고를 수 있다! 순흑색 우주 배경에 120개의 별이 반짝이고, 한가운데는 청보라빛 후광이 도는 사건의 지평선과 회전하는 그라데이션 강착 원반이 있으며, 호박색 유리 카드가 어우러져 SF 느낌이 물씬 풍긴다. 이와 함께 수족관, 프리즘 아케이드, 블랙홀 이 3가지 애니메이션 패널의 카드 배경을 더 투명하게 만들어서 뒤쪽 애니메이션이 한결 또렷하게 비쳐 보이도록 했다. 또한 이 패널들의 바닥에 뜬금없이 빈칸이 남던 문제도 고쳐서, 이제 내용물이 창 높이에 딱 맞게 꽉 찬다. 집 창문을 더 투명한 유리로 바꾸고, 비뚤게 달아 바닥으로 황소바람이 새어 들어오던 창틀을 실리콘으로 빈틈없이 메운 것과 같다.

items.original:
**New "Black Hole" panel**: pure-black space background, Canvas 2D star field (120 stars with twinkling), rotating accretion disk (orange-yellow-white gradient ellipse, Doppler brighter-left/darker-right), photon ring, event horizon with blue-purple glow, orange particles orbiting the ellipse, amber glass cards.
**Fix extra space at bottom of three panels**: added `flex: 1` to `.projects-card` in Aquarium, Prism Arcade, and Black Hole so content fills the full panel height.
**Reduce card opacity in three animated panels**: card background opacity lowered from 0.5–0.75 to 0.14–0.28 in Aquarium, Prism Arcade, and Black Hole so the background animations show through more.

entries: **New "Midnight Aquarium" panel**: sixth built-in panel with a deep-sea animation theme — Canvas 2D bubbles rising from the bottom (42 bubbles with random drift), 4 CSS jellyfish (floating up/down with cyan glow), bioluminescent particles in the background. Glass-morphism cards with backdrop-filter blur, progress bars with a sweeping light animation. Adds i18n key `panel_aquarium` (all 5 languages).

**Fix .app language detection**: switched to `NSLocale.preferredLanguages()` instead of `currentLocale().localeIdentifier()` so the bundle language is no longer overridden by `CFBundleDevelopmentRegion = English` — Traditional Chinese users now see the correct UI language when launching the .app.

title.zh-TW: 新增午夜水族箱面板，打包版 App 終於能聽懂你的語言設定
title.zh-CN: 新增午夜水族箱面板，打包版 App 终于能听懂你的语言设置
title.en: Midnight Aquarium panel added, and the bundled app finally respects your language settings
title.ja: 真夜中の水族館パネルを追加、パッケージ版アプリが言語設定を正しく反映
title.ko: 한밤의 수족관 패널 추가, 패키지 앱이 드디어 언어 설정을 알아들음

body.zh-TW: 現在多了一款「午夜水族箱（Aquarium）」面板可以選了！這是一個深海動畫主題，裡面有 42 顆不斷往上飄移的氣泡、4 隻透著青色光芒上下浮動的水母，還有微微發光的浮游生物，搭配半透明的毛玻璃卡片與掃光特效，非常療癒。此外，之前因為系統設定的衝突，導致你開啟打包版 App 時，系統會直接無視你的電腦語言設定、硬生生塞給你英文介面；現在我們換了另一種打招呼的方式，繁體中文的使用者點開 App 時，終於能立刻看到熟悉的中文介面了。就像是你買了個智慧魚缸，以前它只會對你講英文，現在它終於學會看你家的門牌，開口用你的母語跟你問好了。
body.zh-CN: 现在多了一款「午夜水族箱（Aquarium）」面板可以选了！这是一个深海动画主题，里面有 42 颗不断往上飘移的气泡、4 只透着青色光芒上下浮动的水母，还有微微发光的浮游生物，搭配半透明的毛玻璃卡片与扫光特效，非常疗愈。此外，之前因为系统设置的冲突，导致你开启打包版 App 时，系统会直接无视你的电脑语言设置、硬生生塞给你英文界面；现在我们换了另一种打招呼的方式，繁体中文的用户点开 App 时，终于能立刻看到熟悉的中文界面了。就像是你买了个智能鱼缸，以前它只会对你讲英文，现在它终于学会看你家的门牌，开口用你的母语跟你问好了。
body.en: You can now choose the new "Midnight Aquarium" panel! It's a deep-sea animation theme featuring 42 randomly drifting bubbles rising from the bottom, 4 jellyfish floating up and down with a cyan glow, and bioluminescent particles, all paired with frosted glass cards and sweeping light effects for a truly soothing vibe. Additionally, due to a conflicting system setting, launching the bundled app previously caused the system to completely ignore your computer's language preference and force an English interface on you. We've changed how we ask the system for your preference, so Traditional Chinese users will finally be greeted with a familiar Chinese interface the moment they click the app. It's like buying a smart fish tank that used to only speak English, but has finally learned to read your house's nametag and greet you in your native tongue.
body.ja: 新たに「真夜中の水族館（Aquarium）」パネルが選べるようになった。これは深海のアニメーションをテーマにしており、底から漂い上がる42個の気泡、シアン色の光を放ちながら上下に漂う4匹のクラゲ、そして微かに光るプランクトンが描かれ、半透明のすりガラス風カードと光の掃引エフェクトが組み合わさった非常に癒されるデザインである。さらに、以前はシステム設定の衝突により、パッケージ版アプリを起動した際にパソコンの言語設定が完全に無視され、強引に英語のインターフェースが押し付けられていた。今回、システムへの言語の尋ね方を変えたため、繁体字中国語のユーザーがアプリを開いた時に、ようやく見慣れた中国語の画面が即座に表示されるようになった。以前は英語しか話さなかったスマート水槽を買ってきたが、ようやく家の表札を見て、母国語で挨拶してくれるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 '한밤의 수족관(Aquarium)' 패널을 고를 수 있다! 심해 애니메이션을 주제로 한 이 패널에는 위로 끊임없이 떠오르는 42개의 방울, 청록색 빛을 띠며 위아래로 둥둥 떠다니는 4마리의 해파리, 그리고 은은하게 빛나는 플랑크톤이 반투명한 불투명 유리 카드와 빛이 스쳐 지나가는 효과와 어우러져 무척 마음을 편안하게 해준다. 더불어 예전엔 시스템 설정이 충돌하는 바람에 패키지 앱을 켤 때 시스템이 컴퓨터의 언어 설정을 완전히 무시하고 다짜고짜 영어 화면을 들이밀었지만, 이제는 인사하는 방식을 바꿔 번체 중국어 사용자가 앱을 누르면 마침내 익숙한 중국어 화면을 바로 볼 수 있게 되었다. 예전엔 영어로만 떠들던 스마트 어항을 샀는데, 이제 드디어 당신 집의 문패를 읽고 모국어로 인사할 줄 알게 된 것과 같다.

items.original:
**New "Midnight Aquarium" panel**: sixth built-in panel with a deep-sea animation theme — Canvas 2D bubbles rising from the bottom (42 bubbles with random drift), 4 CSS jellyfish (floating up/down with cyan glow), bioluminescent particles in the background. Glass-morphism cards with backdrop-filter blur, progress bars with a sweeping light animation. Adds i18n key `panel_aquarium` (all 5 languages).
**Fix .app language detection**: switched to `NSLocale.preferredLanguages()` instead of `currentLocale().localeIdentifier()` so the bundle language is no longer overridden by `CFBundleDevelopmentRegion = English` — Traditional Chinese users now see the correct UI language when launching the .app.

entries: **New "Cloud Observation" panel**: fifth built-in panel with a weather-station visual — light blue sky gradient, white cloud layers (with `feGaussianBlur` soft edges), pale contour lines, and translucent glass cards. Light overall tone, with `backdrop-filter` letting the clouds peek through. Adds i18n key `panel_cloud_observation` (all 5 languages).

title.zh-TW: 新增雲圖觀測面板
title.zh-CN: 新增云图观测面板
title.en: New Cloud Observation panel added
title.ja: 雲図観測パネルを追加
title.ko: 구름 관측 패널 추가

body.zh-TW: 現在多了一款「雲圖觀測（Cloud Observation）」面板可以選了！它是我們的第五款內建面板，走的是氣象觀測站的風格——有著淡藍色的天空漸層、邊緣柔和的白色雲層，以及淡淡的等高線。整個介面採用清爽的淺色調，搭配半透明的玻璃卡片效果，讓背後的雲層能若隱若現透出來。就像是你的電腦桌面上開了一扇明亮的小窗戶，隨時都能看著外頭輕柔飄動的白雲。
body.zh-CN: 现在多了一款「云图观测（Cloud Observation）」面板可以选了！它是我们的第五款内建面板，走的是气象观测站的风格——有着淡蓝色的天空渐变、边缘柔和的白色云层，以及淡淡的等高线。整个界面采用清爽的浅色调，搭配半透明的玻璃卡片效果，让背后的云层能若隐若现透出来。就像是你的电脑桌面上开了一扇明亮的小窗户，随时都能看着外头轻柔飘动的白云。
body.en: You can now choose the new "Cloud Observation" panel! It's our fifth built-in panel, featuring a weather-station visual style — a light blue sky gradient, white cloud layers with soft edges, and pale contour lines. The entire interface embraces a crisp, light tone with translucent glass cards, allowing the clouds behind to peek through subtly. It's like opening a bright little window right on your computer desktop, letting you watch the soft, drifting white clouds whenever you like.
body.ja: 新たに「雲図観測（Cloud Observation）」パネルが選べるようになった。5つ目の内蔵パネルとなるこれは、気象観測所のスタイルを採用している。淡いブルーの空のグラデーション、輪郭が柔らかい白い雲の層、そして薄い等高線が特徴である。全体的に爽やかな淡い色調で、半透明のガラスのようなカード効果を組み合わせることで、背後の雲がうっすらと透けて見えるようになっている。パソコンのデスクトップに明るい小さな窓を開け、外をふんわりと漂う白雲をいつでも眺められるようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 '구름 관측(Cloud Observation)' 패널을 고를 수 있다! 다섯 번째 기본 패널로, 기상 관측소 느낌을 살렸다. 연한 파란색 하늘 그라데이션, 가장자리가 부드러운 하얀 구름 층, 그리고 옅은 등고선이 어우러져 있다. 전체적으로 산뜻하고 밝은 톤에 반투명한 유리 카드 효과를 더해, 뒤에 있는 구름 층이 어렴풋이 비쳐 보이게 했다. 컴퓨터 바탕화면에 환한 작은 창문을 열어두고, 밖에서 살랑살랑 떠다니는 흰 구름을 언제든 지켜보는 것과 같다.

items.original: **New "Cloud Observation" panel**: fifth built-in panel with a weather-station visual — light blue sky gradient, white cloud layers (with `feGaussianBlur` soft edges), pale contour lines, and translucent glass cards. Light overall tone, with `backdrop-filter` letting the clouds peek through. Adds i18n key `panel_cloud_observation` (all 5 languages).

entries: **Fix .app launch failure when i18n.json is missing**: py2app now includes `i18n.json` in the resource list, and the menu bar / Web panel loaders prefer the `.app` bundle's `Contents/Resources/i18n.json` before falling back to source-tree paths, preventing the `FileNotFoundError` that broke v0.6.0+ launches.

title.zh-TW: 修正打包版 App 找不到多語系檔而崩潰的問題
title.zh-CN: 修正打包版 App 找不到多语言文件而崩溃的问题
title.en: Fixed bundled app crashing due to a missing translation file
title.ja: パッケージ版アプリが多言語ファイルを見つけられずにクラッシュする問題を修正
title.ko: 패키지 앱이 다국어 파일을 찾지 못해 튕기던 문제 수정

body.zh-TW: 之前直接點擊安裝好的 App 啟動時，因為打包軟體漏掉了一份多語系檔（i18n.json），導致系統一開機就找不到檔案而直接閃退崩潰。現在我們把這份負責翻譯的檔案正確包進去了，而且系統也學會優先從 App 自己的肚子裡找檔案。就像是買了進口家電，以前箱子裡漏放了翻譯說明書，你一開機就完全無法使用；現在原廠已經把說明書乖乖塞進包裝盒，拿出來就能直接懂它的語言了。
body.zh-CN: 之前直接点击安装好的 App 启动时，因为打包软件漏掉了一份多语言文件（i18n.json），导致系统一开机就找不到文件而直接闪退崩溃。现在我们把这份负责翻译的文件正确包进去了，而且系统也学会优先从 App 自己的肚子里找文件。就像是买了进口家电，以前箱子里漏放了翻译说明书，你一开机就完全无法使用；现在原厂已经把说明书乖乖塞进包装盒，拿出来就能直接懂它的语言了。
body.en: Previously, when launching the compiled App directly, a missing translation file (`i18n.json`) caused the system to panic and crash immediately on startup. We've now properly packed this responsible language file inside, and the system has learned to prioritize looking inside its own app bundle for it. It's like buying an imported appliance where the box used to be missing the translated manual, leaving you completely stuck on power-up; now the manufacturer has properly tucked the manual into the packaging so you can understand its language right out of the box.
body.ja: 以前はインストール済みのアプリを直接クリックして起動した際、パッケージソフトが多言語ファイル（i18n.json）を入れ忘れていたため、システムが起動直後にファイルを見つけられず、即座にクラッシュして強制終了していた。今回、この翻訳を担当するファイルを正しく梱包し、システムも優先的にアプリ自身の中身からファイルを探すように改善された。輸入家電を買った時、以前は箱の中に翻訳済みの説明書が入っておらず、電源を入れても全く使えなかったのが、今ではメーカーがきちんと箱に説明書を入れており、取り出してすぐにその言語が理解できるようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 예전엔 설치된 앱을 직접 눌러 실행할 때, 패키징 소프트웨어가 다국어 파일(i18n.json)을 빼먹는 바람에 시스템이 켜지자마자 파일을 찾지 못하고 곧바로 튕기며 꺼져버렸다. 이제는 이 번역을 맡은 파일을 제대로 포장해 넣었고, 시스템도 앱 자신의 배 속에서 먼저 파일을 찾도록 배웠다. 수입 가전제품을 샀는데 예전엔 상자에 번역된 설명서가 빠져 있어 전원을 켜도 도무지 쓸 수 없었던 것을, 이제는 제조사가 포장 상자에 설명서를 얌전히 넣어 두어 꺼내자마자 그 언어를 알아들을 수 있게 된 것과 같다.

items.original: **Fix .app launch failure when i18n.json is missing**: py2app now includes `i18n.json` in the resource list, and the menu bar / Web panel loaders prefer the `.app` bundle's `Contents/Resources/i18n.json` before falling back to source-tree paths, preventing the `FileNotFoundError` that broke v0.6.0+ launches.

entries: **Burn-rate warning false positives**: after v0.6.6 shipped, real-world testing showed the red warning firing at 1% / 14% / 36% used right after restart, because a 2-point slope based on only 2-3 fresh samples is unstable and low-percent forecasts have huge headroom regardless. Fix adds two guardrails: forecasting only runs when the last-10-minute window holds ≥ 5 samples spanning ≥ 5 minutes; the warning only replaces the reset line when the current percent is ≥ 50%. Otherwise the original "Resets in X" text stays.

title.zh-TW: 解決剛啟動時燃燒速度警告誤判的問題
title.zh-CN: 解决刚启动时燃烧速度警告误判的问题
title.en: Fixed false burn-rate warnings triggering right after startup
title.ja: 起動直後に消費ペースの警告が誤作動する問題を解決
title.ko: 프로그램 실행 직후 소모 속도 경고가 잘못 울리던 문제 해결

body.zh-TW: 之前因為用來預測用完時間的樣本數太少，導致程式剛啟動、明明只用了 1% 或 14% 的極低額度時，也會嚇人地跳出紅字警告。現在我們加了兩道安全閥：第一，系統必須收集夠多且夠久的樣本（10 分鐘內至少 5 個、跨度 5 分鐘）才會開始預估；第二，只有當你已經用掉至少 50% 額度時，警告才會真的顯示出來，否則一律保持原本的「重置 X 分鐘」。就像是剛開始跑步的第一分鐘即使衝很快，教練也不會馬上警告你體力透支，而是等你跑了一小段、而且體力真的消耗過半了，才會根據穩定的步伐來提醒你。
body.zh-CN: 之前因为用来预测用完时间的样本数太少，导致程序刚启动、明明只用了 1% 或 14% 的极低额度时，也会吓人地跳出红字警告。现在我们加了两道安全阀：第一，系统必须收集够多且够久的样本（10 分钟内至少 5 个、跨度 5 分钟）才会开始预估；第二，只有当你已经用掉至少 50% 额度时，警告才会真的显示出来，否则一律保持原本的「重置 X 分钟」。就像是刚开始跑步的第一分钟即使冲很快，教练也不会马上警告你体力透支，而是等你跑了一小段、而且体力真的消耗过半了，才会根据稳定的步伐来提醒你。
body.en: Previously, because there weren't enough samples to reliably project depletion times, the app would startlingly throw red warnings right after starting up, even when you'd barely used 1% or 14% of your quota. We've now added two safety valves: first, the system must collect enough samples over a sufficient period (at least 5 samples spanning 5 minutes) before it begins estimating; second, the warning only actually displays when you've consumed at least 50% of your quota. Otherwise, it simply keeps the standard "Resets in X" text. It's like sprinting for the very first minute of a run — your coach won't instantly warn you of exhaustion, but will wait until you've settled into a pace and actually drained half your stamina before giving a reliable heads-up.
body.ja: 以前は使い切る時間を予測するためのサンプル数が少なすぎたため、プログラムを起動した直後、まだ1%や14%といった極めて低い配額しか使っていないにもかかわらず、驚かせるような赤字の警告が出てしまうことがあった。今回、2つの安全弁を追加した。まず、システムは十分な数と期間のサンプル（10分間に少なくとも5つのサンプルがあり、5分以上の間隔があること）を集めないと予測を開始しない。次に、配額を少なくとも50%消費して初めて警告が実際に表示されるようになり、それまでは常に元の「リセットまでX分」のままとなる。走り始めた最初の1分間だけ猛ダッシュしたとしても、コーチがすぐに体力切れを警告するのではなく、少し走り続けて実際に体力を半分以上消耗してから、安定したペースに基づいて注意を促すようなものである。
body.ko: 예전엔 바닥나는 시간을 예측하기 위한 표본 수가 너무 적어서, 프로그램을 갓 켰을 때 할당량을 고작 1%나 14%밖에 쓰지 않았는데도 사람 놀라게 빨간색 경고를 띄우곤 했다. 이제 두 가지 안전장치를 달았다. 첫째, 시스템이 충분히 많고 긴 표본(10분 안에 표본 최소 5개, 5분 이상 간격)을 모아야만 예측을 시작한다. 둘째, 할당량을 최소 50% 이상 써야만 경고가 실제로 나타나고, 그 전에는 무조건 원래의 '초기화 X분'을 유지한다. 달리기를 갓 시작한 1분 동안 아무리 전력 질주를 해도 코치가 당장 체력 고갈을 경고하지 않고, 조금 더 달린 뒤 진짜 체력이 절반 넘게 깎였을 때 안정된 페이스를 보고 주의를 주는 것과 같다.

items.original: **Burn-rate warning false positives**: after v0.6.6 shipped, real-world testing showed the red warning firing at 1% / 14% / 36% used right after restart, because a 2-point slope based on only 2-3 fresh samples is unstable and low-percent forecasts have huge headroom regardless. Fix adds two guardrails: forecasting only runs when the last-10-minute window holds ≥ 5 samples spanning ≥ 5 minutes; the warning only replaces the reset line when the current percent is ≥ 50%. Otherwise the original "Resets in X" text stays.

entries: **Burn-rate warning**: when usage projects you'll exhaust a quota before the window resets at your current pace, the normal "Resets in X" line is replaced by a red warning: "⚠ Empty in X (resets in Y)". When you're not burning hot, the panel looks exactly the same as before — no extra noise. Covers Claude Code Session / Weekly and Codex Session / Weekly (all 4 quotas), with theme-matched reds on Classic / Matrix / Newspaper / Win95. Internally it samples percent on a 15-minute rolling buffer and projects from the last-10-minute slope; samples are cleared on quota reset to avoid false alarms.

title.zh-TW: 額度快用完時，會出現紅字警告
title.zh-CN: 额度快用完时，会出现红字警告
title.en: Red warning appears when quotas are burning out too fast
title.ja: クオータが枯渇しそうな時に、赤字の警告が出るようになった
title.ko: 할당량을 다 써갈 때 빨간색 경고가 나타남

body.zh-TW: 當系統預估你照目前狂用的速度，會在額度重置前先把配額燒光時，原本顯示「重置 X 分鐘」的地方會自動換成一句紅色的警告：「⚠ 剩 X 分用完（重置還要 Y 分）」。當你沒在大量消耗時，面板長得跟平常一模一樣，完全不打擾你。這項警告涵蓋了 Claude Code 與 Codex 的 4 種額度，而且在不同的面板主題上，還會貼心搭配不同風格的紅色。就像是你開車時，平常油表只會安靜指著剩餘油量，但當你猛踩油門、油箱快見底又還沒開到下一個加油站時，它就會立刻亮起紅燈警告你。
body.zh-CN: 当系统预估你照目前狂用的速度，会在额度重置前先把配额烧光时，原本显示「重置 X 分钟」的地方会自动换成一句红色的警告：「⚠ 剩 X 分用完（重置还要 Y 分）」。当你没在大量消耗时，面板长得跟平常一模一样，完全不打扰你。这项警告涵盖了 Claude Code 与 Codex 的 4 种额度，而且在不同的面板主题上，还会贴心搭配不同风格的红色。就像是你开车时，平常油表只会安静指着剩余油量，但当你猛踩油门、油箱快见底又还没开到下一个加油站时，它就会立刻亮起红灯警告你。
body.en: When the system estimates that, at your current burning pace, you'll exhaust your quota before the window resets, the normal "Resets in X" text is automatically replaced by a red warning: "⚠ Empty in X (resets in Y)". When you aren't consuming heavily, the panel looks exactly the same as always, causing zero distraction. This warning covers all 4 quotas across Claude Code and Codex, and even sports theme-matched shades of red depending on your chosen panel. It's like driving a car: normally the fuel gauge quietly points to the remaining gas, but when you floor the pedal and are about to run dry before reaching the next gas station, a red light immediately flashes to warn you.
body.ja: 現在の激しい消費ペースのままではリセット前にクオータ（配額）を使い切ってしまうとシステムが予測した際、本来「リセットまでX分」と表示される部分が自動的に赤い警告文「⚠ 残りX分で枯渇（リセットまでY分）」に切り替わる。大量に消費していない時はパネルは普段と全く同じ見た目で、邪魔になることはない。この警告は Claude Code と Codex の4種類のクオータすべてを網羅しており、異なるパネルのテーマに合わせてそれぞれ異なるスタイルの赤色が用意されている。車を運転している時、普段は燃料計が静かに残量を示しているだけだが、アクセルをベタ踏みして次のガソリンスタンドに着く前にタンクが空になりそうな時には、即座に赤いランプが点灯して警告してくるようなものである。
body.ko: 지금처럼 미친 듯이 쓰는 속도라면 할당량이 초기화되기 전에 다 써버릴 것이라고 시스템이 예상하면, 원래 '초기화 X분'이라고 적히던 자리가 빨간색 경고 문구인 '⚠ X분 뒤 다 씀(초기화까지 Y분)'으로 알아서 바뀐다. 평소처럼 얌전히 쓸 때는 패널이 원래 모습 그대로여서 전혀 거슬리지 않는다. 이 경고는 Claude Code와 Codex의 4가지 할당량에 모두 적용되며, 여러 패널 테마에 맞춰 각각 다른 느낌의 빨간색으로 세심하게 칠해진다. 차를 몰 때 평소엔 연료 게이지가 조용히 남은 기름양만 가리키지만, 액셀을 꽉 밟아 다음 주유소에 닿기도 전에 기름통이 바닥나려 하면 즉시 빨간불을 켜서 경고해 주는 것과 같다.

items.original: **Burn-rate warning**: when usage projects you'll exhaust a quota before the window resets at your current pace, the normal "Resets in X" line is replaced by a red warning: "⚠ Empty in X (resets in Y)". When you're not burning hot, the panel looks exactly the same as before — no extra noise. Covers Claude Code Session / Weekly and Codex Session / Weekly (all 4 quotas), with theme-matched reds on Classic / Matrix / Newspaper / Win95. Internally it samples percent on a 15-minute rolling buffer and projects from the last-10-minute slope; samples are cleared on quota reset to avoid false alarms.

entries: **Launch at Login toggle**: the panel-switcher menu (opened from the "Switch Panel" button) gains a checkable "Launch at Login" item. Ticking it makes usage start automatically at next login, so you don't have to relaunch it manually. The .app and source builds each generate the matching LaunchAgent plist; unticking only removes the plist — it never quits a running app.
README "Auto-start on login" section now documents the popover toggle (Traditional Chinese / English).

title.zh-TW: 新增「開機自動啟動」開關
title.zh-CN: 新增「开机自动启动」开关
title.en: Added a "Launch at Login" toggle
title.ja: 「ログイン時に自動起動」のスイッチを追加
title.ko: '로그인 시 자동 실행' 스위치 추가

body.zh-TW: 現在你可以在「更換面板」的選單裡，找到一個新的「開機自動啟動」選項。只要打個勾，下次登入電腦時這款 App 就會自己啟動，不用再每次手動打開了。如果你取消勾選，系統只會把自動啟動的設定檔（plist）拿掉，並不會把正在執行中的程式關掉。就像是幫每天早上都要用到的烤麵包機插上定時插座，起床就能直接用；拔掉插座也只是明天不會自動烤，現在正在烤的麵包還是會乖乖烤完。
body.zh-CN: 现在你可以在「更换面板」的菜单里，找到一个新的「开机自动启动」选项。只要打个勾，下次登录电脑时这款 App 就会自己启动，不用再每次手动打开了。如果你取消勾选，系统只会把自动启动的配置文件（plist）拿掉，并不会把正在运行中的程序关掉。就像是帮每天早上都要用到的烤面包机插上定时插座，起床就能直接用；拔掉插座也只是明天不会自动烤，现在正在烤的面包还是会乖乖烤完。
body.en: You can now find a new "Launch at Login" option in the panel-switcher menu. Just tick the checkbox, and the app will start itself automatically the next time you log into your computer, saving you from opening it manually every time. If you untick it, the system simply removes the auto-start config file (plist) and will never force-quit the running app. It's like plugging your daily toaster into a smart timer so it's ready when you wake up; unplugging the timer just means it won't start on its own tomorrow, but the bread currently toasting will still finish perfectly.
body.ja: 「パネルの切り替え」メニュー内に、新たに「ログイン時に自動起動」のオプションが追加された。チェックを入れるだけで、次回パソコンにログインした際にこのアプリが自動的に起動するようになり、毎回手動で開く手間が省ける。チェックを外した場合、システムは自動起動の設定ファイル（plist）を削除するだけであり、実行中のプログラムが勝手に終了することはない。毎朝使うトースターをタイマー付きコンセントに繋いでおき、起きたらすぐ使えるようにするのと同じである。コンセントを抜いても明日から自動で焼けなくなるだけで、今焼いているパンはちゃんと最後まで焼き上がる。
body.ko: 이제 '패널 바꾸기' 메뉴에서 '로그인 시 자동 실행'이라는 새로운 옵션을 찾을 수 있다. 체크 표시만 해두면 다음번 컴퓨터에 로그인할 때 이 앱이 알아서 켜지니 매번 직접 켤 필요가 없다. 체크를 해제하면 시스템은 자동 실행 설정 파일(plist)만 치울 뿐, 지금 켜져 있는 프로그램까지 꺼버리진 않는다. 매일 아침 쓰는 토스터에 타이머 콘센트를 꽂아 두고 일어나자마자 곧바로 쓰는 것과 같다. 콘센트를 뽑는다고 해도 내일부터 알아서 구워지지 않을 뿐이지, 지금 굽고 있는 빵은 얌전히 끝까지 구워낸다.

items.original:
**Launch at Login toggle**: the panel-switcher menu (opened from the "Switch Panel" button) gains a checkable "Launch at Login" item. Ticking it makes usage start automatically at next login, so you don't have to relaunch it manually. The .app and source builds each generate the matching LaunchAgent plist; unticking only removes the plist — it never quits a running app.
README "Auto-start on login" section now documents the popover toggle (Traditional Chinese / English).

entries: **Newspaper panel**: a fourth built-in panel recreating a vintage newspaper front page — aged newsprint background, serif ink type, double-rule page border, newspaper-style section headings, hairline row dividers, solid ink progress bars. Card layout and data logic match the Classic panel; only the CSS styling differs.

**Traditional Chinese systems detected as Simplified Chinese**: `_detect_language()` read `NSLocale.languageCode`, which returns a bare `"zh"` with no region, so Traditional Chinese systems were normalized to Simplified. It now reads `localeIdentifier` (e.g. `zh_TW`), which keeps the region, so Traditional Chinese systems display Traditional Chinese correctly.
README panel section updated to show all four panels side-by-side (Traditional Chinese / English).

title.zh-TW: 新增復古報紙面板，繁體中文系統不再誤判成簡體
title.zh-CN: 新增复古报纸面板，繁体中文系统不再误判成简体
title.en: Newspaper panel added, and Traditional Chinese systems are no longer misidentified as Simplified
title.ja: レトロ新聞パネルを追加し、繁体字中国語システムの誤判定を修正
title.ko: 레트로 신문 패널 추가, 번체 중국어 시스템이 간체로 잘못 인식되던 문제 수정

body.zh-TW: 現在多了一款「復古報紙（Newspaper）」面板可以選了！它重現了舊報紙頭版的風格，有著泛黃的紙張底色、明體油墨字和傳統報紙的排版，裡面的資料邏輯則跟預設面板一模一樣。另外，以前系統在偵測語言時，只看到你用的是「中文」，就擅自把你當成簡體中文使用者；現在系統學會看更完整的地區資訊，繁體中文的系統終於能正確顯示繁體中文了。就像是寄信時只寫了「某某路」，郵差總是不小心投錯鄰居的信箱，現在補上了完整的門牌號碼，信件終於能精準送達你家了。
body.zh-CN: 现在多了一款「复古报纸（Newspaper）」面板可以选了！它重现了旧报纸头版的风格，有着泛黄的纸张底色、宋体油墨字和传统报纸的排版，里面的资料逻辑则跟默认面板一模一样。另外，以前系统在侦测语言时，只看到你用的是「中文」，就擅自把你当成简体中文用户；现在系统学会看更完整的地区信息，繁体中文的系统终于能正确显示繁体中文了。就像是寄信时只写了「某某路」，邮递员总是不小心投错邻居的信箱，现在补上了完整的门牌号码，信件终于能精准送达你家了。
body.en: You can now choose the new "Newspaper" panel! It recreates the look of a vintage newspaper front page, featuring an aged newsprint background, serif ink type, and traditional newspaper layouts, while keeping the data logic exactly the same as the default panel. Also, when detecting your language previously, the system only saw "Chinese" and presumed you were a Simplified Chinese user; it has now learned to read the full region info, so Traditional Chinese systems finally display in Traditional Chinese correctly. It's like addressing a letter with only the street name, making the postman constantly drop it in the neighbor's mailbox — now that the full house number is added, the mail finally reaches your door accurately.
body.ja: 新たに「レトロ新聞（Newspaper）」パネルが選べるようになった。古びた紙の背景色、明朝体のインク文字、そして伝統的な新聞のレイアウトで古い新聞の1面風スタイルを再現しており、中のデータロジックはデフォルトパネルと全く同じである。また、言語を検出する際、以前は「中国語」であることだけを見て勝手に簡体字ユーザーだと判定していたが、システムがより詳細な地域情報を読み取るようになり、繁体字中国語のシステムで正しく繁体字が表示されるようになった。手紙を送る時に「〇〇通り」としか書かず、郵便配達員がいつも隣人のポストに誤配していたのが、完全な番地を補ったことでようやく自分の家に正確に届くようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 '레트로 신문(Newspaper)' 패널을 고를 수 있다! 누렇게 바랜 종이 바탕, 명조체 잉크 글씨와 전통 신문 배치 등 옛날 신문 1면 느낌을 재현했으며, 안의 데이터 로직은 기본 패널과 완전히 같다. 또한 예전엔 시스템이 언어를 확인할 때 당신이 '중국어'를 쓴다는 것만 보고 제멋대로 간체 중국어 사용자라고 취급했지만, 이제는 시스템이 지역 정보까지 꼼꼼히 살필 줄 알게 되어 번체 중국어 시스템이 마침내 번체 중국어를 올바르게 띄워준다. 편지를 보낼 때 'ㅇㅇ 길'이라고만 적는 바람에 집배원이 매번 이웃집 우체통에 잘못 넣던 것을, 이제 번지수까지 제대로 적어 마침내 편지가 당신 집으로 정확히 배달되는 것과 같다.

items.original:
**Newspaper panel**: a fourth built-in panel recreating a vintage newspaper front page — aged newsprint background, serif ink type, double-rule page border, newspaper-style section headings, hairline row dividers, solid ink progress bars. Card layout and data logic match the Classic panel; only the CSS styling differs.
**Traditional Chinese systems detected as Simplified Chinese**: `_detect_language()` read `NSLocale.languageCode`, which returns a bare `"zh"` with no region, so Traditional Chinese systems were normalized to Simplified. It now reads `localeIdentifier` (e.g. `zh_TW`), which keeps the region, so Traditional Chinese systems display Traditional Chinese correctly.
README panel section updated to show all four panels side-by-side (Traditional Chinese / English).

entries: **Windows 95 panel**: a third built-in panel recreating the classic Windows 95 desktop — teal wallpaper, navy gradient title bars, grey 3D outset windows, chunked segmented progress bars, raised plastic buttons, Tahoma type.

**Per-panel window size**: `HTMLPanel` gains `width` / `height` parameters so each panel can use a popover size that fits its content (default stays 364×812). The Windows 95 panel is more compact and uses 364×768.
README panel section updated to show all three panels side-by-side (Traditional Chinese / English).

title.zh-TW: 新增視窗 95 面板，而且視窗大小會為面板量身打造
title.zh-CN: 新增视窗 95 面板，而且视窗大小会为面板量身打造
title.en: Windows 95 panel added, and window sizes are now tailor-made for each panel
title.ja: ウィンドウズ 95 パネルを追加し、ウィンドウサイズもパネルに合わせて最適化
title.ko: 윈도우 95 패널 추가, 패널에 맞춰 창 크기도 맞춤 조절

body.zh-TW: 現在多了一款「視窗 95（Windows 95）」面板可以選了！它完美重現了經典的作業系統桌面，有著藍綠色桌布、漸層標題列、灰色 3D 視窗和微凸的塑膠按鈕。同時，系統現在學會了依據每個面板的內容多寡，自動調整彈出視窗（popover）的大小。像視窗 95 面板內容比較精簡，視窗就會自動縮短一些。就像你買衣服，以前不管高矮胖瘦都只能穿均碼，現在每件衣服都會自動幫你修改到最合身的長度。
body.zh-CN: 现在多了一款「视窗 95（Windows 95）」面板可以选了！它完美重现了经典的操作系统桌面，有着蓝绿色壁纸、渐变标题栏、灰色 3D 视窗和微凸的塑料按钮。同时，系统现在学会了依据每个面板的内容多寡，自动调整弹出窗口（popover）的大小。像视窗 95 面板内容比较精简，窗口就会自动缩短一些。就像你买衣服，以前不管高矮胖瘦都只能穿均码，现在每件衣服都会自动帮你修改到最合身的长度。
body.en: You can now choose the new "Windows 95" panel! It perfectly recreates the classic operating system desktop, featuring a teal wallpaper, a navy gradient title bar, grey 3D windows, and raised plastic buttons. At the same time, the system has learned to automatically adjust the size of the popover based on how much content each panel has. Since the Windows 95 panel is more compact, its window automatically becomes a bit shorter. It's like buying clothes — previously everyone had to wear one-size-fits-all regardless of their height, but now every piece is automatically tailored to your perfect fit.
body.ja: 新たに「ウィンドウズ 95（Windows 95）」パネルが選べるようになった。ブルーグリーンの壁紙、グラデーションのタイトルバー、灰色の3Dウィンドウ、少し盛り上がったプラスチック調のボタンなど、昔ながらの OS デスクトップを完璧に再現している。同時に、システムが各パネルのコンテンツの量に合わせてポップアップウィンドウ（popover）のサイズを自動調整できるようになった。ウィンドウズ 95 パネルは中身がコンパクトなので、ウィンドウも自動的に少し短くなる。服を買う時、以前は背格好に関係なくフリーサイズを着るしかなかったのが、今は一着一着が自分に一番合う丈に自動で仕立て直されるようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 '윈도우 95(Windows 95)' 패널을 고를 수 있다! 청록색 바탕화면, 그라데이션 제목 표시줄, 회색 3D 창과 볼록한 플라스틱 버튼 등 고전적인 운영체제 바탕화면을 완벽하게 재현했다. 이와 함께 시스템이 각 패널의 내용물 양에 맞춰 팝업 창(popover)의 크기를 알아서 조절하는 법을 배웠다. 윈도우 95 패널은 내용이 짤막한 편이라 창도 알아서 조금 짧아진다. 옷을 살 때 예전엔 키나 덩치에 상관없이 한 사이즈만 입어야 했던 것이, 이제는 모든 옷이 나에게 딱 맞는 길이로 알아서 수선되어 나오는 것과 같다.

items.original:
**Windows 95 panel**: a third built-in panel recreating the classic Windows 95 desktop — teal wallpaper, navy gradient title bars, grey 3D outset windows, chunked segmented progress bars, raised plastic buttons, Tahoma type.
**Per-panel window size**: `HTMLPanel` gains `width` / `height` parameters so each panel can use a popover size that fits its content (default stays 364x812). The Windows 95 panel is more compact and uses 364x768.
README panel section updated to show all three panels side-by-side (Traditional Chinese / English).

entries: **Matrix panel "Project Usage" folder icon missing**: each card carried an inline `style="--accent: var(--accent)"` — a self-referential cyclic CSS variable. Per the CSS spec, cyclic var() resolves to invalid-at-computed-value-time and unsets the property, so the inline SVG's `stroke="var(--accent)"` had no color and rendered transparent. Claude / Codex cards use `` so they were unaffected, but the projects card's inline SVG folder icon disappeared. `--accent` is already defined on `:root` and inherits to all descendants, so the per-card overrides were meaningless — removing them restores the icon.

title.zh-TW: 駭客任務面板的專案用量圖示回來了
title.zh-CN: 黑客帝国面板的项目用量图标回来了
title.en: The project usage icon is back on the Matrix panel
title.ja: マトリックスパネルのプロジェクト使用量アイコンが復活
title.ko: 매트릭스 패널의 프로젝트 사용량 아이콘이 돌아옴

body.zh-TW: 之前在駭客任務（Matrix）面板裡，「專案用量」卡片上的資料夾圖示不見了。這是因為程式碼裡不小心寫了一段無限迴圈的顏色設定（CSS 變數自己參考自己），導致系統不知所措，直接把圖示變成透明的。我們現在把那段多餘的設定移除了，資料夾圖示就正常顯示了。就像是油漆工不小心把顏料罐的標籤貼成了「這罐顏料的顏色」，結果不知道該塗什麼顏色就乾脆不塗，現在把亂標的標籤撕掉，終於塗上正確的顏色了。
body.zh-CN: 之前在黑客帝国（Matrix）面板里，「项目用量」卡片上的文件夹图标不见了。这是因为代码里不小心写了一段无限循环的颜色设置（CSS 变量自己参考自己），导致系统不知所措，直接把图标变成透明的。我们现在把那段多余的设置移除了，文件夹图标就正常显示了。就像是油漆工不小心把颜料罐的标签贴成了「这罐颜料的颜色」，结果不知道该涂什么颜色就干脆不涂，现在把乱标的标签撕掉，终于涂上正确的颜色了。
body.en: Previously, on the Matrix panel, the folder icon on the "Project Usage" card disappeared. This happened because a cyclic color setting (a CSS variable referencing itself) was accidentally written into the code, causing the system to throw its hands up and render the icon completely transparent. We have now removed that redundant setting, and the folder icon displays normally again. It's like a painter accidentally labeling a paint can "the color of this paint" and ending up painting nothing out of confusion; now that the bad label is peeled off, the correct color is finally applied.
body.ja: 以前、マトリックス（Matrix）パネルにおいて、「プロジェクト使用量」カードのフォルダアイコンが消えていた。これは、コード内に無限ループとなる色の設定（CSS変数が自分自身を参照するもの）が誤って記述されており、システムが処理できずにアイコンを透明にしてしまったのが原因である。その余計な設定を削除したため、フォルダアイコンは正常に表示されるようになった。ペンキ職人が塗料の缶に誤って「この塗料の色」というラベルを貼ってしまい、何色を塗ればいいか分からず全く塗らなかったのが、でたらめなラベルを剥がしたことでようやく正しい色が塗られたようなものである。
body.ko: 예전엔 매트릭스(Matrix) 패널에서 '프로젝트 사용량' 카드의 폴더 아이콘이 보이지 않았다. 코드 안에 무한 반복되는 색상 설정(CSS 변수가 자기 자신을 참조하는 현상)을 실수로 적어 놔서, 시스템이 어찌할 바를 모르고 아이콘을 아예 투명하게 만들어버렸기 때문이다. 이제 그 쓸데없는 설정을 지웠으니 폴더 아이콘이 멀쩡하게 잘 보인다. 페인트공이 실수로 페인트 통에 '이 페인트의 색깔'이라는 이름표를 붙이는 바람에 무슨 색을 칠해야 할지 몰라 아예 안 칠해버렸던 것을, 이제 엉터리 이름표를 떼어내어 제대로 색을 칠하게 된 것과 같다.

items.original: **Matrix panel "Project Usage" folder icon missing**: each card carried an inline `style="--accent: var(--accent)"` — a self-referential cyclic CSS variable. Per the CSS spec, cyclic var() resolves to invalid-at-computed-value-time and unsets the property, so the inline SVG's `stroke="var(--accent)"` had no color and rendered transparent. Claude / Codex cards use `` so they were unaffected, but the projects card's inline SVG folder icon disappeared. `--accent` is already defined on `:root` and inherits to all descendants, so the per-card overrides were meaningless — removing them restores the icon.

entries: **Matrix panel**: a second built-in panel — black background, neon green type, falling digital rain. Card layout, progress bars, project ranking, and footer all match the Classic panel; only the palette and background differ. Toggle via the `⇄ Switch panel` button in the popover.
README now shows Matrix panel screenshots (Traditional Chinese / English) side-by-side with Classic.

Matrix panel title `line-height: 1` clipped CJK ascenders and the `text-shadow` glow (e.g. `專案用量`, `プロジェクト使用量`) at the card edge; bumped to `1.25` so titles render fully in all five languages and stay vertically aligned with the 30×30 icon.

title.zh-TW: 新增駭客任務面板，標題文字不再被裁切
title.zh-CN: 新增黑客帝国面板，标题文字不再被裁切
title.en: New Matrix panel added, and title text is no longer clipped
title.ja: マトリックス風パネルを追加し、タイトル文字が途切れる問題を解消
title.ko: 매트릭스 패널 추가, 제목 글자가 더 이상 잘리지 않음

body.zh-TW: 現在多了一款「駭客任務（Matrix）」面板可以選了！它有著黑底、螢光綠字，還有經典的數位雨動畫。裡面的版面跟預設的面板一模一樣，只要點擊「⇄ 更換面板」按鈕就能切換。同時，我們也把面板標題的行高（line-height，文字的上下空間）稍微拉高，這樣中文或日文標題上的筆畫跟發光效果就不會被卡片邊緣無情地切掉了。就像是幫招牌換了個超酷的霓虹燈新造型，而且還把招牌框稍微做大一點，讓所有的字都能完整透出光芒。
body.zh-CN: 现在多了一款「黑客帝国（Matrix）」面板可以选了！它有着黑底、荧光绿字，还有经典的数字雨动画。里面的版面跟默认的面板一模一样，只要点击「⇄ 更换面板」按钮就能切换。同时，我们也把面板标题的行高（line-height，文字的上下空间）稍微拉高，这样中文或日文标题上的笔画跟发光效果就不会被卡片边缘无情地切掉了。就像是帮招牌换了个超酷的霓虹灯新造型，而且还把招牌框稍微做大一点，让所有的字都能完整透出光芒。
body.en: You can now choose the new "Matrix" panel! It features a black background, neon green type, and the classic falling digital rain animation. The layout inside is exactly the same as the default panel, and you can switch to it simply by clicking the "⇄ Switch panel" button. At the same time, we slightly increased the panel title's line-height (the vertical space for text) so that the strokes and glow effects on Chinese or Japanese titles are no longer mercilessly clipped at the card's edge. It's like giving a storefront sign a cool new neon look, while also making the frame a bit larger so all the glowing letters fit perfectly.
body.ja: 新たに「マトリックス（Matrix）」パネルが選べるようになった。黒背景にネオングリーンの文字、そして定番のデジタル雨のスクロールアニメーションが特徴である。中のレイアウトはデフォルトのパネルと全く同じで、「⇄ パネル切り替え」ボタンをクリックするだけで変更できる。同時に、パネルタイトルの行高（line-height、文字の上下の空間）を少し広げ、中国語や日本語のタイトルにおける画や発光効果がカードの端で無情に切り取られるのを防いだ。看板をクールなネオンの新しいデザインに変えると同時に、すべての文字の光が完全に収まるよう枠を少し大きくしたようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 '매트릭스(Matrix)' 패널을 고를 수 있다! 검은 바탕에 형광 초록색 글씨, 그리고 클래식한 디지털 비 애니메이션이 특징이다. 안쪽 배치는 기본 패널과 똑같으며, '⇄ 패널 바꾸기' 버튼을 눌러 바로 전환할 수 있다. 이와 함께 패널 제목의 줄 높이(line-height, 글자 위아래 공간)를 살짝 늘려서, 중국어나 일본어 제목의 획이나 발광 효과가 카드 가장자리에 무참히 잘려 나가는 일이 없도록 했다. 간판을 멋진 네온사인 디자인으로 바꾸면서, 빛나는 글자가 모두 온전히 들어가도록 테두리를 조금 더 크게 만든 것과 같다.

items.original:
**Matrix panel**: a second built-in panel — black background, neon green type, falling digital rain. Card layout, progress bars, project ranking, and footer all match the Classic panel; only the palette and background differ. Toggle via the `⇄ Switch panel` button in the popover.
README now shows Matrix panel screenshots (Traditional Chinese / English) side-by-side with Classic.
Matrix panel title `line-height: 1` clipped CJK ascenders and the `text-shadow` glow (e.g. `專案用量`, `プロジェクト使用量`) at the card edge; bumped to `1.25` so titles render fully in all five languages and stay vertically aligned with the 30x30 icon.

entries: **Multi-language UI (i18n)**: automatically detects the macOS system language and displays the interface in Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, or Korean. No configuration needed.
**`USAGE_LANG` environment variable**: force a specific language (e.g. `USAGE_LANG=ja`) for development and testing.
**License changed from MIT to AGPL-3.0**: modified versions that are distributed must be open-sourced.
**Attribution footer in popover**: `based on usage by lollapalooza` shown at the bottom of the panel.
Removed hardcoded Chinese status strings (e.g. `✓ 已同步`) from `usage_client.py`; all status text now goes through the i18n system.

title.zh-TW: 介面自動說你的語言，五種語言隨系統切換
title.zh-CN: 界面自动说你的语言，五种语言随系统切换
title.en: The interface now speaks your language, switching between five languages with your system
title.ja: インターフェースが自動であなたの言語を話す、システムに合わせて五言語を切り替える
title.ko: 인터페이스가 자동으로 당신의 언어를 쓴다, 시스템에 맞춰 5개 언어를 전환한다

body.zh-TW: 你的面板會自動變成你電腦的語言。usage 現在會偵測 macOS 系統語言，自動把整個介面切成繁體中文、簡體中文、英文、日文或韓文，不用設定——系統是什麼語言就顯示什麼。以前介面的狀態文字（像「✓ 已同步」）是硬寫死的中文，現在全改交給一套多語系系統（i18n，把同一套介面翻成多種語言、依系統自動切換的機制）統一管理，所以五種語言都顯示得出來。如果你是開發者，想強制測試某個語言，可以設環境變數（開程式之前預先塞給它的隱藏開關，一般使用者看不到）USAGE_LANG=ja 之類來釘住語言。就像一台跨國販賣機，以前只會講中文，現在進到哪一國就自動切那一國的語言顯示。
body.zh-CN: 你的面板会自动变成你电脑的语言。usage 现在会检测 macOS 系统语言，自动把整个界面切成繁体中文、简体中文、英文、日文或韩文，不用设置——系统是什么语言就显示什么。以前界面的状态文字（像「✓ 已同步」）是硬写死的中文，现在全改交给一套多语言系统（i18n，把同一套界面翻成多种语言、依系统自动切换的机制）统一管理，所以五种语言都显示得出来。如果你是开发者，想强制测试某个语言，可以设环境变量（开程序之前预先塞给它的隐藏开关，一般用户看不到）USAGE_LANG=ja 之类来钉住语言。就像一台跨国自动售货机，以前只会讲中文，现在进到哪个国家就自动切那个国家的语言显示。
body.en: Your panel now shows up in your computer's language. usage detects your macOS system language and automatically switches the entire interface between Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, or Korean — no setup needed, whatever your system uses is what you get. Previously the status text (like "✓ 已同步", meaning "synced") was hardcoded in Chinese; it's all now routed through an i18n system (internationalization — the machinery that translates one interface into many languages and switches them based on your system), so all five languages actually display. If you're a developer who wants to force a specific language for testing, you can set an environment variable (a hidden switch stuffed into the program before it opens, invisible to regular users) like USAGE_LANG=ja to pin the language. It's like a vending machine that used to only speak Chinese but now switches to whatever country it's sitting in.
body.ja: パネルがあなたのパソコンの言語で表示されるようになった。usage は macOS のシステム言語を検出し、インターフェース全体を繁体字中国語・簡体字中国語・英語・日本語・韓国語のいずれかに自動で切り替える。設定は不要で、システムが使っている言語がそのまま表示される。以前はステータス文字（「✓ 已同步」（中国語で「同期済み」を意味する）など）が中国語で固定されていたが、今回から i18n（国際化、一つの画面を多数の言語に翻訳しシステムに合わせて切り替える仕組み）で一元管理されるようになり、五言語すべてが正しく表示される。開発者で特定の言語を強制的に試したい場合は、環境変数（プログラム起動前にあらかじめ仕込む隠しスイッチで一般ユーザーの目には触れない）に USAGE_LANG=ja などを設定すれば言語を固定できる。中国語しか話せなかった自動販売機が、置かれた国に合わせてその国の言語に自動切り替えするようになったようなものである。
body.ko: 패널이 컴퓨터의 언어를 따라 바뀐다. usage가 macOS 시스템 언어를 감지해 인터페이스 전체를 번체 중국어·간체 중국어·영어·일본어·한국어 중 하나로 자동으로 바꾼다. 설정은 필요 없고, 시스템이 쓰는 언어가 그대로 뜬다. 예전에는 상태 문구(예: '✓ 已同步', 즉 중국어로 '동기화 완료'를 뜻함)가 중국어로 고정돼 있었지만, 이제는 i18n(국제화, 하나의 화면을 여러 언어로 번역해 시스템에 맞춰 갈아끼는 장치)로 한곳에서 관리되어 5개 언어 모두 제대로 표시된다. 개발자라서 특정 언어를 강제로 테스트하고 싶다면 환경 변수(프로그램을 켜기 전에 미리 끼워 넣는 숨겨진 스위치로 일반 사용자는 볼 수 없음)에 USAGE_LANG=ja 따위를 설정해 언어를 고정할 수 있다. 중국어만 할 줄 알던 자판기가, 놓인 나라에 따라 그 나라 말로 자동으로 바뀌는 것과 같다.

items.original:
**Multi-language UI (i18n)**: automatically detects the macOS system language and displays the interface in Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, or Korean. No configuration needed.
**`USAGE_LANG` environment variable**: force a specific language (e.g. `USAGE_LANG=ja`) for development and testing.
Removed hardcoded Chinese status strings (e.g. `✓ 已同步`) from `usage_client.py`; all status text now goes through the i18n system.

title.zh-TW: 開源授權改採 AGPL，改作發佈也須公開原始碼
title.zh-CN: 开源授权改用 AGPL，改作发布也须公开源代码
title.en: License switches to AGPL — forked releases must stay open-source
title.ja: ライセンスを AGPL に変更、改造して公開する場合はソース公開が必須
title.ko: 라이선스를 AGPL로 바꿨다, 고쳐 배포하려면 소스 코드 공개 필수

body.zh-TW: 如果你打算拿 usage 的原始碼去改、然後發佈出去，要注意授權變嚴了。授權從 MIT（幾乎隨你用的寬鬆條款）改成 AGPL-3.0（修改後發佈出去的版本必須同樣開源、把原始碼公開的條款）——目的是保護原作者，讓別人不能把改過的版本藏起來不還給社群。另外，面板底部現在會顯示一行小字「based on usage by lollapalooza」，標明出處。就像一份開放讓大家免費用的食譜，本來隨你改隨你賣，現在改成「你可以改、但端出去的菜也得公開你的配方」，而且盤子底下印著原廚師的名字。
body.zh-CN: 如果你打算拿 usage 的源代码去改、然后发布出去，要注意授权变严了。授权从 MIT（几乎随你用的宽松条款）改成 AGPL-3.0（修改后发布出去的版本必须同样开源、把源代码公开的条款）——目的是保护原作者，让别人不能把改过的版本藏起来不还给社群。另外，面板底部现在会显示一行小字「based on usage by lollapalooza」，标明出处。就像一份开放让大家免费用的食谱，本来随你改随你卖，现在改成「你可以改、但端出去的菜也得公开你的配方」，而且盘子底下印着原厨师的名字。
body.en: If you plan to take usage's source code, modify it, and release it, note that the license got stricter. It changed from MIT (a permissive license that lets you do almost anything) to AGPL-3.0 (which requires that any modified version you distribute must also be open-sourced) — the goal is to protect the original author so nobody can hoard a modified version without giving back to the community. Also, the bottom of the panel now shows a small line, "based on usage by lollapalooza," crediting the source. It's like a recipe that was free for anyone to use, tweak, and sell, but now says "you may modify it, but the dish you serve must come with your recipe published" — and the plate is stamped with the original chef's name.
body.ja: usage のソースコードを改造して公開しようとするなら、ライセンスが厳しくなったことに注意したい。MIT（ほぼ自由に使える緩い条項）から AGPL-3.0（改造して配布する版も同様にオープンソース化し、ソースを公開しなければならない条項）へ変更された。目的は原作者を守り、改造版をこっそり隠してコミュニティに還元しない使い方を防ぐことだ。また、パネル下部に「based on usage by lollapalooza」という出典を示す小さな一行が表示されるようになった。誰でも自由に使えたレシピが、「改変してよいが、出す料理には必ずレシピも公開せよ」と変わり、さらに皿の底に元シェフの名前が刻まれたようなものである。
body.ko: usage의 소스 코드를 뜯어고쳐 배포하려 한다면 라이선스가 엄격해졌음을 알아둬야 한다. MIT(거의 마음대로 써도 되는 관대한 조항)에서 AGPL-3.0(고쳐서 배포하는 판도 똑같이 오픈소스로 공개해야 하는 조항)로 바뀌었다. 목적은 원작자를 지키고, 누군가 고친 판을 몰래 숨겨 커뮤니티에 돌려주지 않는 일을 막는 것이다. 또한 패널 맨 아래에 'based on usage by lollapalooza'라는 출처를 표시하는 작은 글줄이 뜬다. 누구나 자유롭게 쓰던 레시피가 '고쳐도 좋지만 내놓는 요리에는 레시피도 공개해야 한다'로 바뀌고, 게다가 접시 밑에 원래 요리사의 이름이 찍힌 것과 같다.

items.original:
**License changed from MIT to AGPL-3.0**: modified versions that are distributed must be open-sourced.
**Attribution footer in popover**: `based on usage by lollapalooza` shown at the bottom of the panel.

entries: **Monthly range in project usage**: cycle through Today / 7 days / Month to view per-project token usage and cost over the last 30 days.

**Project usage cost now calculated correctly**: Claude Code's JSONL does not write a `costUSD` field, so all projects previously showed $0.00. Now uses the same `calculate_cost()` path as the "Today" footer total.
**Fallback Opus pricing corrected to $5/M**: the offline fallback price for Opus was $15/M; corrected to $5/M to match LiteLLM's actual value.
Project usage SVG icon resized to 30×30 to match Claude Code / Codex icons.
Removed Taiwan, Matrix, ECG, Minimal, and Sketch PyObjC native panels. All panels are now HTML/CSS-based; new panel designs are in progress.
Removed Antigravity quota tracking (Google OAuth credentials must not be committed to source; feature to be redesigned)

title.zh-TW: 專案用量新增「月」切換，費用也不再顯示為零
title.zh-CN: 项目用量新增「月」切换，费用也不再显示为零
title.en: Project usage gains a 'Month' toggle, and costs are no longer zero
title.ja: プロジェクト使用量に「月」切り替えを追加、費用がゼロで表示されなくなった
title.ko: 프로젝트 사용량에 '월' 전환 추가, 비용이 더 이상 0으로 표시되지 않음

body.zh-TW: 現在你可以查看各個專案近 30 天的用量了。專案用量（Project usage）面板新增了「月」的切換選項（與「今日」、「7 日」循環），而且之前因為 Claude Code 沒有記錄花費（costUSD）導致所有專案費用都顯示為 $0.00 的問題也修好了，現在會幫你算出正確的花費。另外，專案用量的圖示也調整成跟 Claude Code 與 Codex 的圖示一樣大。就像記帳本以前只能看這禮拜，現在可以翻看整個月，而且每筆帳目終於有寫金額了。
body.zh-CN: 现在你可以查看各个项目近 30 天的用量了。项目用量（Project usage）面板新增了「月」的切换选项（与「今日」、「7 日」循环），而且之前因为 Claude Code 没有记录花费（costUSD）导致所有项目费用都显示为 $0.00 的问题也修好了，现在会帮你算出正确的花费。另外，项目用量的图标也调整成跟 Claude Code 与 Codex 的图标一样大。就像记账本以前只能看这礼拜，现在可以翻看整个月，而且每笔账目终于有写金额了。
body.en: You can now view token usage across your projects for the last 30 days. The project usage panel has added a "Month" toggle (cycling through "Today" and "7 days"). Also, because Claude Code doesn't record the cost (costUSD), all projects previously showed $0.00; this is now fixed, and it calculates the correct cost. Additionally, the project usage icon has been resized to match the Claude Code and Codex icons. It's like an accounting book that used to only show this week's expenses, but now you can flip through the whole month, and every entry finally has a price tag.
body.ja: 各プロジェクトの直近30日間の使用量を確認できるようになった。プロジェクト使用量（Project usage）パネルに「月」の切り替えオプション（「今日」「7日」と循環）が追加された。さらに、以前は Claude Code が費用（costUSD）を記録していなかったため、すべてのプロジェクト費用が $0.00 と表示されていた問題も修正され、正しい費用を計算してくれるようになった。また、プロジェクト使用量のアイコンも Claude Code や Codex のアイコンと同じ大きさに調整された。家計簿が以前は今週分しか見られなかったのが、今では1ヶ月全体を見渡せるようになり、すべての項目にようやく金額が書き込まれたようなものである。
body.ko: 이제 각 프로젝트의 최근 30일 사용량을 확인할 수 있다. 프로젝트 사용량(Project usage) 패널에 '월' 전환 옵션이 추가되어 '오늘', '7일'과 함께 돌아가며 볼 수 있다. 또한 예전엔 Claude Code가 비용(costUSD)을 기록하지 않아 모든 프로젝트 비용이 $0.00으로 표시되던 문제도 고쳐져서, 이제 정확한 비용을 계산해 준다. 덤으로 프로젝트 사용량 아이콘 크기도 Claude Code와 Codex 아이콘과 똑같이 맞춰졌다. 예전엔 이번 주 내역만 볼 수 있던 가계부가 이제 한 달 치를 훑어볼 수 있게 되었고, 모든 항목에 드디어 금액이 적힌 것과 같다.

items.original:
**Monthly range in project usage**: cycle through Today / 7 days / Month to view per-project token usage and cost over the last 30 days.
**Project usage cost now calculated correctly**: Claude Code's JSONL does not write a `costUSD` field, so all projects previously showed $0.00. Now uses the same `calculate_cost()` path as the "Today" footer total.
Project usage SVG icon resized to 30x30 to match Claude Code / Codex icons.

title.zh-TW: 離線時 Opus 模型的備援定價更準確了
title.zh-CN: 离线时 Opus 模型的备援定价更准确了
title.en: Fallback pricing for the Opus model is more accurate when offline
title.ja: オフライン時の Opus モデルの代替価格がより正確になった
title.ko: 오프라인 시 Opus 모델의 대체 가격이 더 정확해짐

body.zh-TW: 離線時，系統為 Opus 模型估算花費的備援定價（fallback price，斷網時用來墊檔的預設價格）從 $15/M 修正成了 $5/M。這讓它跟 LiteLLM 的實際數值保持一致。就像是你常去的商店網路斷線查不到售價時，老闆憑記憶算給你的價格變得更接近真實售價了。
body.zh-CN: 离线时，系统为 Opus 模型估算花费的备援定价（fallback price，断网时用来垫档的默认价格）从 $15/M 修正成了 $5/M。这让它跟 LiteLLM 的实际数值保持一致。就像是你常去的商店网络断线查不到售价时，老板凭记忆算给你的价格变得更接近真实售价了。
body.en: When offline, the fallback price (the default rate used to estimate costs when the network is disconnected) for the Opus model has been corrected from $15/M to $5/M. This aligns it with LiteLLM's actual value. It's like going to your regular store when their network is down, and the owner quoting you a price from memory that's now much closer to the real cost.
body.ja: オフライン時、Opus モデルの費用を見積もるための代替価格（fallback price、ネット切断時に使われるデフォルト価格）が $15/M から $5/M に修正された。これにより LiteLLM の実際の数値と一致するようになった。行きつけの店でネットが切れて価格が調べられない時、店主の記憶による見積もりが実際の販売価格に近くなったようなものである。
body.ko: 오프라인일 때 Opus 모델의 비용을 추산하기 위한 대체 가격(fallback price, 인터넷이 끊겼을 때 쓰는 기본 가격)이 $15/M에서 $5/M로 수정되었다. 이로써 LiteLLM의 실제 수치와 똑같아졌다. 단골 가게에 인터넷이 끊겨 가격을 조회할 수 없을 때, 사장님이 기억을 더듬어 불러주는 가격이 실제 판매가에 더 가까워진 것과 같다.

items.original: **Fallback Opus pricing corrected to $5/M**: the offline fallback price for Opus was $15/M; corrected to $5/M to match LiteLLM's actual value.

title.zh-TW: 面板底層架構全面翻新，舊有原生面板與 Antigravity 追蹤暫時退役
title.zh-CN: 面板底层架构全面翻新，旧有原生面板与 Antigravity 追踪暂时退役
title.en: Panel architecture completely overhauled, temporarily retiring old native panels and Antigravity tracking
title.ja: パネルの基本アーキテクチャを全面刷新し、旧来のネイティブパネルと Antigravity 追跡を一時的に退役
title.ko: 패널 기본 구조 전면 개편, 기존 네이티브 패널과 Antigravity 추적 임시 퇴역

body.zh-TW: 為了替接下來的新設計鋪路，所有面板的底層架構都改成了 HTML/CSS（用網頁技術來畫介面）。因此，我們移除了 Taiwan、Matrix、ECG、Minimal 和 Sketch 這五個用舊有原生程式碼寫的面板；同時，為了不把憑證寫死在程式碼裡，也暫時移除了 Antigravity 的用量追蹤功能，這些都會等架構調整好後重新設計。就像是把老房子的管線全部打掉重練，雖然有些舊傢俱暫時不能用，但這是為了迎接之後更棒的新裝潢。
body.zh-CN: 为了替接下来的新设计铺路，所有面板的底层架构都改成了 HTML/CSS（用网页技术来画界面）。因此，我们移除了 Taiwan、Matrix、ECG、Minimal 和 Sketch 这五个用旧有原生代码写的面板；同时，为了不把凭证写死在代码里，也暂时移除了 Antigravity 的用量追踪功能，这些都会等架构调整好后重新设计。就像是把老房子的管线全部打掉重练，虽然有些旧家具暂时不能用，但这是为了迎接之后更棒的新装潢。
body.en: To pave the way for upcoming new designs, the underlying architecture for all panels has been switched to HTML/CSS (drawing the interface using web technologies). Consequently, we've removed the Taiwan, Matrix, ECG, Minimal, and Sketch panels, which were written in legacy native code. At the same time, to avoid hardcoding credentials into the source code, Antigravity quota tracking has been temporarily removed until the feature can be redesigned. It's like gutting an old house to replace all the plumbing — some old furniture is temporarily unusable, but it's to make way for a much better renovation later.
body.ja: 今後の新しいデザインの土台を作るため、すべてのパネルの基本アーキテクチャが HTML/CSS（ウェブ技術を用いてインターフェースを描画する仕組み）に変更された。それに伴い、旧来のネイティブコードで書かれていた Taiwan、Matrix、ECG、Minimal、Sketch の5つのパネルを削除した。また、認証情報をソースコードに直接書き込むのを防ぐため、Antigravity の使用量追跡機能も一時的に削除し、アーキテクチャを整えた後に再設計することになった。古い家の配管をすべて壊して作り直すようなもので、一部の古い家具が一時的に使えなくなるが、それは後のより素晴らしい内装を迎えるためである。
body.ko: 앞으로 나올 새 디자인을 위한 밑작업으로 모든 패널의 기본 구조를 HTML/CSS(웹 기술로 화면을 그리는 방식)로 바꿨다. 이에 따라 기존 네이티브 코드로 짜여 있던 Taiwan, Matrix, ECG, Minimal, Sketch 패널 5개를 지웠다. 또한 인증 정보가 소스 코드에 하드코딩되는 것을 막기 위해 Antigravity 사용량 추적 기능도 임시로 지웠으며, 구조를 다듬은 뒤 다시 설계할 예정이다. 오래된 집의 배관을 싹 다 뜯어고치는 것과 같아서, 낡은 가구를 당장 쓰지 못하게 되더라도 나중에 더 멋진 인테리어를 맞이하기 위한 것이다.

items.original:
Removed Taiwan, Matrix, ECG, Minimal, and Sketch PyObjC native panels. All panels are now HTML/CSS-based; new panel designs are in progress.
Removed Antigravity quota tracking (Google OAuth credentials must not be committed to source; feature to be redesigned)

entries: **Default panel now renders via WKWebView + HTML/CSS**: the classic default panel moved to a shared HTML/CSS layer, paving the way for a future Windows version; macOS still embeds it in `NSPopover` via `WKWebView`.
**Antigravity quota tracking**: the popover now shows three cards for Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity; the Antigravity card has two rows for current usage (Session) and weekly cap (Weekly).
Antigravity buckets with `remainingFraction == 1.0` (unused) now hide reset times, avoiding the API's rolling placeholder from appearing as an endless "reset in ~24h".
`antigravity_loader` now splits quota buckets by reset window: shorter windows become Session and longer windows become Weekly. When Google's API exposes a weekly bucket, Weekly fills automatically.

WKWebView integration adds a JS bridge (refresh / quit / switch), preload support, and a dark backing layer to remove launch-time white flash; panel switching tears down the web view to break retain cycles.
Panel buttons now have pressed-depth and subtle scale feedback on click.
New dependencies: `pyobjc-framework-WebKit`, `pyobjc-framework-Quartz`.
Removed the CoreGraphics `panels/classic.py` implementation in favor of `HTMLPanel`.
Tightened `codex_loader` / `history_loader._as_int` typing with `max(0, int(value))`.
Use Quartz `CGColorCreateGenericRGB` to create the `CGColorRef`, eliminating the launch-time `ObjCPointerWarning`.

**Minimal panel**: dark minimal panel inspired by Linear / Raycast. Near-black background (`#0A0A0C`), rounded cards, accent-coloured progress bars (Claude warm-orange / Codex cyan). Each card has a Session row (26pt number) and a Weekly row (24pt), each with a label, percentage text, 2px progress bar, and reset countdown. Footer card presents rate, status, and today's cost as a two-column label-left / value-right layout with horizontal dividers between rows. Three-button bar (Refresh / Quit / Switch panel) uses accent gradient for primary and translucent bordered fill for secondary.

**ECG panel**: medical-monitor style panel. `ECGView` drives a dual-channel ECG waveform animation via `NSTimer` at 80 ms — LEAD A for Claude Code, LEAD B for Codex. Waveform amplitude scales with quota usage percent; higher burn rate produces more intense rhythms. Text labels and waveform zones are separated into fixed vertical sections so they never overlap.

**Matrix panel (駭客任務)**: animated digital-rain panel — black background, cascading katakana + digit characters in Matrix green. `MatrixRainView` is driven by an `NSTimer` at 80 ms; each tick draws one bright head glyph and a 10-character fading trail per column. Card areas use a translucent dark-green fill with green borders; all buttons and headers use terminal bracket style (`[ SWITCH ]`, `[ REFRESH ]`, `[ EXIT ]`); rate/status/today labels use uppercase English prefixes.

**Panel switching system**: a `⇄ Switch panel` button in the popover top-right opens an `NSMenu` of all registered panels; the selected panel applies immediately and is persisted via `NSUserDefaults` (key `usage.activePanelId`), so the last choice survives restarts.

**Classic panel**: the original two-card + footer layout, with the switch button embedded in the Claude card's top-right and a new `ClassicSwitchButton` that stays legible in both light and dark mode.

**Taiwan panel**: red-on-white themed panel (a 20-line `ThemeConfig`), with a top header bar containing the TAIWAN flag icon, the "台灣用量監控" title, and the switch button. Popover height grows from 574 → 672 when this panel is active.

New `panels/` module: `base.py` provides the `Panel` Protocol, `ThemeConfig` dataclass, generic `ThemedPanel`, and `NSUserDefaults` helpers; `classic.py` / `taiwan.py` are concrete panels; `__init__.py` provides the panel registry (`get_panel(id)`, `all_panels()`, with classic fallback for unknown ids).
New `assets/taiwan.png`, registered in `setup_app.py`'s `resources` list so it ships inside the `.app` bundle.

`menubar.py` shrunk significantly (1041 → 524 lines): all popover drawing and layout moved into `panels/`; `PopoverViewController` is now a lightweight container that rebuilds its content view from the active `Panel`; `AppDelegate` gains `switchPanel:` / `selectPanel:` and `_set_active_panel_id` to drive panel transitions.

Added `tests/test_panels.py` (11 cases) covering: panel registry contents, each panel's `preferred_size`, `NSUserDefaults` round-trip, unknown-id fallback, `ThemeConfig` application, and `ThemedPanel` height difference with/without a header.

`scripts/install-hook.sh`: wrap paths with `shlex.quote()` when generating the statusLine command, matching `setup_hook.py`. Prevents broken hook installs when the user's Python or hook path contains spaces.

`pricing.py`: `_pricing_cache` now records its source (cache / fetched / fallback) and timestamp. Fallback results use a short 10-minute TTL so cost estimates no longer stay stuck on stale fallback values after offline startup when the network recovers.

`menubar.py` / `codex_loader.py`: silent `except` blocks now emit `logger.warning(exc_info=True)` when `USAGE_DEBUG=1`, otherwise stay quiet. Debug sessions no longer mistake parse failures for "Codex not installed".

`README.md` / `README.en.md`: added a sentence to the pricing table section noting that first launch without a cache does a synchronous fetch and may take ~10 seconds on slow networks, so new users don't think the app is hung.
New `tests/test_main.py` (9 cases) covering `parse_args` and `_apply_outcome` behaviour.

New `tests/test_menubar.py` (14 cases) covering pure helpers: `format_human_time`, `_format_percent`, `_bar_color`, `_quota_row`, `_missing_row`, `_today_title(mock=True)`, `_empty_state`, `_error_state`, `_popover_size`.
Added 4 new cases in `tests/test_pricing.py` covering fallback TTL, retry-then-fetched, and no-refetch for fetched / cache sources.
Test suite grew from 63 → 90 passed.
Internal app identifiers changed from `usag` to `usage`: bundle id, filenames, launchctl label, and `~/.claude/` paths were renamed.
`setup_hook.py` now detects and clears old v0.1.x `usag` leftovers: hook script, settings statusLine, backup key, and status file.
`install-launchagent.sh` / `uninstall-launchagent.sh` now clean the old LaunchAgent plist and label automatically.
`usage_client.py` now falls back to the old `usag-status.json` path for upgrade compatibility.
Public app naming and internal bundle identifiers are now consistently `usage`.
`setup_app.py` now packages `usag_statusline.py` so the `.app` bundle ships the hook source.
`setup_hook.py` now resolves the hook source in both source-tree mode and `.app` bundle mode.
The popover now shows a one-click "立即安裝 hook" recovery button when the status file is missing.
Progress bars now change colour based on usage level: below 50% keeps the brand colour, 50–80% shifts to amber, ≥ 80% turns red.
`codex_loader.py`: use last token-event timestamp for `hours_back` filtering; per-file fault-tolerant sort.
`history_loader.py`: composite dedup key when id fields are absent; reject bool and negative token values.
`usage_client.py`: guard `rate_limits` sub-fields against non-dict values.
`setup_hook.py`: validate settings before writing; safely rebuild backup field if not a dict.
README: corrected three factual inaccuracies (network claim, Codex data source, cost is an estimate).
README: added Quick start table, Download the app section, and Troubleshooting table.
Progress bars now change colour based on usage level: below 50% keeps the brand colour (Claude orange / Codex cyan), 50–80% shifts to amber, ≥ 80% turns red.
Sync status label changed from `usag-status` to `usage` to match the public-facing project name.
`setup_hook.py`: wrap interpreter and hook paths with `shlex.quote()` so hooks work when the project directory contains spaces (PR #1, thanks @DennisWei9898).
`usag_statusline.py`: replace `datetime.UTC` (Python 3.11+) with `timezone.utc` for compatibility with macOS system Python 3.9 (PR #1, thanks @DennisWei9898).

`codex_loader.py`: use the last token-event timestamp for `hours_back` filtering so long sessions no longer drop recent tokens; per-file fault-tolerant sort so a single bad file doesn't break the entire session scan.
`history_loader.py`: fall back to a composite dedup key when `message_id` / `request_id` is absent; reject bool and negative token values.
`usage_client.py`: guard `rate_limits` and its sub-fields against non-dict values.
`setup_hook.py`: validate `settings.json` structure before writing; safely rebuild the backup field if it is not a dict.
README: replaced mainland Chinese phrasing ("打API", "打網路") with standard Taiwanese usage ("呼叫 API", "連網路").

Popover redesign:
- Claude Code / Codex cards now show a branded icon in the header (`claude.webp` / `codex.webp`).
- Card surfaces and progress fills switched to gradient (`NSGradient`); accent colours brightened (Claude leans warm orange, Codex leans cyan).
